jobs.title: Martech – Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) Sites and Assets - Sr. Associate
jobs.description:
At PwC, our people in data and analytics focus on leveraging data to drive insights and make informed business decisions. They utilise advanced analytics techniques to help clients optimise their operations and achieve their strategic goals. In data analysis at PwC, you will focus on utilising advanced analytical techniques to extract insights from large datasets and drive data\-driven decision\-making. You will leverage skills in data manipulation, visualisation, and statistical modelling to support clients in solving complex business problems.  

Focused on relationships, you are building meaningful client connections, and learning how to manage and inspire others. Navigating increasingly complex situations, you are growing your personal brand, deepening technical expertise and awareness of your strengths. You are expected to anticipate the needs of your teams and clients, and to deliver quality. Embracing increased ambiguity, you are comfortable when the path forward isn’t clear, you ask questions, and you use these moments as opportunities to grow.


Examples of the skills, knowledge, and experiences you need to lead and deliver value at this level include but are not limited to:

* Respond effectively to the diverse perspectives, needs, and feelings of others.
* Use a broad range of tools, methodologies and techniques to generate new ideas and solve problems.
* Use critical thinking to break down complex concepts.
* Understand the broader objectives of your project or role and how your work fits into the overall strategy.
* Develop a deeper understanding of the business context and how it is changing.
* Use reflection to develop self awareness, enhance strengths and address development areas.
* Interpret data to inform insights and recommendations.
* Uphold and reinforce professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), the Firm's code of conduct, and independence requirements.

  

The Opportunity  

As part of the Data and Analytics Generalist team you are expected to participate in client discussions and meetings, manage engagements, and drive end\-to\-end content transformation at client organizations. As a Senior Associate you are expected to analyze complex problems, mentor others, and maintain standards. You are also responsible for advising clients on the selection and implementation of Content and Digital Asset Management platforms, creating and executing content strategies, and consulting on enterprise\-wide content and digital asset solutions.


Responsibilities  

* Participate in client discussions and meetings
* Manage engagements and drive content transformation
* Advise clients on Content and Digital Asset Management platforms
* Create and execute content strategies
* Consult on enterprise\-wide content and digital asset solutions
* Analyze complex problems and mentor team members
* Maintain elevated standards in deliverables
* Build meaningful client relationships

What You Must Have  

* Bachelor's Degree
* 3 years of experience

What Sets You Apart  

* Master's Degree preferred
* Adobe Experience Manager Business Practitioner Professional and/or Specialist
* Adobe Experience Manager Sites/Assets Developer Professional and/or Specialist
* Adobe Experience Manager Sites Architect Master
* Participating in client discussions and meetings
* Communicating a broad range of Firm services
* Managing engagements and maintaining project economics
* Understanding of marketing content and asset technology landscape
* Driving end to end content transformation at client organizations
  

The salary range for this position is: $77,000 \- $202,000\. Actual compensation within the range will be dependent upon the individual's skills, experience, qualifications and location, and applicable employment laws. All hired individuals are eligible for an annual discretionary bonus. PwC offers a wide range of benefits, including medical, dental, vision, 401k, holiday pay, vacation, personal and family sick leave, and more. To view our benefits at a glance, please visit the following link: https://pwc.to/benefits\-at\-a\-glance


As PwC is an equal opportunity employer, all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment at PwC without regard to race; color; religion; national origin; sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity); age; disability; genetic information (including family medical history); veteran, marital, or citizenship status; or, any other status protected by law.


PwC does not intend to hire experienced or entry level job seekers who will need, now or in the future, PwC sponsorship through the H\-1B lottery, except as set forth within the following policy: https://pwc.to/H\-1B\-Lottery\-Policy.


Learn more about how we work: https://pwc.to/how\-we\-work


For only those qualified applicants that are impacted by the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, the Los Angeles' Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, San Diego County Fair Chance Ordinance, and the California Fair Chance Act, where applicable, arrest or conviction records will be considered for Employment in accordance with these laws. At PwC, we recognize that conviction records may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship to responsibilities such as accessing sensitive company or customer information, handling proprietary assets, or collaborating closely with team members. We evaluate these factors thoughtfully to establish a secure and trusted workplace for all.

jobs.title: Director of Marketing Technology
jobs.description:
Overview  


The Director of Marketing Technology leads the strategy, implementation, and optimization of marketing technology platforms that support marketing, sales, and customer experience initiatives. This role bridges marketing, IT, data, and analytics, ensuring that the organization’s MarTech stack enables scalable, data\-driven marketing performance.  


Key Responsibilities  


Marketing Tech Stack Ownership: Manage and maintain all components of the marketing technology ecosystem, including CRM, landing pages, OCI connections, attribution, data warehouse, and automation tools including project and budget management in these areas. Serve as the single point of contact for any technology changes / tech stack change requests generated across the business.  
Website Development  
SEO / AEO  
Reputation Management  
Media / Lead Vendor Onboarding: Set up and test new lead sources, ensuring proper tagging, routing, and compliance of digital and phone leads.  
UTM Strategy \& Execution: Support the media team in the implementation and monitoring of media UTM and GBP UTM parameters to ensure accurate campaign tracking and attribution.  
Landing Page Connectivity: Manage integrations between websites, landing pages, form submissions, and downstream systems.  
Customer Journey Mapping and Optimization: Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to design and refine customer journeys and drip campaigns across digital touchpoints.  
CRM Optimization: Ensure CRM systems are properly configured, integrated, and aligned with lead flow and lifecycle stages.  
Telecom Platform Support: Support the call center team in the administration and optimization of Five9 and similar telecom systems for lead routing and call tracking.  
New Technology: Identify, scope and test new technologies that can drive efficiencies, improve the business and create competitive advantage.  
Data Warehouse Integration: Oversee connections between marketing, operations, finance and supply chain platforms and the data warehouse to support reporting, segmentation, and performance analysis.  
Troubleshooting \& Diagnostics: Serve as the go\-to expert for resolving technical issues across platforms, APIs, and data pipelines. Consistently track and manage existing technology processes and systems to identify opportunities for improvement and enhancement / eliminate pain points.  
Documentation \& Inventory: Maintain detailed documentation of the tech stack, workflows, and Zapier automations, vendors contacts and similar inventory systems. Participate and or lead any troubleshooting of systems and platforms, particularly for unknown leads. Lead all domain management across brands.  


Required Qualifications  


Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Information Systems, Computer Science, or related field (MBA preferred).

Technical Skills

CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce)

Success Metrics (KPIs)

MarTech adoption and utilization  
Data quality and accessibility  
Lead conversion and pipeline contribution

Time\-to\-launch for campaigns

jobs.title: Director of Marketing Operations
jobs.description:
**Director of Marketing – Assisted Living \| Make a Difference Every Day**

Are you a dynamic relationship builder with a passion for seniors and a talent for telling meaningful stories? We’re looking for an experienced **Director of Marketing** to lead occupancy growth for our assisted living community and help families discover a place their loved ones can truly call home.

This isn’t just a marketing role—it’s an opportunity to change lives, support families, and represent a community built on compassion, dignity, and exceptional care.

What You’ll Do

As our Director of Marketing, you will be the heart of our outreach and the face of our community. Your mission is to connect with families, professionals, and partners to drive census while showcasing what makes our community special.

* Develop and execute strategic marketing and outreach plans to achieve occupancy goals
* Build strong relationships with hospitals, physicians, senior centers, and referral partners
* Conduct tours that inspire confidence, comfort, and excitement
* Guide families through the decision\-making process with empathy and professionalism
* Plan engaging events, open houses, and community partnerships
* Collaborate with leadership to strengthen brand presence and reputation
* Track leads, conversions, and trends using CRM tools
* Represent the community at networking and industry events

Who You Are

You are more than a marketer—you are a trusted advisor and storyteller.

* 2\+ years of marketing/sales experience in assisted living, senior housing, or healthcare (preferred)
* Proven track record of meeting occupancy and sales goals
* Exceptional communication and relationship\-building skills
* Compassionate, mission\-driven, and family\-focused
* Organized, goal\-oriented, and comfortable with CRM systems
* Ability to work some evenings and weekends for events as needed

Why Join Us?

* Competitive salary with performance incentives
* Supportive leadership and team culture
* Opportunity for professional growth
* A role where your work truly matters
* Beautiful community filled with amazing residents and families

Every day, you’ll help families find peace of mind and seniors find a vibrant place to live their best life. If you’re ready for a rewarding career where heart meets purpose, we’d love to meet you.

Apply today and help us welcome more families home.

Equal Opportunity Employer • Drug\-Free Workplace

Job Type: Full\-time

Benefits:

* 401(k)
* Dental insurance
* Health insurance
* Paid time off
* Vision insurance

People with a criminal record are encouraged to apply

Work Location: In person

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Specialist
jobs.description:
JM Test Systems is seeking a Marketing Operations Specialist to support marketing initiatives that drive brand awareness, lead generation, and customer engagement. This role is responsible for coordinating marketing events, managing social media, supporting marketing operations, and ensuring brand consistency across all marketing materials.


The ideal candidate is highly organized, creative, data\-driven, and comfortable managing multiple projects in a fast\-paced environment.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Event \& Lead Generation Support**

* Coordinate and manage company participation in tradeshows and marketing events
* Assist with event planning, logistics, and vendor coordination
* Track event budgets, KPIs, and ROI
* Support pre\-event, during\-event, and post\-event marketing activities
* Assist with lead capture and post\-event lead nurturing campaigns
* Provide attendee support and event communication

**Social Media \& Digital Engagement**

* Manage company social media channels
* Develop engaging content including copy, graphics, and posts
* Analyze engagement metrics and performance
* Maintain consistent brand voice and messaging
* Identify and implement new social media trends and best practices

**Marketing Operations \& Brand Management**

* Manage marketing collateral and promotional items (SWAG)
* Maintain inventory, coordinate purchasing, and track budgets
* Ensure brand consistency across marketing materials
* Coordinate with graphic designers on marketing assets such as:
* + Social media graphics
	+ Email newsletters
	+ Sales materials and flyers
* Maintain and update printed marketing materials
* Coordinate with external print vendors

**Content \& Marketing Initiatives**

* Manage company marketing publications such as newsletters
* Support marketing campaigns and internal initiatives
* Assist with tracking marketing data and analytics

**Qualifications**

**Education**

* High school diploma or equivalent required

**Experience \& Skills**

* Strong organizational and multitasking skills
* Excellent written and verbal communication
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Experience with social media platforms and marketing content creation
* Strong analytical mindset with ability to interpret marketing data
* Comfortable collaborating with multiple internal teams
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office

**Preferred**

* Experience with Google analytics or digital marketing tools
* Knowledge of SEO, content marketing, or paid advertising
* Experience supporting marketing events or tradeshows

**Work Environment**


This position requires regular computer use and coordination with various departments across the organization. The role may involve occasional movement between departments and assisting with marketing logistics.

**About JM Test Systems**


JM Test Systems is a leading provider of calibration, repair, and testing services for electronic test equipment. We are committed to delivering reliable, accurate service while continuously improving the quality of our processes and customer experience.




JM Test Systems is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.

jobs.title: Director of AI & Marketing Automation
jobs.description:
**Director of AI \& Marketing Automation**


**Remote Position**

**About Patriot Holdings:**



Patriot Holdings is a vertically integrated real estate investment platform focused on alternative real estate assets including self\-storage, manufactured housing communities, and small\-bay industrial properties.



With a $425M\+ portfolio spanning 100\+ properties, Patriot operates across the full lifecycle of real estate investment — from acquisition and asset management to investor capital formation and property\-level demand generation.



Our growth strategy is powered by a performance\-driven marketing engine connecting accredited investors with institutional\-grade opportunities while simultaneously driving tenant, resident, and homebuyer demand across our national property portfolio.



To support this scale, Patriot is building a modern marketing and automation infrastructure powered by AI, automation systems, and advanced marketing technology.


**About the Role:**



 Patriot Holdings is seeking a Director of AI \& Marketing Automationto architect and operate the technology infrastructure that powers marketing, investor acquisition, and property demand generation across the company.



This role serves as the technical backbone of the marketing organization, responsible for building the systems, automation workflows, CRM infrastructure, and AI\-powered tools that enable the marketing team to operate at scale.



Working closely with the Head of Marketing, this role translates marketing strategy into automation, workflows, data architecture, and scalable infrastructure across the company’s marketing and sales ecosystem.



While the Head of Marketing owns campaign strategy, paid media performance, funnel outcomes, and marketing ROI, this role owns the technology, automation, AI workflows, and marketing systems that make those outcomes possible.



This role reports directly to the Chief Growth Officer and collaborates closely with Marketing, Investor Relations, and Operations teams.


**Core Responsibilities:**


**Automation \& AI Systems Architecture:**



Serve as the company’s Senior Automation Architect, responsible for designing and implementing scalable automation and AI\-driven workflows across the organization.


**Responsibilities include:**


* Architect and build advanced workflows using n8n, Make.com, Zapier, APIs, and webhooks
* Design and deploy multi\-agent AI systems that automate research, outreach, marketing operations, and business intelligence
* Develop and maintain Claude skills, agents, and autonomous workflows that power internal operating systems
* Build AI\-driven systems that support:
	+ investor prospecting and outreach
	+ tenant and resident demand generation
	+ marketing campaign automation
	+ research and intelligence gathering
	+ operational reporting and insights
* Integrate AI tools across the company including:
	+ Claude OpenAI APIs
	+ enrichment APIs
	+ Automation platforms
* Continuously identify opportunities to replace manual processes with automation, i.e., content creation and publishing, listing creation and publishing, etc.
* Design scalable workflows that enable the marketing team to launch campaigns, outreach programs, and funnels rapidly.


**HubSpot CRM \& Marketing Systems Ownership:**



Own the architecture, performance, and health of HubSpot as Patriot’s central CRM and marketing automation platform.


**Responsibilities include:**


* Managing multiple CRM pipelines including:
	+ investor pipeline
	+ broker pipeline
	+ acquisition pipeline
	+ tenant/resident pipeline
	+ marketing lead pipelines
* Maintaining data integrity, lifecycle stages, canonical metadata structures, and CRM hygiene
* Designing and managing workflows for:
	+ lead routing
	+ investor nurturing
	+ lifecycle email marketing
	+ segmentation and targeting
	+ internal notifi cations and automation
* Maintaining HubSpot health score and operational best practices
* Ensuring data synchronization across marketing tools and outbound systems
* Supporting the Head of Marketing with automated funnel infrastructure and lifecycle marketing systems


**Monday.com Workflow Architecture \& Marketing Command Center Optimization:**



 Own and continuously improve the Monday.com operational infrastructure that powers marketing execution, reporting, and cross\-team coordination.


**Responsibilities include:**


* Architect and maintain campaign tracking boards across investor acquisition, tenant marketing, property\-level campaigns, and corporate initiatives.
* Optimize and maintain the company’s Marketing Command Center board, providing centralized visibility across all campaigns, funnels, and initiatives.
* Ensure marketing boards integrate with HubSpot, automation platforms, enrichment tools, and outbound systems.
* Maintain data integrity across Monday dashboards and performance cockpits, ensuring leadership has reliable real\-time visibility into marketing performance.
* Build performance dashboards tracking metrics such as:
	+ marketing\-attributed pipeline accredited investor lead flow
	+ tenant acquisition performance
	+ funnel conversion rates campaign ROI
* Implement Monday automations to streamline workflows and reduce manual operational work.
* Integrate Monday with the company’s broader tech stack to support automated reporting and campaign operations.
* Continuously improve board structure, automation architecture, and reporting frameworks.
* Advise teams on workflow design and operational efficiency within Monday.


**Marketing Technology Stack Ownership:**



Serve as the system owner for Patriot Holdings’ marketing and growth technology ecosystem, ensuring all tools are integrated, reliable, and optimized for performance. Key platforms include:


**CRM \& Marketing Automation**

* HubSpot
* Instantly
* Typeform


**Outbound \& Prospecting Infrastructure**


* Clay
* Apollo
* LinkedIn Sales Navigator
* HeyReach


**Automation Platforms**


* n8n
* Make.com
* Zapier


**Social Media Management**


* Sprout Social Analytics \& Attribution
* Google Analytics (GA4\)
* Google Tag Manager
* Ninety.io
* Monday.com Operational Workflow Platforms
* Monday.com


**Responsibilities include:**


* Designing and maintaining the architecture and integrations between all systems
* Ensuring seamless data synchronization across tools
* Monitoring system health and uptime
* Evaluating and implementing new marketing technologies
* Managing vendor relationships and software licenses
* Maintaining documentation for all system architecture and automation workflows


**Website Infrastructure \& Technical SEO**

Oversee Patriot’s website infrastructure and technical SEO performance across corporate and property\-level sites.


**Responsibilities include:**


* Managing websites built on WordPress and Webflow
* Optimizing website performance across:
	+ page speed
	+ Google Core Web Vitals
	+ technical SEO
	+ schema markup
	+ metadata and canonical structures
* Supporting the Head of Marketing with landing page deployment and funnel infrastructure
* Managing or coordinating with external agencies when needed.


**Data Enrichment \& Outbound Intelligence**

Own Patriot’s contact intelligence and enrichment infrastructure.


**Responsibilities include:**


* Managing Clay enrichment pipelines across business units.
* Enriching contacts for:
	+ investor outreach
	+ broker sourcing
	+ tenant/resident marketing
	+ acquisition pipelines
* Integrating Clay with:
	+ HubSpot
	+ Apollo
	+ outbound tools
	+ AI systems
* Building high\-quality datasets for hyper\-targeted outbound campaigns.


**AI Adoption \& Internal Enablement Champion**



AI adoption across the organization.


**Responsibilities include:**

* Identifying high\-leverage AI use cases across departments
* Building internal AI workfl ows that improve productivity
* Hosting monthly AI training sessions for internal teams
* Helping team members adopt AI tools for:
	+ research
	+ content creation
	+ automation
	+ operational efficiency

The goal is to make Patriot Holdings one of the most AI\-enabled real estate platforms in the industry.


**Qualifications:**


* 7\+ years of experience in marketing systems, automation engineering, marketing operations, or related technical roles.
* Demonstrated expertise in automation platforms such as n8n, Make.com, Zapier, or similar tools.
* Strong experience administering and optimizing HubSpot CRM and marketing automation systems.
* Experience building automation workflows, API integrations, and system architectures.
* Experience with data enrichment tools such as Clay or similar platforms.
* Familiarity with AI tools, automation agents, and modern AI workflows.
* Strong understanding of SEO fundamentals and website performance optimization.
* Experience managing marketing technology stacks and system integrations.
* Ability to translate marketing strategy into scalable systems and automation infrastructure.


**What You Will Get:**


* Opportunity to architect the automation and AI infrastructure for a rapidly growing real estate investment platform.
* Direct collaboration with the Chief Growth Officer and executive leadership team.
* Exposure to marketing systems driving hundreds of millions in real estate investments and property demand generation.
* Access to top\-tier marketing tools, data infrastructure, and AI technologies.
* A fast\-paced environment where innovation and systems thinking are highly valued.


**What Elite Looks Like:**



An elite candidate for this role is a systems architect and builder, not simply a marketing operations manager. The right person thrives designing automation infrastructure that enables teams to operate faster, smarter, and at scale.


**Top candidates will demonstrate the following traits:**

* Systems Thinker — naturally sees marketing, CRM, automation, and data as a connected operating system rather than isolated tools.
* Automation\-First Mindset — constantly identifies opportunities to replace manual work with scalable workflows and automation.
* Builder Mentality — enjoys architecting systems from the ground up and improving existing infrastructure across tools, integrations, and workflows.
* AI\-Curious and Experimental — actively explores new AI tools and workflows to improve productivity, research, automation, and outbound systems.
* Technical Problem Solver — comfortable working with APIs, integrations, and automation platforms to connect systems and build reliable processes.
* Data Integrity Focused — understands that clean data and well\-structured systems are the foundation of reliable automation and reporting.
* Business\-Oriented — recognizes that the systems built in this role ultimately power investor capital formation, tenant demand generation, and revenue growth.
* Continuous Optimizer — consistently improves workflows, tools, and systems to increase efficiency, speed, and scalability across the organization.

jobs.title: Marketing Analytics Intern, Animal Health Team
jobs.description:
Nature and Scope
The Marketing Analytics internship opportunity to develop an understanding of how animal health data flows from manufacturing to distribution to clinics, and how this informs marketing and commercial strategy. The intern will analyze customer, campaign, and sales data to identify trends and insights that support targeting, segmentation, and performance measurement. Responsibilities include supporting the Animal Health Commercial Operations and Marketing teams with data collection and validation, building reports and dashboards, performing quantitative analyses, and translating findings into actionable recommendations, as well as preparing presentations of insights for Commercial team members.
Internship Project Summary
We are currently seeking a dynamic and highly motivated intern to support strategic analytics on Animal Health Commercial Operations team. An ideal candidate would be hardworking, curious, and insights driven.
Ability to a 13 \-week program (from May 18, 2026 to August 14, 2026\) and commit to 40 hours per week remotely.
Essential Duties and Responsibilities
Nothing in this job description restricts management’s right to assign or reassign duties and responsibilities to this job at any time.* Develop an understanding of how to analyze marketing, customer accounts, sales and CRM activity data
* Ability to understand the process in joining different datasets
* Participate in Tableau dashboard creating, data analyzing, and presenting key findings when investigating data outliers
* Completion of one focused project during the term of employment which will require the delivery of a dashboard presentation to select Animal Health team members (potential topics to be discussed and agreed upon)
* Assist in other data analytics activities as assigned
* Perform any other tasks/duties as assigned by management.


Education Requirements and Qualifications
To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill and/or ability required.* Currently pursuing a bachelor’s degree in Pharmaceutical Science, Finance, Marketing, Data Science, Economics, or Accounting. Candidate must have successfully completed Junior Year of an undergraduate program or higher.
* Preferred: Understanding of profit and loss, net present value calculations
* Preferred: Data visualization and interactive dashboard development
* Required: PowerPoint (Structure, Build, Deliver)
* Required: Excel Pivot Tables and Charts
* Other skills/qualities\- High attention to detail, excellent organizational and communication, ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently and meet deadlines, critical thinking and analytical skills


Benefits of being a part of an American Regent Internship* Opportunity to obtain valuable real\-world experience in a Pharma setting, while gaining specific field\-related exposure, and making important professional connections.
* Discover if a particular career path or field of study in the Pharma industry is right for you.
* Engage in our fun and collaborative company culture.


Expected Hourly Rate:  

$20\.00 \- $23\.00  

  

The hourly rate displayed is the minimum and maximum hourly rate of compensation for the role that the employer in good faith believes to be accurate at the time of the posting of an advertisement for the role. Actual compensation for the role will be based on a number of different factors including but not limited to the candidate’s qualifications, education, knowledge, skills and experience.

jobs.title: Marketing Technology Lead
jobs.description:
**About AvePoint:**



Beyond Secure. AvePoint is the global leader in data security, governance, and resilience, going beyond traditional solutions to ensure a robust data foundation and enable organizations everywhere to collaborate with confidence. Over 25,000 customers worldwide rely on the AvePoint Confidence Platform to prepare, secure, and optimize their critical data across Microsoft, Google, Salesforce, and other collaboration environments. AvePoint's global channel partner program includes approximately 5,000 managed service providers, value\-added resellers, and systems integrators, with our solutions available in more than 100 cloud marketplaces. To learn more, visit **www.avepoint.com**.



At AvePoint, we are committed to investing in our people. Agility, passion and teamwork set us up to do our best work and foster a culture where you are empowered to craft your career, make an impact, and own (y)our future. Unleash the power of you!


**About the Role:**

  

**Summary**



The Marketing Technology Lead will be a pivotal force in accelerating our global marketing operations. You'll drive the setup, governance, and enablement of our marketing campaign engine—Marketo and Asana—enabling our regional marketing teams to execute faster, smarter, and at scale. This isn't a 'set it and forget it' role. You'll be the builder and the enabler working to create scalable solutions that multiply the impact of our entire marketing organization. The specialist will help drive critical governance as we scale our marketing efforts across teams, ultimately driving critical improvements in lead\-to\-pipeline conversion. The ideal candidate is a proactive builder with at least 2 years of marketing automation admin or power user experience including requirements gathering, documentation, building, testing, and enablement.


**What you will do**


* **Campaign Management**: Manage marketing automation campaign processes, proactively researching and implementing the latest campaign best practices, strategies, and product releases. Implement and manage the global campaign framework in marketing automation to ensure there are standardized templates, audiences, and workflows.
* **Process Management**: Create and maintain comprehensive standard operating procedures for MAP and Asana in the MarkOps Hub, ensuring knowledge transfer and operational continuity.
* **Enablement**: Train marketing teams on Asana and Marketo standards, templates, audiences, and workflows.
* **Collaboration**: Support global demand generation and field team by thinking through business and technical requirements to deploy new use cases in MAP and Asana.
* **System Governance:** MaintainMarketo and Asana's organizational structure including naming convention, folder structure, teams and user roles, project and program templates, key fields, and ongoing archiving strategy
* **Audience Segmentation:** Build and maintain audience data sets, field mapping, and structure
* **Martech Management:** Support essential marketing technology processes including user provisioning and procurement.


**Required Experience**


* 3\+ years of experience as HubSpot or Marketo Super Admin
* Campaign building expertise: You've built and run complex multi\-step email journeys
* Data management: Expertise in lead processes, lead routing, consent compliance, and data hygiene
* Technical problem\-solving: You can troubleshoot issues and debug MAP workflows under minimal supervision
* Technical writing: Demonstrated ability to create and maintain technical documentation and SOPs
* Project management: Experience managing multiple priorities and familiarity with SCRUM
* Enablement mindset: Excellent communication skills with ability to train and enable non\-technical stakeholders

  


**Preferred Qualifications**


* Marketing automation platform certification (Marketo Certified Expert or HubSpot Marketing Software Certification)
* Integrations: Design and build integrations between marketing automation and other applications or data sources
* Experience with CRM systems (Dynamics, HubSpot, or Salesforce)
* Background in technical writing, process optimization and change management
* Understanding of HTML/CSS for email and landing page customization
* Experience working in global or multi\-regional marketing organizations

  

  

The Salary Range for this role is $100,000 \- $120,000\. At AvePoint, we strive to offer competitive, fair, and equitable total rewards. The listed salary range represents a good faith estimate, with final offers based on location, experience, skills, and qualifications. The listed range reflects base salary only; our total rewards include base salary, comprehensive benefits (medical, dental, vision, 401(k) with match, unlimited PTO), and depending on the role, bonuses, commissions, or equity (RSUs). We welcome compensation discussions—apply even if your expectations fall outside the range.


Any personal data you share with us during the application process will be processed strictly in compliance with applicable data protection laws and our Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations - Performance Team Summer Intern
jobs.description:
**About our Company**:


Medidata is powering smarter treatments and healthier people through digital solutions to support clinical trials. Celebrating 25 years of ground\-breaking technological innovation across more than 36,000 trials and 11 million patients, Medidata offers industry\-leading expertise, analytics\-powered insights, and one of the largest clinical trial data sets in the industry. More than 1 million users trust Medidata's seamless, end\-to\-end platform to improve patient experiences, accelerate clinical breakthroughs, and bring therapies to market faster. Discover more at www.medidata.com.

**The Program:**


At Medidata, interns will have the opportunity to accelerate their careers by working closely with experienced professionals and gain valuable, hands\-on, full\-time work experience. By being a part of our global organization, interns have the opportunity to work alongside our talented and committed professionals helping them to build a strong foundation for achieving their career goals. For 12 weeks, beginning May 18, 2026, interns will have an opportunity to gain a deep understanding of what it means to be a Medidatian. United around a single goal of empowering smarter treatments and healthier people. Medidatians work in a culture of curiosity, innovation and fun. You will be contributing to the line of business with sustainable and meaningful work.


Our Summer Internship program also includes instructor led training, guided mentorship, exposure to senior leadership and community service. In addition to individual and specific related responsibilities, each intern will participate in our Intern Innovation Lab. Assigned to cross\-functional teams, interns will work closely to develop an innovative solution to a business problem currently facing Medidata. As they work diligently to present their final solutions to a panel of top Medidata leaders, we are confident that our interns will make a significant impact on our business.

**About the Team**:


We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Video Intern to join our in\-house Creative Services team. This internship offers hands\-on experience in video production, editing, and content creation and provides an opportunity to work on real projects in a fast\-paced, creative environment. As a Video Intern, you'll support the production team in various stages of video creation, from pre\-production to post\-production, and gain invaluable experience working on branded content for different digital platforms.

**Responsibilities**:

* Support multiple projects simultaneously, helping to ensure deliverables, timelines, and budgets are met in a fast\-paced environment
* Assist in video shoots, including setting up equipment, managing props, wrangling talent, and supporting the video team
* Capture B\-roll footage, interviews, behind\-the\-scenes, and other video and photo content as needed
* Help with video editing tasks, including creating stringouts, cutting footage, adding graphics, sound editing, and color correction
* Organize and archive video assets for easy access and reference
* Collaborate with other video team members to brainstorm and develop video concepts and ideas. Work with designers and other creative services team members to build needed graphics for content projects
* Assist in creating motion graphics, animations, and other multimedia assets
* Ensure all videos meet brand guidelines and quality standards
* Optimize assets for various platforms, including internal, web, and social media
* Participate in team meetings and contribute creative ideas and feedback
**Qualifications:**

* You're enrolled in or recently graduated from a film, media, communications, or related program
* You possess a strong understanding of video production processes, terminology, and editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve)
* You have a strong knowledge of camera equipment, lighting, and audio recording techniques
* You have excellent written and verbal communication skills and can work independently and collaboratively in a team environment
* You've got strong attention to detail, are organized, can manage multiple tasks in a fast\-paced environment, and can think on your feet and solve issues quickly
* Hands\-on experience in a professional creative services environment
* You're a self\-starter who has a creative mindset, the ability to think strategically and analytically, and isn't afraid to ask questions
* The opportunity to contribute to real\-world video projects, including social media content, promotional videos, and more
* Mentorship from experienced professionals in the video production and creative industry
* Exposure to the complete video production workflow, from concept to final product
* Strong examples of work showcasing your video production skills to add to your portfolio
* Networking opportunities with professionals across various departments

jobs.title: Marketing Automation Specialist
jobs.description:
**Job Summary:**

The Marketing Automation Specialist is responsible for supporting programmatic and operational initiatives within the firm’s marketing automation platform (MAP) Marketo. Responsibilities for this role include automation of demand generation campaigns, supporting marketing operation programmatic functions (lead life cycle, lead scoring, lead nurturing), make data\-driven recommendations, creating and maintaining campaign assets (gated content, basic web pages, emails, image gallery), and implementing marketing automation best practices.


**Job Duties:**

* Supports marketing operations initiatives related to lead lifecycle, lead scoring, lead nurturing, segmentation, and data hygiene
* Builds marketing automation programs adhering to the firm’s MAP standards and best practices
* Creates and executes marketing campaigns in Marketo, the firm’s marketing automation platform (MAP)
* Builds and maintains nurture stream programs for regular communication with customers and prospects
* Supports maintaining data quality within the MAP database
* Tracks and measures program objectives
* Creates and monitors reports on marketing programs and business results
* Reviews and conducts thorough QA testing on Marketo programs
* Collaborates with various marketing functions to ensure there is a cohesive creation, execution, and testing/optimization strategy to increase engagement and meet program goals
* Assists in the creation of marketing assets such as emails, landing pages, forms, smart campaigns, and reports within Marketo, including templates for use by others within the marketing function
* Supports targeted audience pulls and success tracking according to campaign requirements
* Documents and communicates best practices and firm requirements for the MAP
* Assists in training marketing resources on how to run reports and accomplish basic tasks within the MAP
* Other duties as required

**Supervisory Responsibilities:**

* N/A

**Qualifications, Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:**

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s degree, required; focus in Marketing, Communications, Information Technology, Business, Accounting, or Finance, preferred

**Experience:**

* Two (2\) or more years of marketing or communications experience, required
* Experience working within a professional services environment (i.e., accounting, financial consulting, business advisory services and/or banking industries), preferred

**License/Certifications:**

* Marketo Certified Expert (MCE), preferred

**Software:**

* Experience with Marketing Automation Platforms, required; prior experience with Marketo, preferred
* Experience with CRM systems, preferred; prior experience with MS Dynamics, preferred
* Experience with CMS software solutions, preferred; prior experience with Kentico, preferred

**Language:**

* N/A

**Other Knowledge, Skills, \& Abilities:**

* Working knowledge of digital marketing, marketing automation, and CRM best practices
* Strong understanding of multi\-channel marketing campaigns
* Basic knowledge around attribution, lead lifecycle, and lead scoring concepts
* Strong analytical skills and ability to work both independently and on cross\-functional teams
* Basic understanding of data privacy laws including CAN\-SPAM and GDPR
* Deep understanding of email KPIs including, open rate, click through rate, click to open rate, bounce rate, and opt out rate and the ability to make strategic recommendations to improve them
* Aptitude for logic expressions and workflow construction
* Excellent project management skills and organizational skills, and a proven success of managing to a deadline
* Displays superior verbal and written communication skills
* Ability to work in a deadline\-driven environment while handling multiple projects simultaneously
* Ability to successfully multi\-task while working independently or within a group environment
* Ability to understand and communicate BDO business, marketplace and value proposition
* Strong interpersonal and client service skills, consultative approach to working with marketing and client service professionals at all levels
Knowledge of B2B marketing strategies and tactics and their application in a professional services organization  
* 

Individual salaries that are offered to a candidate are determined after consideration of numerous factors including but not limited to the candidate’s qualifications, experience, skills, and geography.


National Range: $60,000 \- $70,000
  

Maryland Range: $60,000 \- $70,000
  

NYC/Long Island/Westchester Range: $60,000 \- $70,000


  
Join us at BDO, where you will find more than a career, you’ll find a place where your work is impactful, and you are valued for your individuality. We offer flexibility and opportunities for advancement. Our culture is centered around making meaningful connections, approaching interactions with curiosity, and being true to yourself, all while making a positive difference in the world.


At BDO, our purpose of helping people thrive every day is at the heart of everything we do. Together, we are focused on delivering exceptional and sustainable outcomes and value for our people, our clients, and our communities. BDO is proud to be an ESOP company, reflecting a culture that puts people first, by sharing financially in our growth in value with our U.S. team. BDO professionals provide assurance, tax and advisory services for a diverse range of clients across the U.S. and in over 160 countries through our global organization.


BDO is the first large accounting and advisory organization to implement an Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP). A qualified retirement plan, the ESOP offers participants a stake in the firm’s success through beneficial ownership and a unique opportunity to enhance their financial well\-being. The ESOP stands as a compelling addition to our comprehensive compensation and Total Rewards benefits\* offerings. The annual allocation to the ESOP is fully funded by BDO through investments in company stock and grants employees the chance to grow their wealth over time as their shares vest and grow in value with the firm’s success, with no employee contributions.


We are committed to delivering exceptional experiences to middle market leaders by sharing insight\-driven perspectives, helping companies take business as usual to better than usual. With industry knowledge and experience, a breadth and depth of resources, and unwavering commitment to quality, we pride ourselves on:


* Welcoming diverse perspectives and understanding the experience of our professionals and clients
* Empowering team members to explore their full potential
* Our talented team who brings varying skills, knowledge and experience to proactively help our clients navigate an expanding array of complex challenges and opportunities
* Celebrating ingenuity and innovation to transform our business and help our clients transform theirs
* Focus on resilience and sustainability to positively impact our people, clients, and communities
* BDO Total Rewards that encompass so much more than traditional “benefits.” Click here to find out more!
* Benefits may be subject to eligibility requirements.

Equal Opportunity Employer, including disability/vets


Click here to find out more!

jobs.title: CRM Marketing Data Specialist
jobs.description:
Overview:
**ABOUT THE POSITION**

**CRM Data Specialist \| Hybrid \| New York \| New Jersey \| Pennsylvania**

VHB is seeking a CRM Data Specialist to join our Northeast Regional Marketing Team!  

In this role, you’ll work closely with marketing and technical partners to maintain the accuracy and integrity of information in our Client Relationship Management (CRM) system, ensuring our teams have reliable data to support pursuits, client focus teams, and other strategic business development initiatives.  

You will help maintain and manage the accuracy of critical marketing and business development information—keeping our contacts, companies, opportunities, and project data clean, reliable, and actionable. By turning data into insight, you’ll support reporting dashboards, such as win\-loss metrics and opportunity pipelines, that inform decision\-making across the firm.  

You’ll also serve as a CRM super user and go\-to resource for your colleagues—identifying opportunities to improve system usage, automating everyday tasks, customizing report views, and helping train new users so that our teams can fully leverage the system in support of VHB’s business development approach.**Primary Duties \& Responsibilities**
======================================

* Understands VHB’s Focus Forward Approach and how the CRM supports the program. Supports maintenance, reporting, and accuracy of marketing and business development metrics in the CRM and reporting dashboards (i.e., win\-loss, opportunity pipeline).
* Helps to maintain data integrity of VHBers, contacts, companies, opportunities in the pipeline, and project
* Provides frequent review of data in the system to ensure data Follows up and advises marketing and technical practitioners when anomalies in data occur and/or lessons learned on metrics can be applied and shared.
* Identifies ways to improve usage of the CRM through automating basic, everyday
* Customizes and prepares marketing report views from the
* Serves as CRM and marketing database super Trains new employees on the CRM, in partnership with marketing management.
* Identifies system bugs and tracks in
* May support basic qualifications packages/proposals, in partnership with marketing team.
* Participates in professional and personal development aligned with career
* Performs all job functions in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local regulations and VHB policies and procedures.
* Has working knowledge and familiarity using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Copilot, etc. to perform tasks including data management and analysis.
* Reviews and interprets both quantitative and qualitative data
* Conducts training sessions for Project Managers and marketing staff on CRM usage

**Skills \& Knowledge**
=======================

* Demonstrated initiative
* Proficient with Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel
* Experience developing and conducting system trainings for technical and marketing staff
* Strong business data analytics experience supporting sales performance and revenue tracking
* Excellent verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills
* Team oriented with ability to perform multiple tasks independently in a timely manner and collaborate effectively and positively with coworkers
* Self\-motivated, highly organized, and detail oriented
* Skills and knowledge must be commensurate with required experience and job level

**Minimum Qualifications**
==========================

* 3\-5\+ years of marketing information and systems management experience
* BA/BS in Marketing Information Systems, Marketing, Computer Science, or related discipline
* Experience managing a CRM or similar marketing information system (Microsoft Dynamics)
* Experience with market research, data management and analytics
* Proficient with Microsoft PowerBi


Our best estimate of the salary range for this position located in New York and New Jersey is $31\.25/hr. to $45\.65/hr. This offer is determined based on a number of job\-related factors including internal comparators, skills, education, training, credentials, experience, scope and complexity of role responsibilities and geographic location. In addition, VHB offers a holistic benefits package which can be found here.We are VHB! We’re an inspired and innovative team of engineers, scientists, planners, and designers who partner with clients in the transportation, real estate, institutional, and energy industries, as well as federal, state, and local governments. Our work helps improve mobility, enhance communities, and contribute to economic vitality. We do this while balancing development and infrastructure needs with stewardship of our environment.

  

Our people make us great! VHB provides a differentiating employee experience, which includes:

* Diverse and inclusive culture of collaboration and innovation
* Opportunity to work on complex, transformational projects
* Community and social responsibility as sustainable stewards
* Focus on learning, development, and career growth
* Best\-in\-class benefits, including flexible, hybrid workplace

We are consistently rated one of the top AEC firms to work for across our 30\+ offices on the East Coast. We’re growing, and we hope you’ll join us!

 *VHB is a proud Equal Opportunity Employer. Since our founding, we have intentionally fostered a culture of inclusion and belonging, supported by deep\-rooted core values, one of which is diversity. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or other characteristics protected by law.**\#LI\-LO1**\#LI\-Hybrid*

jobs.title: Direct Marketing Operations Internship - Summer 2026 - Escondido, CA
jobs.description:
* Local resident with area knowledge preferred
* Please note this internship is for our onsite direct marketing team and not for digital, branding, or social media marketing.
* Housing is not provided for this position.
* 5 day of open availability required (Weekends and Holidays included) with 8 hour shifts schedule between the hours of 8am \- 7pm
* The hourly rate of pay is $20\.
* This role is due to take place Summer 2026 (Ideally early May to mid September)
* One Internship position available at The Stoneridge Preview Center and one internship position available at The Welk.

**HVO Marketing Intern Job Description**

Are you ready to grow your dream career while making others' vacation dreams come true? Hyatt Vacation Ownership is a world premier organization for Vacation Ownership with resorts at destinations around the globe. Join our team and help deliver unforgettable experiences that make vacation dreams come true.

**PROGRAM DESCRIPTION**  

  

Offered at U.S. based resorts, the **College Internship Program \- Marketing and Sales** is an immersion program offering participants work experience in one of our Sales Centers throughout the company. Interns will participate in the following activities: comprehensive onboarding, operational duties within their assigned department, eLearning, and virtual meetings with company leaders, job shadowing, and a direct mentorship with an onsite leader.


The **College Internship Program – Marketing and Sales** is designed to last between 3 and 6 months depending upon the participant’s availability and the needs of the property. The participants should expect to work a full\-time schedule in this program. All College Internships are paid at an hourly wage.


Successful College Interns will be given a high level of consideration when applying for future career opportunities with Hyatt Vacation Ownership.

**JOB SUMMARY**  

  

Participants will be expected to learn and preform the job duties of the position(s) within their assigned department. For example, in a Marketing Internship the participant may be expected to learn and master the role of a non\-commissioned marketing associate in addition to opportunities to learn aspects of the commission\-based roles, sales department, and other areas. Interns may also be involved in department projects.


Participants will also learn components of what drives a successful Marketing and Sales operation on site and will have opportunities to contribute to these important matters. Interns will be introduced to and have the opportunity to demonstrate the company’s values and core beliefs.

**JOB REQUIREMENTS**

**Education**

* Candidate should be pursuing a college degree or within one year of their graduation date.
* It is preferred that the candidate is actively pursuing a degree in Hospitality, Marketing, Sales or Business. Candidates who have an undecided major may also be considered.

**Experience**

* Prior Hospitality or Sales experience preferred.
* Past Interns who are interested in completing an additional internship will be considered first. Previous performance rating will be taken into consideration.

**Standards of Dress \& Grooming**

* All interns must maintain a neat, clean and well\-groomed appearance per Hyatt Vacation Ownership Policy Marketing and Sales Standards of Appearance.
* All interns for whom a uniform has been provided must wear the appropriate uniform. Uniforms must be neat and clean at all times. Alterations to uniforms are allowed only if prior approval has been obtained from a supervisor/manager. Missing buttons should be replaced and tears or holes repaired before the uniform is worn.
* Non\-uniformed interns should dress with good business taste and in clothing appropriate to their jobs. Good business taste does not include blue jeans, shorts, spandex pants, tank tops, midriffs, halter tops, or other generally recognized casual sportswear. Dress or skirt length should be no shorter than four inches above the knee. All interns must wear proper undergarments. Corporate office interns must adhere to policy EMP\-20 Corporate Office Business Dress Guidelines.


Hyatt Vacation Ownership is an equal opportunity employer committed to hiring a diverse workforce and sustaining an inclusive culture.

SGI’s Marketing Operations (MO) Team is looking for an intelligent, articulate, dynamic, quality\-minded Marketing Operations Coordinator (MOC) to join our team. With demonstrated experience with commercial and digital printing; the Marketing Operations Coordinator plays an integral business partner to the Marketing Operations Project Managers as the lead on Quality, Functional Projects, and as the Process Owner for audits and inspections.

Process Owner:

Marketing Operations Projects:

o As needed, identify new vendor partners, manage relationship expectations, and understand each supplier’s core competencies

o Bachelor’s degree plus 2 years print\-related experience and/or project management experience


o Demonstrated expertise of printing, finishing processes, and proofing procedures for both Digital and Offset Printing; Packing production experience a plus but not required


o Demonstrated proficiency with MS Office, Adobe Creative Suite, and InDesign a plus

**OTHER REQUIREMENTS**


o Travel within Indianapolis up to 10%; travel outside of Indianapolis as needed

jobs.title: Associate Director, Marketing Analytics
jobs.description:
Description:
**About Hill Holliday:**

**We design growth.** At Hill Holliday, we are obsessed with developing great work that doesn’t just turn heads, it drives growth. To do this, we grow relevance to differentiate and stand out in\-market, grow revenue by always knowing where growth will come from today and tomorrow, and grow relationships so everything works in service to customer lifetime value.

**About Decision Science:**


Marketers are hungry for data—but almost half of marketing leaders don’t use data for decision making because of poor insight quality, speed, or immediate relevance.


Our Decision Science practice was built because of this need, unifying business and marketing analytics, research, and data science capabilities into one team.


The vision of the Decision Science team is to use data and technology to uncover evidence\-based insights that drive better decisions, faster.


As a centralized resource at Hill Holliday, this group brings data to all stages of a marketing process, working seamlessly with strategy, creative, media, and client teams to solve a variety of marketing and marketing\-adjacent problems. Thus, this team is deeply involved in each stage: from assessing the business opportunity, to uncovering consumer insights that fuel our brief, to using the latest technology to inform our angles of attack in media and messaging, to deploying a comprehensive set of analytics solutions to quantify the true ROI of our efforts.

**The Associate Director,Marketing Analytics will be responsible for:**

* Interfacing with mid\-to\-senior clients seamlessly, bringing a strong, demonstrated knowledge of client business. Serves as the primary point of contact representing the data analytics objectives for the client.
* Managing team output and the delivery of on\-time, error\-free work streams above client expectations.
* Being seen as a go\-to representative with strong knowledge of team functions pulling in senior or cross\-capability leadership as opportunities arise.
* Generating appropriate (and measurable) hypotheses. Intellectually curious and challenges the team to push innovation of the data product and resulting implications.
* Strong, demonstrated knowledge of database management, statistical analyses, insight development, and storytelling.
* Introducing new thinking beyond observed insights, bringing innovative, data\-inspired hypotheses and thoughts to the team.
* Developing measurement initiatives across multiple channels from the ground up. Then, execute the data strategy, involving others.
* Has the experience to develop analytic plans for new emerging channels (based on the infrastructure level of data available) and ability to guide a junior team to forecast complex projects.
* Support senior leaders on the evolution of the Decision Science capability, including: evaluating new data partnerships, assessing and executing data transformation roadmaps, and collaborating on staffing and other operational considerations.

**Valued Behaviors:**

* Leadership
	+ Ability to manage multiple, diverse team members and support them in their development of goals. Encourages and facilitates learning and growth of others.
	+ Takes accountability and drives the team to do their best work.
	+ Ability to own a room during a presentation.
	+ Ability to manage up, down and across.
	+ Can lead on\-boarding, training and development for junior team members and other teams.
	+ Can lead meetings with confidence.
* Collaboration
	+ Key driver in ensuring cross department and team collaboration.
	+ Can flex between managing the team, and being a collaborative member of the team.
	+ Strive to positively influence peer group and cross functional team members.
	+ Creates opportunities for junior team members to get involved in projects, events and offerings that will help them stretch and grow.
* Accountability to Results
	+ Understands complete scope and team responsibilities and manages hours and resources to get work done.
	+ Experience developing and communicating ingenious strategies in how the team meets goals and delivers work.
	+ Ensures team members take accountability for on\-time and on budget quality execution.
	+ Ability to provide leadership to the team and is a responsible steward of deliverables.
* Capability
	+ Experience with PowerBI, data collection, querying and preparation with SQL or similar relational programming.
	+ Expert communicator (written and verbal)
	+ Expertise in basic and intermediate statistical methods, e.g., financial ratios, linear regression, correlations, statistical testing.
	+ Acting as leader for junior team members across client teams and leading junior members in visualization as a storytelling technique.
	+ Leading training in technologies, including statistical analysis tools, visualization platforms, media analytics tools, etc. Leading at least 1 training per calendar year on a topic of his/her choice, relevant to our work.
	+ Continuously reading, learning, and proactively thinking about ways to make our work and our team better.

Requirements:
**Desired Experience:**

* 5\-8\+ years of experience in an advertising agency or comparable media and communications focused organization in data analytics function.
* Experience analyzing paid advertising / media campaigns; ideally in cross\-functional organizations.
* Bachelor’s degree in marketing analytics, math, statistics or related field. Advanced degree preferred, but not required.

jobs.title: Sr.Marketing Analytics Manager - Advanced Analytics
jobs.description:
**Who we are**



Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.



Working at Samsara means you'll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that's shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video\-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you'll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.

**About the role:**



Are you a Data Scientist/Data Analyst who thrives on tackling complex problems and using data to drive business impact? Do you enjoy doing detailed analysis to inform marketing strategy?



Samsara is looking for a Senior Marketing Analytics Manager to join our Marketing Analytics and Data Science team. In this role, you'll play a critical part in building our data science roadmap, developing predictive models, and refining AI\-driven scripts to enhance account identification and enrichment. You'll collaborate closely with Marketing, Sales, and Data Engineering teams to unlock insights, automate processes, and scale marketing intelligence through advanced analytics.



We're looking for someone who can balance strategic vision with execution, someone who's comfortable coding, testing, and iterating while also influencing stakeholders and driving measurable impact. Our diverse team is growing, offering opportunities for continuous learning, career progression and the chance to shape the future of marketing data science at a high\-growth company.


**This role is open to candidates residing in the US** **except** **the San Francisco Bay Metro Area, NYC Metro Area, and Washington, D.C. Metro Area.**


#### **In this role, you will:**


* Conduct detailed data analysis to inform marketing strategy informing how we target prospects and optimize our marketing channel mix.
* Design and evaluate marketing experiments to measure incremental impact, validate channel performance, and inform budget allocation decisions.
* Support the development and evolution of our marketing attribution model and other measurement frameworks to better capture the influence of marketing across the customer journey.
* Partner with cross\-functional teams to identify opportunities to leverage AI and advanced analytics to improve marketing insights, automation, and decision\-making.
* Champion, role model, and embed Samsara's cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices


**Minimum requirements for the role:**


* M.S., or Bachelor's in Statistics, Computer Science, Math, Machine Learning, Economics or other related quantitative fields.
* 5\+ years of relevant data science or advanced analytics work experience and 5\+ years of experience building advanced analytical models/analysis to inform strategy.
* Advanced knowledge of marketing measurement (attribution, marketing mix modeling, lift studies) and has direct experience working in marketing and doing detailed analysis supporting marketing strategy.
* Experience conducting and designing large scale experimentation processes from end\-to\-end, executing on incremental studies, and translating results into actionable business decisions.
* Expertise in Tableau and/or similar platforms; expertise in coding languages and tools like Python, R and SQL \- hands on coding experience is needed for this role.
* Interest in applying emerging AI and machine learning techniques to enhance marketing analytics, automation, and decision\-making.
* Strong problem\-solving, stakeholder management, critical thinking, and communication abilities.
* Ability to manage multiple projects at the same time in a fast\-paced business environment
* Strong innovative mindset that is comfortable taking nebulous problems and solving them end to end


**An ideal candidate also has:**


* Experience working with cutting edge LLM tools, web scraping, third\-party data providers, or AI\-driven automation.
* Experience analyzing B2B marketing strategies, channels and lifecycle identifying areas of opportunity and optimization.
* Familiarity with web analytics, tracking platforms, CRM tools and cloud\-based data pipelines.
* Comfort working in an exploratory environment, testing and iterating on new data sources and methodologies.

**Total Rewards**



At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why our rewards are designed to fuel high\-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above\-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance\-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high\-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above\-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.



Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long\-term success: a flexible, employee\-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you're ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.


**Flexible Working**



At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in\-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on\-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual's ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.


**Belonging at Samsara**



At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.


**Accommodations**



Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com or click here if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.


**Our Commitment to Authenticity**



We use Tofu, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. This ensures we are connecting with real people and allows us to prioritize genuine candidates. Please see Samsara's Candidate Privacy Notice for more information.


**Fraudulent Employment Offers**



Samsara is aware of scams involving fake job interviews and offers. Please know we do not charge fees to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in @samsara.com, @us\-greenhouse\-mail.io or @mail3\.guide.co. For more information regarding fraudulent employment offers, please visit our blog post here.

jobs.title: Senior Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.description:
**Senior Marketing Operations Manager**

**Who We Are**

Essity is a global leader in health and hygiene headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, with a North American headquarters located in Philadelphia, PA. We are a multi\-billion\-dollar company with a purpose to break barriers to well\-being for the benefit of consumers, patients, care givers, and customers across the globe. We do this through innovations in our Professional Hygiene, Consumer


Goods, and Health \& Medical business units that provide hygiene and health solutions to over a billion people every day worldwide.  



Working at Essity is more than a career, it is where you will play your part in a better future, to improve well\-being for people and have opportunities to drive positive change for society and the environment . As an employee at Essity, you will belong to a team where you feel valued, are safe, supported to grow and challenged to generate business results in a friendly and open atmosphere.


**About the Role**
------------------

Essity is looking for an experienced Senior Marketing Operations Manager who will be Responsible for excellence around trade shows \& events, collateral management and sample fulfilment as well as b e responsible for end\-to\-end logistics for trade show material, collateral and sample distribution and o wn alignment with local sales function for tradeshows/collateral/sampling and improve sales \& marketing productivity.  



The ideal candidate should/could live in Charlotte, NC.  



We’re looking for people who embody our values, aren’t afraid to challenge, innovate, experiment, and move at a fast pace. We’re always looking for ways to improve our products and ourselves. If this is you, we’d love to talk.


**What You Will Do**
--------------------

* Manage a marketing operations team of 6 to achieve goals and deliverables as outlined in the marketing strategy
* Senior lead and budget owner of the annual national sales meeting
* Manage team and become SME in Asana software to quantify US marketing projects and deliverables
* Manage team and execute excellence processes around trade shows \& events, collateral management and sample fulfilment
* Manage team and excellence processes around education workshops in coordination with brand marketing and sales
* Contribute to local market planning, A\&P investment levels and KPI settings
* Analyze performance and recommendations of trade shows based on ROI
* Create and secure execution of efficient Marketing Operations
* Management of operational budgets within alignment with Brand Management A\&P
* Facilitate close and effective collaboration on Marketing Operations topics between sales teams, CRM/CE teams and local Marketing organization
* Manage and secure personal development of team members

**Who You Are**
---------------

* 5\+ years of event planning, project management, people management
* Bachelors Degree required
* Project Management – Asana , any software
* Strong Collaboration skillset
* Process Driven
* Excellent Communication

**What We Can Offer You**

At Essity, we believe every career is as unique as the individual and empower employees to reach their full potential in a winning culture motivated by a powerful purpose.  



**Compensation and Benefits** **:**

Expected Compensation


Competitive annual salary \+ annual incentive bonus \+ benefits  



Pay offered may vary depending on multiple individualized factor s such as knowledge, skills, and experience.  



Along with competitive pay you will be eligible for the following benefits :


* United Healthcare PPO / EyeMed Vision Insurance / Delta Dental Insurance
* Wellness program provided through Rally
* Healthcare and Dependent Care Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA)
* 401(k) with employer match and annual employer base contribution
* Company paid Basic Life, AD\&D, short\-term and long\-term disability insurance
* PTO offering with Paid Holidays
* Scholarship program for children of Essity employees .
Additional Information


The Company is committed to equal employment opportunity and providing reasonable accommodations to qualified candidates and employees pursuant to applicable law. We value and encourage diversity and solicit applications from all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, gender, sex, age, religion, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, marital status, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, medical condition, military and veteran status, gender identity or expression, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.


If you require reasonable accommodation as part of the application process please contact EssityHRNorthAmerica@essity.com


Together, we are improving lives, every day


Working at Essity is not just a career; it is a chance to directly make the world a healthier, more hygienic and safer place. With impactful innovations coupled with sustainable solutions, we strive to reach more people every year with the necessary and essential solutions for well\-being.


**Application End Date:**
-------------------------

**Job Requisition ID:**
-----------------------

Essity260221
