jobs.title: Manager 2, Software Engineering (MarTech)
jobs.description:
**Overview**
------------


Join our MarTech organization as a Senior Engineering Manager and drive the future of marketing technology. We are looking for a leader to spearhead one of the most influential teams in our ecosystem, responsible for crafting seamless, scalable, and personalized marketing technology solutions. This role is pivotal in shaping our platform innovation strategy, enabling rapid adoption of new offerings, and ensuring flawless integration across MarTech tools that service diverse customer needs. Your impact will directly enable variability in experiences, accelerate time\-to\-market, and create AI\-powered solutions that redefine customer engagement.  



Are you ready to lead the charge in transforming the marketing technology landscape? As the Senior Engineering Manager, you will build a robust Engagement Layer that integrates dynamic campaign orchestration capabilities, externalizes decision\-making logic for smarter personalization, and delivers unparalleled AI\-driven marketing solutions. You’ll streamline 1P/2P/3P integrations, eliminate data silos, and standardize the delivery of real\-time, hyper\-personalized customer experiences. You will empower go\-to\-market agility, redefine customer journeys, and pioneer a future\-ready MarTech ecosystem. If innovation, and creating scalable solutions fuel your passion, this is the career\-defining opportunity you’ve been waiting for! **Responsibilities**

* Develop and refine our marketing technology platform’s core integration patterns.
* Define and evolve reusable and extensible architectures that accelerate adoption across internal tools, third\-party platforms, and partner ecosystems.
* Drive seamless integrations with first\-party, second\-party, and third\-party services.
* Develop modern, intuitive customer experiences that feel native to each platform and effortlessly adapt to changing personas and journey stages.
* Define the engineering roadmap to enable rapid scaling of our marketing technology solutions.
* Ensure innovations are production\-ready and drive measurable business impact.
* Build, mentor, and scale a high\-performing engineering team.
* Foster a culture of technical excellence, collaboration, and ownership.
* Prioritize professional development and empower engineers to excel in a fast\-paced environment.
* Ensure robust operational frameworks to deliver highly available, scalable, and secure marketing technology solutions.
* Collaborate with product management, designers, and marketing leaders to translate ambitious visions into actionable plans.
* Influence cross\-functional partners to align behind technical and strategic goals.

 **Qualifications**

* BS/MS in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* 10\+ years in software engineering, including 3\+ years as a manager leading high\-performing, impactful engineering teams.
* Good understanding of marketing technology platforms, campaign orchestration systems, and integrating tools across diverse feature sets (e.g., CRM, CDP, marketing automation platforms).
* Passionate about AI\-first approaches with demonstrated experience in implementing AI and machine learning solutions that improve decision\-making and precision in marketing tech.
* Strong expertise in designing scalable, extensible platforms and embedding seamless experiences into partner environments like marketing automation tools, ad\-tech networks, or social platforms.
* Strategic mindset combining business acumen with technical innovation, navigating technical complexities to deliver modular, multifaceted solutions.
* Proven ability to foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and inclusivity.
* Track record for mentoring technical talent and scaling engineering organizations.
* Dedicated to building customer\-first solutions through end\-to\-end journey mapping and driving value for end\-users in every engagement.
* Confident communicator skilled in managing up, influencing cross\-functional stakeholders, and serving as the technical face of MarTech innovations internally and externally.

  

Intuit provides a competitive compensation package with a strong pay for performance rewards approach. This position may be eligible for a cash bonus, equity rewards and benefits, in accordance with our applicable plans and programs (see more about our compensation and benefits at Intuit®: Careers \| Benefits). Pay offered is based on factors such as job\-related knowledge, skills, experience, and work location. To drive ongoing fair pay for employees, Intuit conducts regular comparisons across categories of ethnicity and gender. The expected base pay range for this position is:


Bay Area California $ 213,500\- 288,500

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Marketing Operations
jobs.description:
What You'll Do:

Avalara is seeking a Sr. Manager, Marketing Operations to lead the strategy, execution, and optimization of our global email and lifecycle marketing programs. You will ensure scalable processes, high\-performing automation, and data\-driven decision\-making across the marketing funnel.


In this role, you will bring strong expertise in Marketo, nurture program development, segmentation, and marketing operations best practices. You will collaborate closely with Marketing Analytics, Revenue Marketing, RevOps, and Sales to support campaign execution, improve funnel health, and enable teams with reliable data and efficient workflows.


You will report to the Director, Marketing Operations.


What Your Responsibilities Will Be:
**Marketing Automation \& Nurture Strategy**

* Lead the strategy, buildout, and optimization of multichannel nurture programs, including persona\-, product\-, and intent\-based journeys.
* Develop scalable and repeatable Marketo programs, ensuring consistent architecture, QA, and performance.
* Support segmentation and activation strategies using platforms like 6sense and G2, ensuring audiences align with demand goals.

**Systems Operations \& Process Optimization**

* Serve as the primary Marketo owner for the Lifecycle Marketing Operations team, including program governance, integrations, and performance hygiene.
* Collaborate with RevOps and Marketing to help maintain accurate lead routing, scoring, and funnel transitions within Salesforce to ensure email and nurture programs trigger and execute correctly.
* Identify and implement process improvements and automation opportunities to increase marketing efficiency and scale.
* Contribute to evaluation and operationalization of marketing technologies as part of the broader MarTech ecosystem.

**Cross\-Functional Enablement**

* Partner closely with Revenue Marketing, Revenue Operations, Digital, and Sales to support seamless campaign and nurture execution.
* Ensure alignment on scoring, routing, MQL/SQL definitions, and lead management processes.
* Create documentation, training, and best practices to enable teams and increase operational excellence.

**Analytics \& Performance Insights**

* Build KPIs and reporting workflows in partnership with Marketing Analytics to ensure visibility into funnel and campaign performance.
* Analyze performance trends and provide strategic recommendations to improve conversion, engagement, and pipeline contribution.
* Partner with Marketing Analytics to build and optimize a multi\-touch email framework and measurement approach.

**Strategic Leadership**

* Contribute to the marketing operations strategy by supporting data governance, automation standards, and scalable processes.
* Identify opportunities to streamline MarTech workflows, improve data quality, and increase marketing impact across teams.
* Advocate for data\-driven decision\-making and operational excellence across the marketing organization.

**Collaboration \& Communication**

* Communicate system insights, program performance, and operational recommendations to marketing and sales stakeholders.
* Support cross\-functional planning for lifecycle programs, email campaigns, launches, and demand initiatives.


What You'll Need to be Successful:
* 6–8\+ years of experience in B2B marketing operations, preferably in SaaS.
* Hands\-on expertise in Marketo, including program design, nurture architecture, scoring, routing, and integrations.
* Experience with platforms such as 6sense for segmentation, intent data, and audience activation.
* Working knowledge of Salesforce, including campaign management, reporting, and lead flow best practices.
* Strong understanding of lead management, funnel analytics, measurement frameworks, and data governance.
* Demonstrated experience building scalable MarTech\-enabled processes and managing cross\-functional workflows.
* Familiarity with marketing analytics terms, goals, and data collection methods, including how marketing data is captured, tracked, and integrated across systems.
* Strong project management skills and the ability to prioritize effectively across multiple initiatives.


Avalara is an AI\-first Company:

AI is embedded in our workflows, decision\-making, and products. Success here requires embracing AI as an essential capability.* You’ll bring experience using AI and AI\-related technologies, ready to thrive here.
* You’ll apply AI every day to business challenges \- improving efficiency, contributing solutions, and driving results for your team, our company, and our customers.
* You’ll grow with AI by staying curious about new trends and best practices, and by sharing what you learn so others can benefit too.


How We'll Take Care of You:

Total Rewards


In addition to a great compensation package, paid time off, and paid parental leave, many Avalara employees are eligible for bonuses.

  

Health \& Wellness  

Benefits vary by location but generally include private medical, life, and disability insurance.  

Inclusive culture and diversity  

Avalara strongly supports diversity, equity, and inclusion, and is committed to integrating them into our business practices and our organizational culture. We also have a total of 8 employee\-run resource groups, each with senior leadership and exec sponsorship.  


What You Need To Know About Avalara:

We’re defining the relationship between tax and tech.  

We’ve already built an industry\-leading cloud compliance platform, processing over 54 billion customer API calls and over 6\.6 million tax returns a year. Our growth is real \- we're a billion dollar business \- and we’re not slowing down until we’ve achieved our mission \- to be part of every transaction in the world.  

We’re bright, innovative, and disruptive, like the orange we love to wear. It captures our quirky spirit and optimistic mindset. It shows off the culture we’ve designed, that empowers our people to win. We’ve been different from day one. Join us, and your career will be too. **We’re An Equal Opportunity Employer**
Supporting diversity and inclusion is a cornerstone of our company — we don’t want people to fit into our culture, but to enrich it. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, age, gender, national orientation, disability, sexual orientation, US Veteran status, or any other factor protected by law. If you require any reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know.

jobs.title: Communications & Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.description:
**We believe that great healthcare is an essential safeguard of human dignity.**
At Laborie, we know the work we do matters – it’s what fuels our motivation and contributes to our success. If you’re ready to make a positive impact in the lives of patients across the globe, we’d like to meet you.

We support and empower our employees to grow their careers in an environment that encourages a sense of belonging and a connection to doing good. We’re not afraid to roll up our sleeves to make our goals a reality and work together to solve for our customers. We reward and recognize our employees based on our values of **Aspire to Greatness, Respect All, Own It, Working Together, Persist with Passion.****About the Role:**
We’re looking for a Communications \& Marketing Operations Manager who can bring structure, clarity, and operational excellence to the Communications and Digital Marketing team. You’ll be the central connector who ensures projects flow smoothly, messaging remains consistent, and our systems and processes scale as the business grows.

This role blends strategic partnership, operational leadership, and hands‑on execution. You’ll collaborate closely with cross‑functional partners, support high‑visibility communications, and build the workflows that enable the team to perform at its best.
**Lead Cross****‑****Functional Alignment \& Strategic Coordination*** Translate stakeholder needs into clear, actionable plans with timelines
* Ensure alignment and smooth handoffs across teams and workstreams
* Represent Communications \& Digital Marketing in planning discussions
* Build documentation, SOPs, and playbooks to create consistency across the team

**Strengthen Communications and Content Development*** Support and shape content including internal communications, digital channels, video, and stakeholder updates
* Provide editorial oversight and strategic messaging support
* Draft sensitive or high‑visibility communications as needed

**Drive Operational Excellence \& Process Improvement*** Design and implement scalable workflows, templates, and processes
* Identify inefficiencies and develop repeatable solutions
* Manage and optimize the marketing technology stack and project management systems

**Support Digital Execution and Compliance \& Quality Best Practices*** Jump in on website, email, social, or other channels during peak periods
* Manage selected digital marketing projects end‑to‑end
* Maintain processes that support GDPR, regulatory, clinical, and legal compliance
* Bring forward new digital trends, tools, and best practices.

**Minimum Qualifications:*** 7–10 years of experience in communications and/or marketing, or a related field
* Exceptional writing and editorial skills, experience supporting senior leaders
* Demonstrated strength in building processes and improving workflows.
* Hands‑on experience with digital channels (web, email, social).
* Proficiency with marketing technology and project management tools.
* Proven ability to manage cross‑functional projects.
* Flexible, generalist mindset with a willingness to jump in where needed.

**Preferred Qualifications:*** Background in life sciences, medtech, or regulated environments.
* Experience in a matrixed, multinational company.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Suite, Canva, Asana, CMS or email platforms.
* Strong organizational and visual communication skills.
* Passion for continuous improvement and operational excellence.

**Why Laborie:**
Our Mission every day is to operate as a world\-class specialist medical company making and advancing technologies that preserve and restore human dignity. We do that today by helping people with pelvic and gastrointestinal conditions live normal lives, and by helping mothers and babies have safe deliveries.* Paid time off and paid volunteer time
* Medical, Dental, Vision and Flexible Spending Account
* Health Savings Account with Company Funded Contributions
* 401k Retirement Plan with Company Match
* Parental Leave and Adoption Services
* Health and Wellness Programs and Events



We are interested in a qualified candidate who is eligible to work in the United States. However, we will not be sponsoring work visas for this position, at this time.
*Laborie* *provides equal employment opportunities and non\-discrimination for all employees and qualified applicants without regard to a person’s race, color, gender, age, religion, national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, or any characteristic protected under applicable law. Laborie is committed to providing access and reasonable accommodation in our services, activities, education, and employment for individuals with disabilities.*

jobs.title: Enterprise Architect (Ecommerce, Data, MarTech, Personalization, AI/ML)
jobs.description:
**Enterprise Architect (****Ecommerce,** **Data, MarTech,** **Personalization,** **AI/ML)**  

**Location: SFO, CA ( 2 Days Onsite / Hybrid)**

**Duration: Long term contract**  

  

  

**Description:**  

As an Enterprise Architect, you will be responsible for managing Enterprise\-wide solutions to include specific expertise in Digital, E\-Commerce, Data, MarTech, AI/ML and Cloud solutions.


**Reporting to the Director, Architecture you will:**  

Lead the Architecture and design of business and tech initiatives related to personalization across different systems and applications including Ecommerce, Web/Mobile, Digital Marketing, Data and AI/ML.  

Lead vendor selection for the new technologies, tools and capabilities. Define selection criteria, RFI, RFP, RFQ and make relevant vendor and product choices

jobs.title: CRM Marketing & Automation Specialist
jobs.description:
**WHO WE ARE**

EJT Education Group provides Black educators with the coaching, content, curriculum, and community necessary to grow six and seven figure education consulting businesses.

**WHY WE DO WHAT WE DO**

We do this work because we are passionate about school leadership, equity, and supporting Black educators to build their wealth.

**POSITION OVERVIEW**

EJT Education Group is hiring a **CRM Marketing \& Automation Specialist.** The CRM Marketing \& Automation Specialist is responsible for the hands\-on execution of marketing campaigns and lead management workflows inside the company’s CRM platform (GoHighLevel). This role ensures that marketing strategy is translated into high\-performing technical builds that support top\-of\-funnel lead generation, nurture sequences, and the sales pipeline.

This is a primarily tactical role with a strong focus on marketing automation, campaign deployment, CRM pipeline management, and performance tracking. The ideal candidate is both detail\-oriented and systems\-minded, with the ability to recommend the most effective technical approach to bring marketing funnels to life.

**Key Responsibilities**

**CRM \& Marketing Automation Execution**

* Build, launch, and maintain funnels, workflows, and automation inside GoHighLevel
* Configure forms, landing pages, triggers, campaigns, and pipeline stages
* Implement email and SMS campaigns using provided strategy, messaging, and assets
* Set up lead routing, tagging, segmentation, and scoring to support marketing and sales efforts
* Ensure all automations are tested, QA’d, and deployed accurately

**Campaign \& Lead Management**

* Manage the CRM components of top\-of\-funnel marketing campaigns
* Connect lead sources (ads, landing pages, website, and integrations) into the CRM
* Monitor and optimize lead flow from capture through handoff to sales
* Maintain and improve nurture sequences to increase conversion rates
* Support the execution of product launches and promotional campaigns

**Sales Pipeline \& Process Support**

* Build and maintain pipelines that reflect the company’s sales process
* Automate task assignments, follow\-ups, and internal notifications
* Ensure accurate tracking of opportunities, customer journeys, and conversion points

**Data, Reporting \& Optimization**

* Track and report on campaign performance (opens, clicks, conversions, lead movement)
* Maintain CRM data hygiene and list health
* Identify workflow issues and performance gaps and recommend improvements
* Create and maintain simple dashboards and reporting views

**Technical Strategy (Light – 10–15%)**

* Recommend the most effective and scalable way to build funnels and automations
* Identify opportunities to improve efficiency through better system configuration
* Research and test new automation features and integrations

**Job Qualifications**

* Minimum of 2 years of hands\-on experience building and managing CRM or marketing automation systems
* Demonstrated experience with GoHighLevel (required)
* Experience executing email and/or SMS marketing campaigns within a CRM
* Strong understanding of:
* Automation workflows and triggers
* Pipeline management
* Lead lifecycle and segmentation
* Ability to translate marketing plans into technical builds
* Strong QA and troubleshooting skills
* Excellent organizational and project management ability
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced, collaborative remote environment
* Experience supporting lead generation and product launch campaigns
* Familiarity with marketing analytics and conversion tracking
* Experience integrating third\-party tools via native integrations, Zapier, or webhooks

**Key Deliverable Outcomes (First 6–12 Months)**

* Our marketing campaigns are deployed accurately and on schedule.
* Our lead flow through the CRM is seamless and measurable.
* Our sales pipeline automation reduces manual work and increases follow\-up consistency.
* Our nurture sequences are functioning and improving conversion rates.
* Our CRM data is clean, organized, and actionable.

**Our Ideal Candidate Has These Attributes:**

* Systems thinker and problem solver
* Detail\-oriented and execution\-focused
* Highly organized and deadline\-driven
* Data\-aware and results\-oriented
* Collaborative and proactive communicator

**COMPENSATION \& DETAILS**

This position is a **Full time, W\-2 employee**. The salary range for the position is $65\-80K depending on experience.

● You’ll work remote primarily and have complete location independence within the United States; prefer those in CST or EST time zones

● Must be willing and able to attend 2\-3 in person meetings annually

● You will need to be available during Monday\-Friday 9\-5 pm EST

● Must have own computer and reliable access to Wi\-Fi, internet, headset, and phone.

**You would receive the following benefits:**

● Paid Time Off

● Sick Time

● Paid Federal Holidays

● 3 weeks of paid Spring/Winter breaks (5 days in April, 2 weeks in December)

● Health insurance reimbursement (up to $350/month individual, $450/month family)

● 401(k) with up to 3% employer match after 1 year

Pay: $65,000\.00 \- $80,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* 401(k)
* 401(k) matching
* Paid time off

Work Location: Remote

jobs.title: Product Owner – Marketing Technology (GenStudio Highly Preferred)
jobs.description:
**About the Role**
------------------


Blue Acorn iCi is seeking a **Product Owner – Marketing Technology** to lead the development and governance of reusable marketing templates within **Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing**.


In this role, you will serve as the bridge between marketing stakeholders, design teams, and engineering, ensuring that campaign assets and email templates are translated into scalable, modular templates that enable marketers to generate high\-performing content quickly and consistently.


You will own the product vision, requirements, and backlog for marketing template frameworks, ensuring alignment with brand standards, marketing goals, and platform capabilities across the **Adobe Experience Cloud ecosystem**.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

### **Product Ownership \& Strategy**

* Own the product roadmap and backlog for marketing templates and campaign enablement within **GenStudio for Performance Marketing**.
* Translate business and marketing needs into clear product requirements and user stories for engineering teams.
* Define standards for scalable, modular templates that support multi\-channel activation and content variation.

### **Template Framework \& Campaign Enablement**

* Define requirements for converting existing campaign assets (HTML emails, design files, UX specifications) into **GenStudio\-compatible templates**.
* Ensure templates support dynamic content, personalization, and campaign variants required for performance marketing.
* Establish guidelines for modular layouts and editable content regions such as headlines, images, CTAs, and legal copy.

### **Platform Governance \& Quality**

* Ensure all templates meet email client constraints and platform requirements for **GenStudio**.
* Define validation and QA processes using tools like **Litmus** and **Email on Acid**.
* Maintain standards for cross\-client email rendering and accessibility compliance.

### **Cross\-Functional Collaboration**

* Partner with marketing managers, designers, and developers to ensure templates align with campaign objectives and brand guidelines.
* Work with engineering teams to refine technical requirements and ensure templates integrate with existing marketing platforms.
* Facilitate agile ceremonies and prioritize work across stakeholders.

### **Documentation \& Enablement**

* Create and maintain template documentation and usage guidelines for marketing teams.
* Define editable vs. locked components within templates to ensure brand consistency.
* Support adoption by enabling marketers to self\-serve campaign variants within **GenStudio**.

**Required Skills \& Experience**
---------------------------------

### **Product Ownership / Agile**

* Experience working as a **Product Owner or Product Manager** within marketing technology or digital platforms.
* Strong experience writing user stories, acceptance criteria, and product requirements.
* Experience working within **Agile or Scrum environments**.

### **Marketing Technology Platforms**


Experience working with one or more platforms such as:

* Adobe Journey Optimizer
* Adobe Campaign
* Salesforce Marketing Cloud
* Marketo
* Braze

### **Email \& Template Ecosystem Knowledge**

* Understanding of **HTML email structure** and cross\-client rendering constraints.
* Familiarity with template\-driven marketing systems, tokens, and dynamic content frameworks.
* Knowledge of personalization and campaign testing workflows.

**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------

* Experience with **Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing**
* Familiarity with the **Adobe Experience Cloud ecosystem**
* Understanding of accessibility standards (**WCAG**) in digital marketing
* Exposure to performance marketing metrics such as **CTR, conversions, and experimentation frameworks**
* Experience managing **template libraries or content frameworks**

**What Success Looks Like**
---------------------------

* Marketing teams can quickly create on\-brand campaign variants using **GenStudio templates**.
* Template frameworks enable scalable content generation across channels.
* Campaign launch timelines improve due to clear requirements, reusable templates, and strong governance.
* Cross\-functional teams have clear documentation and structured workflows for marketing template creation.

**About Blue Acorn iCi**

Blue Acorn iCi, a business unit of Infosys Nova Holdings, LLC, is a digital experience partner helping global brands design, build, and optimize the future of customer engagement. We blend data, design, and technology to deliver connected commerce and content solutions that drive measurable results.


Specializing in the Adobe Experience Cloud, we provide end\-to\-end services across commerce, content, analytics, and customer insights. Backed by Infosys, we’re growing fast—and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.


Our teams work at the intersection of strategy and execution—solving complex challenges for industry leaders in healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and beyond. From large\-scale digital transformation programs to platform implementations and ongoing optimization, we bring deep expertise and a collaborative mindset to every engagement.


**Why Join Us?**

Blue Acorn iCi is a place for curious thinkers, smart builders, and digital pioneers. We’re more than a consultancy—we’re a team of innovators helping the world’s top brands shape the future of digital.


Here, you won’t just contribute to a project—you’ll drive meaningful outcomes, collaborate with cross\-disciplinary teams, and grow your skills in a high\-impact, high\-growth environment. We believe great work starts with great people, and we’re committed to creating a culture where talent thrives, ideas spark change, and results speak for themselves.


If you’re ready to push boundaries, deliver real value, and help shape the next generation of digital experiences—this is your place.


***\*\*\*Candidates must have unrestricted authorization to work in the United States without the need for employer sponsorship now or in the future. Infosys Nova Holdings, LLC does not provide immigration or visa sponsorship for this position (including H4 EAD, H‑1B, OPT, CPT, TN, O‑1, E‑3, or J‑1 visas).\*\*\****


*Full Time, Non\-Temporary Employees enjoy a competitive benefits package that includes medical, dental and vision insurance, life insurance, disability, paid time off, 401(k), and more!*

*Blue Acorn iCi is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, spouse of protected veteran, or disability.*

*Please click to read* *EEO Law* *and* *Pay Transparency Act* *and* *IER Right to Work Document* *and* *Privacy Notice**.*

*Blue Acorn iCi will endeavor to make a reasonable accommodation to the known physical or mental limitations of a qualified applicant with a disability unless the accommodation would impose an undue hardship on the operation of our business. If you believe you require such assistance to complete this form or to participate in an interview, please contact us at: careers@blueacornici.com.*


*California applicants: Please click* *here* *for CCPA disclosures.*

jobs.title: Marketing Data Analyst
jobs.description:
**WHO WE ARE**


LoadUp is a modern junk removal and home services company leveraging proprietary technology to connect consumers with a nationwide network of independently contracted service providers. We pride ourselves on being a customer\-centric organization, revolutionizing the way home services are delivered.


LoadUp is a certified **Great Place to Work** and has been featured on **Inc.’s list of the 5000 Fastest\-Growing companies** for six consecutive years (2019 \- 2025\).

**OUR CORE BELIEFS**


At LoadUp, we exist to glorify God by pursuing excellence in all we do. We aren't looking for perfection; we are looking for a commitment to continual improvement and high integrity.

* **Live in Truth** – You call the data like it is. No "vanity metrics" here—just the honest numbers that help us win.
* **Action Over Words** – You don’t just build a dashboard; you provide the actionable insight that tells us exactly what to do next.
* **Right Shell** – You help us right\-size our marketing spend by identifying exactly where our acquisition engine is most efficient.
* **Own It** – You take full responsibility for data accuracy, ensuring leadership can make high\-stakes decisions with total confidence.

**ABOUT THE ROLE** The Marketing Data Analyst is the architect of our growth insights. You will build and maintain the reporting infrastructure that evaluates our funnel performance and marketing spend across all channels. Partnering closely with RevOps and Marketing leadership, you’ll uncover trends, evaluate attribution, and build the forecasting models that allow us to scale with precision.

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**

* **Build the Foundation:** Design and maintain reporting infrastructure and automated dashboards that provide real\-time visibility into key growth metrics.
* **Funnel Optimization:** Analyze the full customer journey to identify drop\-offs and conversion opportunities, improving overall acquisition efficiency.
* **Strategic Partnership:** Work with RevOps to solve the "attribution puzzle" and provide clear insights into channel and regional performance.
* **Forecasting \& Planning:** Develop models to support growth planning and guide our future marketing investment decisions.
* **Experimentation Support:** Measure the impact of marketing tests and translate complex datasets into clear, boardroom\-ready recommendations.
* **Data Integrity:** Ensure total accuracy and consistency across all reporting systems—being the "Single Source of Truth" for the team.

**WHAT YOU BRING**

* **Experience:** 4\+ years in marketing, growth, or business analytics. You’ve been in the trenches of high\-growth performance reporting.
* **Analytical Power:** A Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field (Analytics, Data Science, Econ, etc.) and a deep understanding of funnel analysis and attribution modeling.
* **Technical Stack:** Proficiency with data visualization tools like **Looker, Tableau, or Power BI**. Experience with **SQL** and data warehouses is a major plus.
* **Communication:** The rare ability to take complex math and turn it into a clear, persuasive story for non\-technical stakeholders.
* **Detail\-Oriented:** A "measure twice, cut once" mentality when it comes to data accuracy and problem\-solving.

**WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT**

* **Competitive Compensation** – A salary that rewards your ability to drive smarter growth.
* **401(k) with 5% Company Match** – We’re invested in your long\-term success.
* **Comprehensive Benefits** – Medical, Dental, Vision, Life, FSA, and HSA options.
* **Monthly Lifestyle Stipends** – Support for the things that make your daily life easier.
* **High\-Speed Growth** – The chance to see your insights turn into real\-world scaling in real\-time.

**LoadUp is an equal\-opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We encourage all qualified individuals to apply.**

jobs.description:
**Marketing Analytics \& Revenue Intelligence Manager**

**HVAC • Plumbing • Oil Delivery**

**Location:** Massapequa, NY **Reports to:** Director of Marketing

**About the Role**

Tragar is seeking a **Marketing Analytics \& Revenue Intelligence Manager** to help drive the next phase of growth for our HVAC, plumbing, and oil delivery business.

This role owns marketing performance, customer journey insights, and CRM\-based reporting — ensuring that marketing efforts translate into real customers, repeat business, and long\-term value.Rev

You’ll work closely with leadership to understand what’s working, what’s not, and where to invest next — using data, dashboards, and AI\-driven insights to guide decisions.

**What You’ll Do**

* Analyze marketing performance across paid media, organic search, website traffic, and CRM data
* Own customer journey measurement and lead nurturing performance
* Build and maintain CRM dashboards as the source of truth
* Identify trends, opportunities, and inefficiencies across service lines and geographies
* Use AI\-enabled tools to model ROI and forecast outcomes
* Present clear, actionable recommendations to leadership

**What Success Looks Like**

* Lower cost per lead and cost per customer
* Improved lead\-to\-customer conversion
* Stronger retention and repeat service
* Clear visibility into which channels and journeys drive revenue

**What We’re Looking For**

* 4\+ years of experience in marketing analytics, growth, or performance roles
* Experience working with CRM platforms and performance data
* Strong analytical thinking with business judgment
* Clear communicator who turns data into decisions
* Experience in services or local marketing is a plus, but not required

**Why Join Tragar**

For 70 years, Tragar has been Long Island’s Family of Comfort, providing expert heating, cooling, plumbing, and reliable fuel delivery throughout Nassau and Suffolk counties. Built on three generations of family leadership, Tragar delivers genuine care while keeping homes comfortable year round.

Recognized as a Best Workplace on Long Island (2025\) and a Best of Long Island winner for Best Oil Company and COD Services (2026\), Tragar has built a reputation for professionalism, expertise, and exceptional customer care.

Joining Tragar means building a career with one of Long Island’s most respected home service companies. Our team values professionalism, collaboration, and pride in great work. Employees benefit from ongoing training, mentorship, and professional development, with opportunities to grow alongside a company that continues to expand. If you take initiative and want to be part of a trusted organization that sets the standard for service and teamwork, Tragar offers the opportunity to grow and succeed.

**Compensation**

* **$95,000 – $125,000 base salary**, depending on experience
* Performance\-based incentives and growth opportunities
* Benefits, training, and long\-term career development

Pay: $95,000\.00 \- $125,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* 401(k) 2% match
* Dental insurance
* Health insurance
* Vision insurance

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Massapequa, NY 11758

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Engineer
jobs.description:
**Redefine the future of customer experiences. One conversation at a time.**

  


At Nextiva, we're reimagining how businesses connect, bringing together customer experience and team collaboration on a single, conversation centric platform. Powered by AI, driven by human innovation.



Our culture is forward thinking, customer obsessed and built on the belief that meaningful connections drive better business outcomes. Whether it's through our signature Amazing Service®, the technology we create, or the experiences we cultivate, connection is at the core of who we are.



If you're ready to collaborate with incredible people, make an impact, and help businesses everywhere deliver truly amazing experiences, this is where you belong.


**Build Amazing. Deliver Amazing. Live Amazing. Be Amazing.**

  

We're looking for a Marketing Operations Engineer to help us build smarter, faster, and more scalable ways of working across marketing.



This role sits within Marketing Operations and reports into our Senior Manager of Marketing Operations, who owns strategy, planning, and prioritization. Your job is to execute, automate, and innovate—turning ideas into systems, workflows, and solutions that actually ship.



You'll work closely with the marketing campaigns team and business development team to operationalize campaigns, maintain marketing systems, and continuously improve how work gets done across the organization.



If you love solving messy problems, experimenting with tools, and figuring out how AI and automation can eliminate manual work, this role is for you.



You don't need to be a software engineer—but you do need to enjoy building systems and improving processes.


**Responsibilities:**
---------------------


* Design, build, and maintain marketing automation workflows, particularly within HubSpot
* Support execution of marketing campaigns and operational processes including email builds, list creation, workflow setup, attribution tagging, and QA
* Identify manual or repetitive processes and automate them using AI, integrations, and workflow tools
* Partner with the Senior Manager of Marketing Ops to translate marketing strategy into scalable systems and operational processes
* Own day\-to\-day execution in marketing ops tools (CRM, marketing automation platforms, enrichment tools, reporting tools, orchestration tools)
* Experiment with AI tools and automation workflows to improve speed, quality, and operational efficiency
* Troubleshoot issues across marketing systems, data flows, and workflows—and resolve them
* Help connect systems using integrations, APIs, or webhooks when needed
* Create lightweight documentation so workflows and systems can scale beyond you
* Continuously look for opportunities to make marketing operations more reliable, scalable, and efficient

**What Success Looks Like:**


* Manual processes are replaced with automated workflows
* Marketing campaigns launch smoothly with reliable systems and processes
* Teams spend less time doing operational busywork
* Marketing systems are stable, well\-structured, and easy for teams to use
* AI and automation are embedded into daily workflows—not just discussed

**Required Qualifications:**
----------------------------


* 0–3 years of experience in marketing operations, revenue operations, marketing technology, analytics, or a related role
* Hands\-on experience working with marketing or CRM systems
* A strong builder mindset and natural curiosity for how systems work
* Comfort experimenting with new tools—even if you're figuring them out as you go
* Interest in AI\-powered workflows and automation
* Ability to take direction and independently execute operational work
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot system issues
* Clear communicator who can explain what they built and why
* Ability to discern tactics from strategy and guide peers toward effective operational solutions

**Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have):**
--------------------------------------------


* Experience with tools like HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, Workato, Segment, LeanData, ZoomInfo, or similar
* Experience building or experimenting with AI\-powered workflows
* Familiarity with APIs, webhooks, or system integrations
* Experience supporting demand generation, lifecycle marketing, or growth teams
* Experience working in agency environments where multiple systems and processes are managed

**Why This Role Is Different:**
-------------------------------


* You won't be asked to "own the strategy" before you're ready—that's covered
* You will be trusted to experiment, build, and ship
* You'll have air cover from a senior leader who understands marketing operations deeply
* You'll help define what modern marketing operations looks like, not just maintain it
* You'll have room to experiment with AI and automation to eliminate manual work

**Nextiva DNA** (Core Competencies)



Nextiva's most successful team members share common traits and behaviors:


* **Drives Results**: Action\-oriented problem solvers who quickly bring clarity and **simplicity** to ambiguity, challenge the status quo, and lead meaningful change; celebrating wins to fuel momentum. They act swiftly and pragmatically, learning and improving as they go.
* **Critical Thinker:** Data\-driven, **forward\-thinking** individuals who identify key drivers, anticipate risks, and deliver clear recommendations. They confidently leverage AI and automation to reduce friction, improve decision\-making, and focus on higher\-value work.
* **Right Attitude:** Collaborative, competitive, and resilient team players who jump in to solve tough problems, learn from setbacks, and foster a culture of service, respect, and **care** for customers and teammates.


**Total Rewards**



Our Total Rewards offerings are designed to allow Nexties to take care of themselves and their families so they can be their best, in and out of the office.



Our compensation packages are tailored to each role and candidate's qualifications. We consider a wide range of factors, including skills, experience, training, and certifications, when determining compensation. We aim to offer competitive salaries or wages that reflect the value you bring to our team. Depending on the position, compensation may include base salary and/or hourly wages, incentives, or bonuses.


* **Health \-** Multiple health plan options to suit your needs, including medical, dental, vision, and telemedicine coverage
* **Insurance \-** Life, disability, and supplemental indemnity plans
* **Work\-Life Balance** **️** **\-** Flexible Time Off (FTO) for salaried employees, PTO for hourly employees, Paid Sick Time (PST), paid parental bonding leave, and paid holidays
* **Financial Security** **\-** 401(k) with company match, Health Savings Accounts with company contributions, Dependent Care FSA
* **Wellness ‍ \-** Employee Assistance Program and comprehensive wellness initiatives
* **Growth \-** Access to ongoing learning and development opportunities and career advancement


At Nextiva, we're committed to supporting our employees' health, well\-being, and professional growth. Join us and build a rewarding career!


*Nextiva is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.* *Nextiva participates in the E\-Verify Program where and as required by law. For additional information about E\-Verify visit* *USCIS*.



\#LI\-MS1 \#LI\-Onsite



Founded in 2008, Nextiva has grown into a global leader trusted by over 100,000 businesses and 1M\+ users worldwide. Headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, and with teams across the globe, we're the future of customer experience and team collaboration through our AI\-powered, conversation\-centric platform.



Want to see what life at Nextiva is all about? Connect with us on Instagram, Instagram MX, YouTube, LinkedIn, and the Nextiva Blog.

jobs.title: Marketing Technology Operations Manager
jobs.description:
Our Deloitte Customer team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, Generative AI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We can enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital products and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects. Our team balances business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to solve the biggest problems that affect customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce.  

  

**Work You'll Do**  

  

As a Project Delivery Specialist on the project, you will:  

* Lead end\-to\-end SFMC workstream delivery as the primary SFMC functional lead in an Agile, multi\-sponsor environment.
* Translate sponsor/State business objectives into clear functional requirements, prioritized backlogs, and delivery\-ready intake.
* Direct campaign strategy and execution design (segmentation, targeting, personalization, journeys).
* Proactively assess and surface privacy/compliance/governance risks and implications before build begins.
* Provide technical oversight with architects/developers to validate solution design, data usage, integrations, and journey logic.
* Advise the Product Owner and stakeholders with impact/tradeoff assessments and release readiness guidance.
* Evaluate platform capabilities and tradeoffs across SFMC Engagement, Marketing Cloud Next, and Data Cloud.
* Partner with architecture and data teams to assess integration patterns (API, data ingestion, identity resolution) and governance tier implications.
* Drive intake\-to\-decision packaging for new use cases, including data boundary assessment and regulatory considerations.

  

The Team  

  

Deloitte's Government \& Public Services (GPS) practice \- our people, ideas, technology and outcomes \- is designed for impact. Serving federal, state, \& local government clients as well as public higher education institutions, our team of professionals brings fresh perspective to help clients anticipate disruption, reimagine the possible, and fulfill their mission promise.  

  

Our Advertising, Marketing, \& Commerce offering designs and implements solutions that engage and activate customers through the customer journey.  

  

The Project Delivery Talent Model is designed for professionals with specialized skills that align to a current client need. Team members focus on delivering services to clients, without additional expectations related to business development or promotion. Their employment is tied to their role on a project, and they are eligible for a benefits package that is competitive for project delivery\-focused professionals.  

  

**Qualifications**  

  

Required**:**  

* Demonstrated experience leading marketing technology delivery across business and technical stakeholders in complex environments.
* Proven ability to engage senior/executive stakeholders with strong presence, judgment, and influence.
* Hands\-on functional expertise in Salesforce Marketing Cloud, including campaign validation and journey design considerations.

jobs.title: Marketing Technology Operations Manager
jobs.description:
Our Deloitte Customer team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, Generative AI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We can enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital products and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects. Our team balances business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to solve the biggest problems that affect customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce.  

  

**Work You'll Do**  

  

As a Project Delivery Specialist on the project, you will:  

* Lead end\-to\-end SFMC workstream delivery as the primary SFMC functional lead in an Agile, multi\-sponsor environment.
* Translate sponsor/State business objectives into clear functional requirements, prioritized backlogs, and delivery\-ready intake.
* Direct campaign strategy and execution design (segmentation, targeting, personalization, journeys).
* Proactively assess and surface privacy/compliance/governance risks and implications before build begins.
* Provide technical oversight with architects/developers to validate solution design, data usage, integrations, and journey logic.
* Advise the Product Owner and stakeholders with impact/tradeoff assessments and release readiness guidance.
* Evaluate platform capabilities and tradeoffs across SFMC Engagement, Marketing Cloud Next, and Data Cloud.
* Partner with architecture and data teams to assess integration patterns (API, data ingestion, identity resolution) and governance tier implications.
* Drive intake\-to\-decision packaging for new use cases, including data boundary assessment and regulatory considerations.

  

The Team  

  

Deloitte's Government \& Public Services (GPS) practice \- our people, ideas, technology and outcomes \- is designed for impact. Serving federal, state, \& local government clients as well as public higher education institutions, our team of professionals brings fresh perspective to help clients anticipate disruption, reimagine the possible, and fulfill their mission promise.  

  

Our Advertising, Marketing, \& Commerce offering designs and implements solutions that engage and activate customers through the customer journey.  

  

The Project Delivery Talent Model is designed for professionals with specialized skills that align to a current client need. Team members focus on delivering services to clients, without additional expectations related to business development or promotion. Their employment is tied to their role on a project, and they are eligible for a benefits package that is competitive for project delivery\-focused professionals.  

  

**Qualifications**  

  

Required**:**  

* Demonstrated experience leading marketing technology delivery across business and technical stakeholders in complex environments.
* Proven ability to engage senior/executive stakeholders with strong presence, judgment, and influence.
* Hands\-on functional expertise in Salesforce Marketing Cloud, including campaign validation and journey design considerations.
* Experience operating effectively in regulated environments with strong sensitivity to governance, privacy, and compliance constraints.
* Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud (Customer Data Platform capabilities) and/or Marketing Cloud Next.
* Demonstrated understanding of identity resolution, consent models, segmentation architecture, and cross\-system data movement in marketing ecosystems.
* Bachelor's Degree
* Must be legally authorized to work in the United States without the need for employer sponsorship, now or at any time in the future

  

**Preferred:**  

* Functional Requirements Development \- Proven ability to translate complex objectives into clear, testable requirements and acceptance criteria.
* Stakeholder Management \- Experience influencing and aligning senior stakeholders, especially in multi\-sponsor or highly regulated public\-sector environments.
* Experience evaluating replatforming efforts (e.g., Commercial Cloud to Gov Cloud) and associated data governance implications.
* Experience working in Agile environments where intake, refinement discipline, and Definition of Ready/Done are tightly managed.

  

The wage range for this role takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training; licensure and certifications; and other business and organizational needs. The disclosed range estimate has not been adjusted for the applicable geographic differential associated with the location at which the position may be filled. At Deloitte, it is not typical for an individual to be hired at or near the top of the range for their role and compensation decisions are dependent on the facts and circumstances of each case. A reasonable estimate of the current range is $100000 to $180000\.  

  

You may also be eligible to participate in a discretionary annual incentive program, subject to the rules governing the program, whereby an award, if any, depends on various factors, including, without limitation, individual and organizational performance.

* Translate sponsor/State business objectives into clear functional requirements, prioritized backlogs, and delivery\-ready intake.
* Direct campaign strategy and execution design (segmentation, targeting, personalization, journeys).
* Proactively assess and surface privacy/compliance/governance risks and implications before build begins.
* Provide technical oversight with architects/developers to validate solution design, data usage, integrations, and journey logic.
* Advise the Product Owner and stakeholders with impact/tradeoff assessments and release readiness guidance.
* Evaluate platform capabilities and tradeoffs across SFMC Engagement, Marketing Cloud Next, and Data Cloud.
* Partner with architecture and data teams to assess integration patterns (API, data ingestion, identity resolution) and governance tier implications.
* Drive intake\-to\-decision packaging for new use cases, including data boundary assessment and regulatory considerations.

  

The Team  

  

Deloitte's Government \& Public Services (GPS) practice \- our people, ideas, technology and outcomes \- is designed for impact. Serving federal, state, \& local government clients as well as public higher education institutions, our team of professionals brings fresh perspective to help clients anticipate disruption, reimagine the possible, and fulfill their mission promise.  

  

Our Advertising, Marketing, \& Commerce offering designs and implements solutions that engage and activate customers through the customer journey.  

  

The Project Delivery Talent Model is designed for professionals with specialized skills that align to a current client need. Team members focus on delivering services to clients, without additional expectations related to business development or promotion. Their employment is tied to their role on a project, and they are eligible for a benefits package that is competitive for project delivery\-focused professionals.  

  

**Qualifications**  

  

Required**:**  

* Demonstrated experience leading marketing technology delivery across business and technical stakeholders in complex environments.
* Proven ability to engage senior/executive stakeholders with strong presence, judgment, and influence.
* Hands\-on functional expertise in Salesforce Marketing Cloud, including campaign validation and journey design considerations.
* Experience operating effectively in regulated environments with strong sensitivity to governance, privacy, and compliance constraints.
* Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud (Customer Data Platform capabilities) and/or Marketing Cloud Next.
* Demonstrated understanding of identity resolution, consent models, segmentation architecture, and cross\-system data movement in marketing ecosystems.
* Bachelor's Degree
* Must be legally authorized to work in the United States without the need for employer sponsorship, now or at any time in the future

  

**Preferred:**  

* Functional Requirements Development \- Proven ability to translate complex objectives into clear, testable requirements and acceptance criteria.
* Stakeholder Management \- Experience influencing and aligning senior stakeholders, especially in multi\-sponsor or highly regulated public\-sector environments.
* Experience evaluating replatforming efforts (e.g., Commercial Cloud to Gov Cloud) and associated data governance implications.
* Experience working in Agile environments where intake, refinement discipline, and Definition of Ready/Done are tightly managed.

  

The wage range for this role takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training; licensure and certifications; and other business and organizational needs. The disclosed range estimate has not been adjusted for the applicable geographic differential associated with the location at which the position may be filled. At Deloitte, it is not typical for an individual to be hired at or near the top of the range for their role and compensation decisions are dependent on the facts and circumstances of each case. A reasonable estimate of the current range is $100000 to $180000\.  

  

You may also be eligible to participate in a discretionary annual incentive program, subject to the rules governing the program, whereby an award, if any, depends on various factors, including, without limitation, individual and organizational performance.  

  

Information for applicants with a need for accommodation: https://www2\.deloitte.com/us/en/pages/careers/articles/join\-deloitte\-assistance\-for\-disabled\-applicants.html

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Analyst
jobs.description:
**About the role:**


As a Marketing Operations Analyst, you’ll help build, optimize, and scale the systems, data, and processes that power TQL’s Marketing organization. This role is ideal for a problem\-solver who enjoys turning complexity into clarity through data, technology, and process improvement. You’ll partner closely with Marketing, IT, and cross\-functional stakeholders to strengthen our marketing infrastructure, improve data quality, and deliver insights that support smarter decision\-making and operational excellence.

 **What we’re looking for:**

* You are a strong problem\-solver who enjoys learning new systems and technologies
* You demonstrate high ownership and follow\-through on projects
* You are highly organized with strong attention to detail
* You are a clear communicator who can translate technical concepts to non\-technical audiences
* You have 1–3 years of experience writing SQL queries, joining tables, and troubleshooting data issues (preferred)
* You have 1–3 years of experience building dashboards and reports in Power BI or similar tools (preferred)
* You are familiar with marketing automation platforms, CRM systems, and MarTech tools
* You have an understanding of data integrations and APIs
* Experience managing cross\-functional projects is a plus

 **What you’ll be doing:**

* Build and maintain a reliable, structured marketing data environment
* Deliver and support seamless data integrations across marketing platforms
* Develop dashboards and reporting that translate data into clear, actionable insights
* Automate manual processes while strengthening data quality and governance
* Optimize marketing technology systems to improve performance, efficiency, and adoption
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical challenges by partnering with vendors and internal teams
* Identify and implement system enhancements that elevate marketing capabilities
* Establish and document best practices for scalable and sustainable system management
* Lead marketing initiatives from planning through execution in partnership with IT and cross\-functional teams
* Manage timelines, risks, dependencies, and stakeholder communication to ensure successful project delivery

 **What’s in it for you:**

* Advancement opportunities on an in\-house Marketing team with structured career paths
* Executive exposure and collaboration across multiple departments
* Comprehensive benefits package including health, dental, and vision coverage
* 401(k) with company match
* Perks including employee discounts, financial wellness planning, tuition reimbursement, and more
* **Certified Great Place to Work** with 900\+ lifetime workplace award wins

 **Where you’ll be:** 4289 Ivy Pointe Blvd, Cincinnati, OH 45245

 *Employment visa sponsorship is unavailable for this position. Applicants requiring employment visa sponsorship now or in the future (e.g., F\-1 STEM OPT, H\-1B, TN, J1 etc.) will not be considered.*

jobs.title: Marketing Analytics & Insights Data Architect - Concur
jobs.description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. **What you’ll do:**


SAP Concur is seeking a highly motivated Marketing Analytics \& Insights Data Architect to play a critical role in building a predictable, efficient, and scalable growth engine. This role owns the design and delivery of Marketing Intelligence solutions that enable data‑driven decision‑making across the global marketing organization, while advancing the analytics transformation and migration to SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC).


The ideal candidate brings deep hands‑on analytics expertise, strong systems thinking, and the drive to deliver meaningful outcomes early while steadily evolving capabilities over time. They are energized by owning complex problems end‑to‑end and translating marketing data into clear, actionable insights through high‑impact visualization and storytelling.

 **Your responsibilities include:**

* Define and evolve the Marketing Intelligence information strategy, aligning with SAP Concur and broader SAP data and analytics standards.
* Own the end‑to‑end design and delivery of Marketing Intelligence solutions, partnering with marketing analysts, developers and stakeholders to translate business needs into technical specifications, wireframes, data models, and production‑ready dashboards.
* Design, deliver, and continuously improve reporting and analytics frameworks—including predictive and scenario‑based models and analyses—to inform execution and growth planning (e.g., pipeline performance, funnel health, retention).
* Develop and manage high‑quality data assets, leveraging advanced querying and close collaboration with BI and data engineering teams to ensure performant, scalable data flows and models.
* Ensure data quality, integrity, and security across Marketing Intelligence solutions, including testing, issue resolution, and operational excellence for owned dashboards.
* Enable adoption and understanding of insights through effective data visualization, clear documentation, KPI definitions, and data storytelling that translate complex data and concepts into business‑ready narratives.
* Identify and prioritize future‑focused capabilities, including AI‑enabled analytics use cases, while staying current on industry trends and best practices in BI, AI, and marketing analytics.
* Develop and maintain team documentation for core reports, including marketing KPI definitions, data catalogues, and user guides. Be able to explain complex technical concepts in simple business terms (e.g. data governance, quality standards, and KPI definitions)
 **What you’ll bring:**

* Advanced Tableau, SQL (CTEs, window functions), and Python (Pandas, Basic scripting) required.
* Snowflake or SAP Datasphere experience required. SAP Analytics Cloud experience preferred.
* Ability to think in the abstract and understand the intricacies of a complex system and proficiently demonstrate ability to work with multiple and large datasets. Relational and cloud database, data modeling (star schema), and ETL/ELT design experience preferred.
* Experience translating business problems into predictive analytics use cases (e.g., forecasting, churn, optimization), from defining inputs and metrics to enabling consumption.
* Demonstrates in\-depth knowledge of reporting objects (lead/contact, opportunity, account, etc.) and familiarity with marketing demand funnel and attribution models.
* Strategic understanding of how Generative AI can enhance analytics and decision‑making (e.g., conversational BI, automated insights), with a focus on responsible use.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; must be able to simplify and explain complex ideas, processes, and data structures.
* Strong communication and stakeholder‑management skills, with experience collaborating cross‑functionally, delivering on deadlines, and enabling users through training and documentation.
* Natural curiosity, and excitement to stay abreast with the latest marketing technology trends, tools (e.g. SAP Business Data Cloud) and best practices.
* Displays a passion for what you do and a drive to improve.
 **Meet your team:**


Join our Global Concur Marketing Analytics \& Insights (MAI) team, servicing Marketing teams across SAP Concur. Here, you'll work closely with a talented group of analysts and developers to deliver business intelligence solutions that drive overall business growth. Our team is dedicated to helping Concur marketing increase its efficiency, improve its effectiveness, and achieve its growth priorities by becoming a more insights\-driven organization.

  



**Bring out your best**  

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end\-to\-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose\-driven and future\-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
  

  

**We win with inclusion**  

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well\-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.  

  

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e\-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.  

  

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.  

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, age, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability. **Compensation Range Transparency**: SAP believes the value of pay transparency contributes towards an honest and supportive culture and is a significant step toward demonstrating SAP’s commitment to pay equity. SAP provides the annualized compensation range inclusive of base salary and variable incentive target for the career level applicable to the posted role. The targeted combined range for this position is 175800 \- 328800(USD) USD. The actual amount to be offered to the successful candidate will be within that range, dependent upon the key aspects of each case which may include education, skills, experience, scope of the role, location, etc. as determined through the selection process. Any SAP variable incentive includes a targeted dollar amount and any actual payout amount is dependent on company and personal performance. Please reference this link for a summary of SAP benefits and eligibility requirements: SAP North America Benefits. **AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.  

  

Requisition ID: 447875 \| Work Area: Information Technology \| Expected Travel: 0 \- 10% \| Career Status: Professional \| Employment Type: Regular Full Time \| Additional Locations: \#LI\-Hybrid

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Specialist
jobs.description:
**Purpose:**


The Marketing Operations Specialist is responsible for the coordination and execution of the marketing department’s strategic initiatives and projects. Working directly with the Marketing Operations Manager, the Marketing Operations Specialist monitors, tracks, and ensures timely completion and execution of marketing tasks. Obsessions in this role will be organization, project tracking, and the ability to manage multiple tasks at the same time to ensure deadlines are being met.

**Job Responsibilities:**

* Maintain, monitor and track Marketing projects plans, schedules, work hours, budgets, and expenditures.
* Consult with the Marketing Operations Manager to outline workplan, timeline, and assignment of duties and responsibilities.
* Regularly review and share metrics and timelines to ensure appropriate progress, especially related to strategic longer\-term Marketing projects/initiatives.
* Build positive relationships and communicate effectively with all stakeholders.
* Remain knowledgeable in the policies and regulations of the regulatory bodies and firm to ensure compliance with all work activities.
* Apply good judgment and have the flexibility to respond to shifting priorities.
* Work with all other team members in a way that is conducive to the mission, values, and beliefs of the company to provide a client experience beyond expectations.
* Support all internal and external Credent Marketing initiatives.
* Support tracking and reporting analytics of marketing campaigns through various analytical platforms.
* Perform all other tasks as assigned by management.

**Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:**

* Experience using project management tools and methods
* Progressive business knowledge and interpersonal skills
* Excellent verbal, written, and presentation communication skills
* Self\-driven, independent, adaptable, detail oriented, and creative problem\-solving
* Highly detailed, accurate, organized, and able to think beyond the current process
* Proficient in Microsoft Office suite
* Impeccable attention to detail and task\-oriented
* Excellent organization and follow through skills
* Superior proofreading abilities

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business or related field

**Experience:**

* 1\-3 years of related experience
