jobs.title: Dir, Marketing Operations
jobs.description:
**Director, Marketing Operations**

**Location:** Denver, CO


**The Opportunity**

WOW! is seeking a strategic and operationally exceptional **Director, Marketing Operations,** to serve as the engine behind our marketing organization. This leader will own the **annual and quarterly marketing planning process** , ensuring cross\-functional alignment and executive visibility into strategy, performance, and investment decisions. You will connect Brand, Growth, Field Marketing, Product, Finance, Sales, and Analytics into one unified operating cadence — transforming strategy into execution with clarity, accountability, and measurable business impact.


This role blends:
  

✔ Strategic planning
  

✔ Financial discipline
  

✔ Executive communication
  

✔ Operational excellence


If you thrive at the intersection of strategy and execution — this is your role.


**What WOW! Offers**

* Base salary **up to $160,000 annually** , commensurate with experience, plus short\-term incentive plan, and comprehensive benefits including:
	+ Medical, dental, and vision insurance
	+ 401(k) with company match
	+ Paid time off \& company holidays
	+ Tuition reimbursement for continued development
	+ Employee broadband discounts

**Essential Duties and Responsibilities**

*Include but are not limited to the following:*

**Annual \& Quarterly Marketing Planning**

* Lead the annual marketing planning process aligned to corporate revenue and subscriber targets
* Develop quarterly marketing roadmaps across brand, acquisition, lifecycle, and expansion initiatives
* Establish clear objectives, KPIs, timelines, and accountability structures
* Facilitate planning workshops and cross\-functional prioritization sessions
* Ensure alignment between marketing strategy and financial targets

**Cross\-Functional Alignment \& Communication**

* Serve as the central communication hub for marketing plans across departments
* Translate marketing strategies into clear narratives for Sales, Finance, Operations, and Executive Leadership
* Partner with Product and Field Marketing to ensure launch and promotion alignment
* Drive transparency in trade\-offs, priorities, and resource allocation

**Executive Reporting \& Visibility**

* Develop executive\-ready presentations for quarterly business reviews and board updates
* Create standardized reporting frameworks across marketing functions
* Provide visibility into campaign calendars, budget pacing, and performance against goals
* Identify risks and recommend mitigation strategies proactively

**Budget \& Resource Coordination**

* Partner with Finance and Growth Marketing to align spend plans with forecasted outcomes
* Track budget allocations across brand, acquisition, and field marketing
* Support scenario modeling and mid\-quarter reallocations
* Ensure operational discipline across marketing investments

**Process \& Governance**

* Build scalable planning frameworks and operating cadences
* Establish consistent briefing, approval, and campaign tracking processes
* Improve collaboration tools, documentation standards, and workflows
* Identify and implement efficiency improvements

**Performance \& KPI Management**

* Standardize marketing KPI definitions and reporting cadence
* Ensure consistency between marketing metrics and enterprise reporting
* Monitor performance trends and flag areas requiring strategic adjustment

**Other duties as assigned**

**Qualifications**

*To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.*

**Minimum Required Education and Experience**

* 10\+ years of experience in marketing operations, strategic planning, or marketing leadership
* Experience leading enterprise planning processes in telecom, broadband, subscription, or consumer services preferred
* Strong financial acumen and experience working closely with Finance teams
* Exceptional executive communication and presentation skills
* Proven ability to manage complex cross\-functional initiatives
* Strong analytical mindset with ability to translate data into actionable insights
* Experience implementing operational frameworks and governance processes

**Skills and Abilities to be Successful in this Role**

* Clear, aligned annual and quarterly marketing plans tied to revenue targets
* Strong executive confidence in marketing strategy and performance
* Transparent prioritization and resource allocation across teams
* Improved cross\-functional coordination and reduced planning friction
* Consistent, standardized reporting across marketing functions

**Physical Demands/Working Conditions** : *The physical demands described here are representative of those that must be met by an employee to successfully perform the essential functions of this job. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.*

* regularly required to talk and hear
* required to use hands to type, handle objects and paperwork
* required to use close vision and be able to focus
* Some travel may be required

***WOW! is an Equal Opportunity Employer \- Race/Color/Religion/Sex/Sexual Orientation/Gender Identity/Gender Expression/National Origin/Disability/Protected Veterans***

***All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment***  

***without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national*** ***origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran***

jobs.title: Senior Associate, Marketing Operations (Project Manager)
jobs.description:
Job Description:
The Marketing department enables sales by answering, “Why Dimensional?” They partner with sales groups, investment teams, and executive leadership within Dimensional to extract, package, and spread Dimensional’s message and philosophy. Teams within the Marketing department work to best reflect Dimensional’s unique offer to clients and advance its position in the marketplace.
The Project Manager is a member of the Marketing Operations team and is responsible for facilitating the production and delivery of marketing campaigns and materials for Dimensional’s global brand. These materials include print collateral, digital deliverables, and other specialty items. The role investigates the scope of the project, creates and maintains schedules, and routes jobs through the lifecycle of a creative project including editorial development, design, production, quality control, legal/compliance sign off, and distribution. The candidate must have the ability to work efficiently with large groups of stakeholders, gaining consensus and managing timelines in a fast\-paced environment, and to use sound judgment with an eye to the broader communication needs for the business. In addition, the Project Manager works to assess existing processes, implement improvements, create and maintain process documentation and training, and report on workflow analytics.
Responsibilities:* Coordinate the proper intake, routing, and publishing of projects including capturing project scopes to meet established deadlines.
* Creates schedules and assigns projects to internal team of presentation specialists, designers, production artists, and editors.
* Displays exceptional customer service skills and helps foster an environment of teamwork.
* Manages global projects with stakeholders and key members of the Canada, APAC, and EMEA business teams.
* Analyzes requests and understands total asks before engaging the appropriate department resources, ensure proper prioritization, meet all established deadlines, and proactively resolve issues that may impact the success of event support.
* Routes projects through the project lifecycle while completing stakeholder signoffs, Legal and Compliance approvals, and tracks necessary quality control revisions.
* Understands the duties and strengths of fellow teammates. Ensure resources are aligned and everyone is working toward a common objective.
* Maintains regular communication with Marketing teams and internal clients for early detection of issues. Use metrics wisely to help identify project areas that might need attention.
* Partner with stakeholders including sales, product and investment teams as well as marketing leads to ensure projects meet business needs and alert them to any changes that affect costs, quality, or deadlines.
* Perform regular quality assurance checks to ensure marketing collateral has been published appropriately.
* Identify and implement process improvements to continually streamline workflows and build consistency.
* Work on ad\-hoc projects to support business needs as directed.


Qualifications:* Minimum of 5 years of experience managing complex projects in marketing, communications, design, and/or advertising, with a focus on internal communications and/or brand management.
* Bachelor’s degree in communications, marketing, advertising, or a related field preferred.
* Must be highly organized and results\-oriented.
* Excellent relationship, persuasion/influence, presentation and communication (verbal/written) skills and a professional client service mind\-set
* Demonstrated excellence in interpersonal skills, especially in situations involving consensus and team building, with strong problem\-solving skills
* Strong prioritization and organizational skills, including the ability to maintain several concurrent projects while providing realistic delivery dates and managing customer expectations
* Flexibility, adaptability, and ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously and prioritize workload
* Must be process\-driven, but flexible
* Demonstrated ability to take initiative
* Experience working in a marketing or creative environment
* Background in the financial services industry preferred
* Ability to work with details and ensure accuracy, while maintaining a big picture focus
* This role is not eligible for immigration sponsorship.


\#LI\-Hybrid  

Dimensional offers a variety of programs to help take care of you, your family, and your career, including comprehensive benefits, educational initiatives, and special celebrations of our history, culture, and growth.
It is the policy of the Company to provide equal opportunity for all employees and applicants. The Company recruits, hires, trains, promotes, compensates, and administers all personnel actions without regard to actual or perceived race, color, religion, religious practice, creed, sex, sex stereotyping, pregnancy (which includes pregnancy, childbirth, and medical conditions related to pregnancy, childbirth, or breastfeeding), caregiver status, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender identity, national origin, age, mental or physical disability, ancestry, medical condition, marital status, familial status, domestic partnership status, military or veteran status or service, unemployment status, citizenship status or alienage, sexual orientation, status as a victim of domestic violence, status as a victim of stalking, status as a victim of sex offenses, genetic information, political activities or recreational activities, arrest or conviction record, salary history, natural hairstyle or any other status protected by applicable law except as otherwise required or permitted by law or regulation applicable to the Company or its affiliates.

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Marketing Analytics
jobs.description:
When you join Sallie, you become a champion for all students.
Sallie’s Education Services team is a diverse group of growth\-obsessed entrepreneurs, data analysts, engineers, and developers with a passion for imagining and building scalable businesses for students and families on their unique journey to\-through and immediately after higher education. We’re on a mission to revolutionize how students and their families plan, pay and complete this journey with confidence. Join a team of seekers, challengers and creative thinkers to change the way students plan for their future for the better.
When you join Sallie, you become a champion for all students.  

Sallie’s Education Services team is a diverse group of growth\-obsessed entrepreneurs, data analysts, engineers, and developers with a passion for imagining and building scalable businesses for students and families on their unique journey to\-through and immediately after higher education. We’re on a mission to revolutionize how students and their families plan, pay and complete this journey with confidence. Join a team of seekers, challengers and creative thinkers to change the way students plan for their future for the better.  

What You'll Contribute  

The Senior Manager, Marketing Analytics, will play a critical role in transforming marketing and customer data into actionable insights that drive business decisions, optimization, and long\-term growth. This role will partner with advertising, marketing channel owners, digital products, engineering, and data teams to stand up scalable measurement, unlock deeper channel insights, and enable a modern, insight\-led marketing function across paid, owned, and future omnichannel experiences.  

What You'll Do* Serve as a strategic analytics partner to Education Services marketing, product, and advertising stakeholders, translating business questions into measurable frameworks, analyses, and actionable recommendations.
* Lead analytics support for our new advertising service, including measurement strategy, tracking implementation, and ongoing performance analysis.
* Own and evolve paid media measurement, ensuring accurate and scalable tracking, attribution approaches, and conversion measurement across channels.
* Move beyond standard reporting to deliver insights that drive optimization, experimentation, and informed decision\-making
* Support owned and paid channel analytics across our website, with a strong focus on lead generation performance and funnel effectiveness.
* Leverage web analytics tools to analyze user behavior, conversion paths, and on\-site engagement.
* Connect campaign performance to on\-site behavior and business outcomes, enabling a holistic view of channel impact.
* Translate complex data into clear, compelling insights and narratives tailored to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Identify trends, opportunities, and gaps across channels to inform marketing strategy and investment decisions.
* Help define and maintain best practices and standards for channel and advertising analytics within a centralized analytics team
* Continuously evaluate and improve event tagging, tracking processes, and reporting frameworks to enhance data quality, scalability, and performance insights

 *The above information is intended to describe the general nature and level of work performed by employees assigned to this job; it is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities and qualifications required of employees in this role.*  

What You Have  

Minimum education, skills and experience required.* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Statistics, Data Science, Economics, Business, Analytics, or a related field; Master’s degree or MBA strongly preferred
* Deep knowledge of marketing analytics methodologies, including attribution modeling, customer lifetime value (CLV), and cohort analysis
* Advanced proficiency in SQL, knowledge of Snowflake, and experience with data visualization tools like Tableau, Looker, or Power BI
* Expertise in digital analytics platforms such as Heap, Adobe Analytics, or Google Analytics
* Experience with digital marketing platforms such as Hubspot, Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Salesforce, or similar
* Strong communication skills with experience influencing executive stakeholders
* Proven ability to manage cross\-functional teams and complex data projects in fast\-paced environments

  

Preferred education, skills, and experience.* 7\+ years of experience in analytics, data science, or marketing analytics, with a strong focus on paid media, advertising, and channel performance
* Experience with Google Tag Manager (GTM) for tag management and data layer setup
* Experience with Python, R, SAS, or similar for statistical marketing modeling
* Usage of SEO tools such as Google Search Console or Ahrefs

  

Feeling your best helps you do your best:
Our benefits take care of the whole you—so you can build your work around your life (not the other way around!).* Competitive base salaries
* Bonus incentives
* Generous PTO, Floating Holidays and 12 Federal Holidays observed
* Support for financial\-well\-being and retirement 401k with employer match
* Comprehensive medical, dental, vision, hospital indemnity, critical illness, pet insurance and more
* Employer paid short\-term/long\-term disability and basic life insurance
* Flexible hybrid working arrangements.
* Paid parental leave and adoption reimbursement programs
* Free access to on\-site staffed fitness centers (in Delaware) and gym subsidy (for locations outside Delaware)
* Confidential counseling support (EAP), Health Advocacy services and Wellness program with financial incentives
* Tuition Reimbursement and Family Scholarship Programs
* Career development and training opportunities


Not the right fit? Let us know you're interested in a future opportunity by clicking *Introduce Yourself* in the top\-right corner of the page or create an account to set up email alerts as new job postings become available that meet your interest!

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, age, genetic information, gender identity, disability, Veteran status or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. To request an accommodation please call (855\) 756\-2007 and choose option 9\. All information you provide will be kept confidential and will be used only to the extent required to provide needed reasonable accommodations.

jobs.title: Associate Director, Marketing Operations Review Management
jobs.description:
**Company Description** **About AbbVie**


AbbVie's mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that solve serious health issues today and address the medical challenges of tomorrow. We strive to have a remarkable impact on people's lives across several key therapeutic areas including immunology, oncology and neuroscience \- and products and services in our Allergan Aesthetics portfolio. For more information about AbbVie, please visit us at www.abbvie.com. Follow @abbvie on LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, X and YouTube.

 **Job Description** **The Associate Director, Marketing Operations Review Management** position leads a team of people leaders and individual contributors that manage the US Material Review Process (MRP) to ensure effective, efficient and compliant delivery of promotional and non\-promotional communications, tools and programs to all stakeholders.


The Marketing Operations team sets process standards, guidelines, and policies for the review process for U.S. Commercial Marketing and Sales Excellence team members, medical reviewers, regulatory reviewers and other key stakeholders to ensure the appropriate and timely review of all promotional and non\-promotional materials. The Associate Director leads their teams in the planning and execution of the MRP for their therapeutic area, utilizing and documenting best practices, lessons learned, and fostering an environment of continuous improvement. The individual in this position must be solution\-oriented and able to understand the nuance of the situation while seeing the bigger picture and aligning with the brand’s goals and priorities. This person is technology and solution\-focused, data\-driven, and understands the inner workings of the brands’ goals and how to most effectively leverage Marketing Operations various capabilities and their infrastructure to achieve them.

**Accountability \& Scope:**

* Reports to Director, Marketing Operations Review Management within the US Therapeutics Operations organization.
* Partners with US therapeutic area leadership across Marketing, Medical, Regulatory, Legal, OEC, HR, and Business Technology.
* Oversees team of approximately 10\-15 full\-time employees and contractors
* Accountable for Therapeutic Area review team structure and resource management
* Takes on large scale projects with unclear objectives and drives to completion
* Represents Marketing Operations in cross\-functional TA\-related activities.

**Core Responsibilities:**

* Understands the spirit and intent of policies and is able to “make the call”.
* Understands the objectives of the businesses and aligns the process and priorities of their team to enable achievement of the goals of the brand.
* Provides solutions and contingency plans to facilitate business success, exerts authority, as appropriate, for exceptions to process, holds self and team accountable for results, provides innovative solutions to project hurdles.
* Understands organizational priorities, key tactics and timelines, stays immersed in the business. Leverages knowledge of IBT/customers goals to partner and support strategies and objectives.
* Shares and documents best practices and lessons learned to drive consistency in approach and enhance overall functional and business success
* Proactively looks for ways to improve, streamline and simplify internal processes and drives implementation of process/system changes in line with the Marketing Operations Continuous Improvement Roadmap
* Demonstrates critical, creative thinking and problem\-solving skills, and the ability to produce clear, concise and persuasive written and verbal communications. Exhibits strategic thinking by enhancing communication with insights and recommendations
* Collaboratively partners with cross\-functional teams to drive effective outcomes and drive changes to policies/procedures, as appropriate, when marketplace conditions change.
* Establishes a productive work environment by creating trust, transparency and respect within their team.
* Manages resources within team to ensure aligned to therapeutic area initiatives and priorities.
* Creates opportunities to recognize and reward outstanding individual and team performance and consistently provides clear and transparent feedback.
* Completes all phases of Performance Reviews including setting goals, providing regular feedback/coaching and development planning.
* Proactively and consistently exhibits strategic thinking by analyzing metrics and enhancing data with insights, trends and recommendations and presenting key metrics, data and trends to stakeholders and partners. (E.g., Quarterly Business Reviews)

**Leadership:**

* Builds high\-performing teams and elevates the skills of the entire team.
* Formulates goals and strategies to achieve business objectives.
* Ability to grow and leverage team members’ skills across the department.
* Provides positive leadership and productive influence across the organization.
* Recognized by staff, customers, senior management, vendors, and cross\-functional partners as a leader/expert in the material review process and systems.
* Effectively utilizes all available resources, either within or outside of direct span of control, to manage diverse workload, maximize productivity, motivate team members, and encourage innovation.

  

**Qualifications**  

* B.A./B.S. Marketing, Communications, Advertising or Business or equivalent business experience within AbbVie or a related industry
* 8\+ years of experience in marketing, project or program management
* 3\+ years of experience in pharmaceutical industry
* Proven management experience across multiple functions including management of exempt personnel in fast\-paced, service/team environment.
* Excellent written, verbal and presentation skills with the ability to distill highly complex requirements into compelling business objectives, and influence across functions and levels.
* Strong problem\-solving abilities in complex, compliance regulated department

  

**Additional Information**  

Applicable only to applicants applying to a position in any location with pay disclosure requirements under state or local law:


* The compensation range described below is the range of possible base pay compensation that the Company believes in good faith it will pay for this role at the time of this postingbased on the job grade for this position. Individual compensation paid within this range will depend on many factors including geographic location, and we may ultimately pay more orless than the posted range. This range may be modified in the future.
* We offer a comprehensive package of benefits including paid time off (vacation, holidays, sick), medical/dental/vision insurance and 401(k) to eligible employees.
* This job is eligible to participate in our short\-term incentive programs.

Note: No amount of pay is considered to be wages or compensation until such amount is earned, vested, and determinable. The amount and availability of any bonus, commission,incentive, benefits, or any other form of compensation and benefits that are allocable to a particular employee remains in the Company's sole and absolute discretion unless and until paidand may be modified at the Company’s sole and absolute discretion, consistent with applicable law.

US \& Puerto Rico only \- to learn more, visit https://www.abbvie.com/join\-us/equal\-employment\-opportunity\-employer.html

jobs.title: Vice President, Marketing Technology & Operations
jobs.description:
**Company Description**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your community, and to the world.


Progress starts with you.

 **Job Description** **Marketing Technology Strategy \& Architecture**

* Own the vision and roadmap for Visa Marketing's technology stack
* Lead martech consolidation initiatives targeting stack reduction and annual savings
* Design unified data architecture integrating CDP, CRM, marketing automation, and analytics
* platforms
* Evaluate and integrate AI\-native platforms—distinguishing genuine capabilities from marketing hype

**AI Transformation Partnership**

* Partner with leadership to execute Visa Marketing's AI transformation agenda
* Deliver technical infrastructure for AI pilots across Insights \& Analytics, Content Generation, and Marketing Services
* Architect agentic workflows for autonomous campaign optimization and real\-time personalization
* Build technical expertise that provides credibility for AI investment proposals

**First\-Party Data Platform Development**

* Lead architecture and implementation of unified first\-party data strategy
* Design privacy\-compliant data infrastructure across global markets with varying regulatory requirements (GDPR, CCPA)
* Build marketing data clean room capabilities for secure partner collaboration
* Create data\-enriched AI optimization frameworks that demonstrate ROI vs. content\-only approaches

**Digital Production \& Delivery Excellence**

* Improve technical delivery for B2B Marketing, Marketing Services, and client enablement programs
* Build scalable digital production capabilities serving both internal marketers and external clients
* Design solutions with 'Client Zero' mindset—internal capabilities that become monetizable products
* Establish quality standards and execution judgment across technical delivery

**Vendor \& Partner Accountability**

* Hold technology partners and agencies accountable for delivery
* Evaluate whether partners are creating real value or generating complexity to justify fees
* Structure SOWs, SLAs, and governance frameworks that create genuine accountability
* Provide technical credibility that strengthens stakeholder relationships

  

**Qualifications**  

Basic Qualifications

* 12 or more years of work experience with a bachelor’s Degree or at least 10 years of experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters/ MBA/JD/MD) or at least 8 years of work experience with a PhD


Preferred Qualifications

* 15 or more years of experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD, PhD)

  

**Additional Information** **Work Hours:** Varies upon the needs of the department.

**Travel Requirements:** This position requires travel 5\-10% of the time.

**Mental/Physical Requirements:** This position will be performed in an office setting. The position will require the incumbent to sit and stand at a desk, communicate in person and by telephone, frequently operate standard office equipment, such as telephones and computers.


Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.


Visa will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with applicable local law, including the requirements of Article 49 of the San Francisco Police Code.

**U.S. APPLICANTS ONLY: The estimated salary range for this position is 258,100\.00 to 451,800\.00 USD per year, which may include potential sales incentive payments (if applicable). Salary may vary depending on job\-related factors which may include knowledge, skills, experience, and location. In addition, this position may be eligible for bonus and equity. Visa has a comprehensive benefits package for which this position may be eligible that includes Medical, Dental, Vision, 401 (k), FSA/HSA, Life Insurance, Paid Time Off, and Wellness Program.**

jobs.title: Senior Manager, B2B Marketing Analytics
jobs.description:
**Senior Manager, B2B Analytics**


Dow Jones, New York


**About Our Organization:**


Dow Jones is a global provider of news and business information, delivering content to consumers and organizations around the world across multiple formats, including print, digital, mobile and live events. Dow Jones has produced unrivaled quality content for more than 130 years and today has one of the world’s largest news\-gathering operations globally. It is home to leading publications and products including the flagship Wall Street Journal, America’s largest newspaper by paid circulation; Barron’s, MarketWatch, Investor’s Business Daily, Factiva, Dow Jones Risk \& Compliance, Dow Jones Newswires, OPIS and Chemical Market Analytics. Dow Jones is a division of News Corp (Nasdaq: NWS, NWSA; ASX: NWS, NWSLV).


**About the Role:**


Reporting to the Vice President of B2B Marketing Data Science, this role will lead the evolution of Dow Jones’ B2B data science and analytics capabilities in support of our B2B business function. This position is responsible for driving data\-driven strategies that optimize opportunity generation, accelerate revenue growth, improve acquisition , and enhance retention performance.


The Senior Manager will design and implement advanced analytics frameworks, robust revenue measurement methodologies that inform capital allocation across demand generation, account\-based marketing, pricing, and customer lifecycle initiatives.


**You Will:**


**Responsibilities:**


* **Strategic Leadership:** Develop and execute analytics projects driving key insights that drive pipeline growth and revenue
* **Build Capabilities and Drive Insights:** Support development of propensity models, attribution models, market mix models and customer segmentation models to drive insights that facilitate business planning, forecasting and optimization
* **Executive Reporting and Opportunity Analysis:** Develop executive level reports in BI tools (Looker , Tableau) to develop E2E customer journey insights and identify opportunity areas to drive future growth
* **Data Story Telling:** Articulate clear, actionable insights derived from model results and effectively communicate complex technical concepts to a non\-technical audience
* **Data Infrastructure and Technology:** Collaborate with data engineering teams to establish and maintain robust data infrastructure, ensuring data quality, accessibility, and security. Evaluate and implement appropriate data science tools, platforms, and technologies to streamline processes and enhance data\-driven marketing
* **Stakeholder Collaboration:** Engage proactively with cross\-functional teams, including marketing, sales, product development, and finance, to comprehend their specific business requirements and translate them into effective, data\-driven solutions

**You Have:**


* 9\+ years of experience in marketing analytics, or data science
* Degree in a quantitative field such as Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related disciplines; or equivalent experience
* Experience supporting B2B or enterprise go\-to\-market models, ideally within media, information services, SaaS, or subscription\-based businesses
* Strong expertise in advanced analytics, predictive modeling, forecasting, and funnel analysis
* Understanding of B2B marketing and sales funnels, account\-based marketing (ABM), CRM systems, and pipeline management
* Proficiency in BI tools, Python, R, SQL, and experience working with large\-scale, cloud\-based data environments
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to communicate complex analytics to non\-technical, executive stakeholders
* Proven ability to influence strategic decisions through data\-driven insights
* Familiarity with marketing automation platforms, CRM platforms (e.g Salesforce), and digital analytics tools is a plus

**Our Benefits**


* Comprehensive Healthcare Plans
* Paid Time Off
* Retirement Plans
* Comprehensive Insurance Plans
* Lifestyle programs \& Wellness Resources
* Education Benefits
* Family Care Benefits \& Caregiving Support
* Commuter Transit Program
* Subscription Discounts
* Employee Referral Program

Learn more about all our US benefits

Since 1882, Dow Jones has been finding new ways to bring information to the world’s top business entities. Beginning as a niche news agency in an obscure Wall Street basement, Dow Jones has grown to be a worldwide news and information powerhouse, with prestigious brands including The Wall Street Journal, Dow Jones Newswires, Factiva, Barron’s, MarketWatch and Financial News.


This longevity and success is due to a relentless pursuit of accuracy, depth and innovation, enhanced by the wisdom of past experience and a solid grasp on the future ahead. More than its individual brands, Dow Jones is a modern gateway to intelligence, with innovative technology, advanced data feeds, integrated solutions, expert research, award\-winning journalism and customizable apps and delivery systems to bring the information that matters most to customers, when and where they need it, every day.

jobs.title: Director, MarTech Strategy & Activation
jobs.description:
The Director, MarTech Strategy \& Activation is a strategic lead within the Marketing organization, responsible for bridging technical capabilities and business applications. This role manages the daily operations of our AdTech and MarTech tools, ensuring they are configured to maximize the value of our first\-party fan data for targeted, high\-performance campaigns. You will act as the primary translator between marketing goals and technical execution, optimizing our automation ecosystem to improve fan engagement and drive measurable business growth.


**Responsibilities**

*Strategy \& Innovation*

* Lead the development of deep, multi\-dimensional fan profiles that empower marketing teams with actionable audience insights and triggers needed to deliver effective campaigns
* Own the adoption and marketing application of first\-party data and data clean rooms, enabling advanced targeting, measurement, and privacy\-safe data collaboration
* Create new and innovative marketing use cases, pushing the organization toward advanced capabilities such as behavior\-triggered journeys across all channels and products, predictive audiences, and event\-based decisioning
* Serve as the primary voice of the business to Product, Engineering, and Data teams, gathering and translating complex marketing requirements into clear technical specifications
* Evaluate, recommend, and optimize the League’s MarTech tools; lead RFPs, pilots, and capability assessments to ensure the marketing technology stack meets marketer needs in addition to technical requirements

*Operations \& Execution*

* Create and enforce governance for marketing communications across Email, SMS, Push, and paid channels, including frequency cap definitions, prioritization logic, channel hierarchy, and suppression rules to ensure fans receive the right message at the right time
* Standardize workflows across League and Club channels, ensuring all marketing stakeholders leverage shared automation capabilities to deliver consistent, high\-quality fan experiences
* Partner with Analytics and the Fan Data Platform team to define attribution logic and measurement frameworks, ensuring digital marketing programs are tracked, evaluated, and optimized with a consistent methodology
* Develop specific project plans to prioritize and execute against business goals; provide regular status updates on progress and gaps while actively soliciting feedback to maintain alignment across the organization

**Qualifications \& Skills**

* 4\-year degree in marketing, business, data science, or related field; or equivalent relevant experience
* 7\+ years of experience in marketing technology, marketing operations, or digital strategy
* Deep fluency in activation platforms (Email, SMS, Push, Paid Media, Journey Orchestration, etc.)
* Proven expertise utilizing Customer Data Platforms (CDPs) and Data Clean Rooms to drive secure audience targeting and personalization
* Demonstrated experience acting as the liaison between business stakeholders and technical engineering teams, translating business goals into technical reality
* A track record of taking platforms from implementation to innovation, proactively creating use cases that drive measurable ROI or efficiency
* Solid understanding of marketing governance, data privacy (GDPR, CCPA), and the end\-to\-end digital marketing flow
* Familiarity with Agentic AI workflows, synthetic data, or contextual intelligence

**Salary Range:** $140,000 \- $175,000 (Base Salary) \+ Bonus


As a candidate for this position, your salary and related aspects of compensation will be contingent upon your work experience, education, skills, and any other factors MLB considers relevant to the hiring decision. In addition to your salary, MLB believes in providing a competitive compensation and benefits package for its employees.


**Top MLB Perks \& Benefits:**

* Competitive Benefits Package
* Company Contributed 401K Plan
* Paid Time Off and Holidays
* Paid Parental Leave
* Access to Free Tickets to Baseball Games \& MLB.TV
* Discounts at MLB Store \| MLBShop.com
* Employee Assistance Programs (EAP)
* Onsite/Online Training \& Development Programs
* Tuition Reimbursement
* Disability Benefits (short term and long term)
* Life and Accidental Death Insurance
* Pet Insurance

**Why MLB?**

Major League Baseball (MLB) is the most historic of the major professional sports leagues in the United States and Canada. Employees love working at MLB because of the culture of growth, teamwork, and professionalism. Employees who are most successful at MLB take initiative, know how to identify problems and provide solutions, and always put the Team first. For those ready to step up to the plate and join the major leagues, MLB takes the same approach as teams do with their players: empowering our “workforce athletes” to be at their best by engineering experiences that put employees in the best position to succeed. Major League Baseball is looking for candidates who are passionate about growing America’s pastime to best serve its fans for decades to come.

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Marketing Operations & Technology (REMOTE)
jobs.description:
For 75 years, Charles River employees have worked together to assist in the discovery, development and safe manufacture of new drug therapies. When you join our family, you will have a significant impact on the health and well\-being of people across the globe. Whether your background is in life sciences, finance, IT, sales or another area, your skills will play an important role in the work we perform. In return, we’ll help you build a career that you can feel passionate about.

**Job Summary**
---------------



As **Senior Manager, Marketing Operations \& Technology**, you will help define the strategy, governance, and execution of our marketing technology and operations to enable scalable, data driven, revenue marketing. You will partner closely with Global Technology, Sales/Commercial Operations, Data \& Analytics, and business stakeholders to:

* Orchestrate the end to end revenue funnel (from inquiry to renewal/expansion),
* Build a resilient martech \& data foundation,
* Standardize campaign execution and experimentation, and
* Deliver actionable performance insights that accelerate growth.
 **Key Responsibilities:**

 **Revenue Operations \& Performance Analytics**  

* Full\-funnel reporting of marketing’s contribution to pipeline and revenue, forecasting, and last touch attribution in partnership with Commercial Operations and Finance.
* Build and maintain KPI frameworks (MQL/SQO, conversion/lead quality, conversion velocity, CAC/LTV, influenced and sourced pipeline) and develop predictive models.
* Translate insights into prioritized action plans for channel owners and field teams.
 **Martech \& Data Infrastructure**  

* Co own the marketing technology stack (e.g., Salesforce, Account Engagement/Pardot, CDP, tag management, web analytics, routing/scoring, ABM, integration) with IT; collaborate to define integration patterns, data models, and SLAs.
* Establish data contracts with Data Engineering; operationalize data hygiene, deduplication, enrichment, and governed taxonomies.
* Evaluate and implement new platforms; drive vendor selection, contracts, and renewals aligned to roadmap and ROI.
 **Campaign Automation**  

* Implement lead management (scoring, grading, routing) and SLA compliance with BDR/SDR and Sales.
 **Experimentation \& Personalization**  

* Collaborate to establish a test and learn digital marketing operating model: A/B and multivariate testing, holdout design, and personalization strategies across web, email, and paid channels; publish experimentation roadmaps.
* Collaborate to integrate experimentation data back into segmentation and creative briefs.
 **Sales Enablement Operations**  

* Govern the content supply chain (taxonomy/metadata, CMS/DAM workflows, localization); ensure consistent tagging for performance measurement.
* Partner with Sales Enablement on asset findability, usage analytics, and integration with CRM.
 **Data Privacy**  

* Ensure compliance with global privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA, CAN SPAM) and recommend/implement privacy safe measurement (consent management, server side tagging as appropriate).
 **Process Optimization, Governance \& Change Management**  

* Own the marketing operations calendar, and intake process; implement RACI, SOPs, and playbooks.
* Lead organizational change management for platform rollouts and process changes (training, communications, adoption metrics) as appropriate.
 **Culture \& Alignment**  

* Establish a culture of documentation, quality, and continuous improvement; help define a marketing operations maturity model and skills roadmap.
* Ensure alignment with enterprise technology strategy and security standards.
**Job Qualifications**
----------------------


**Qualifications \& Experience:**  

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Information Systems, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.
* 7–10\+ years in marketing operations/technology roles with demonstrable leadership of multi platform stacks and complex integrations.
* Hands on experience administering Salesforce (Sales Cloud), Marketing Automation (Pardot/Account Engagement), tag management (GTM/GA4\), ABM/intent, and common data models/CDP.
* Analytics/BI proficiency: SQL for querying and validation; dashboarding in Power BI; comfort with attribution models and statistical testing fundamentals.
* Proven track record establishing experimentation programs (A/B, MVT).
* Demonstrated RevOps partnership: pipeline modeling, forecasting, lead management SLAs, and executive level reporting.
* Experience leading enterprise change (platform migrations, process re engineering, global enablement).
* CRO or life sciences/healthcare experience preferred; understands scientific/clinical context and associated communication standards.
* Strong program/project management; ability to translate strategy to execution and manage multiple initiatives in a fast paced environment.
 **Knowledge, Skills \& Abilities:**  

* Deep martech architecture knowledge and integration best practices; comfort creating data models and system design docs.
* Analytical problem solver who converts data into decisions; strong command of funnel analytics, attribution, and incrementality.
* Experimentation mindset with rigorous documentation and governance.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills across marketing, sales, data, IT, and executive leadership.
* Change leadership—able to drive adoption and measurable behavior change.
* Working knowledge of privacy and clinical research ethics impacting marketing and external communications.
**Compensation Data**
---------------------



The pay range for this position is $110K \- $140K USD annually. Please note that salaries vary within the range based on factors including, but not limited to, experience, skills, education, certifications, and location.

 **About Corporate Functions**  

The Corporate Functions provide operational support across Charles River in areas such as Human Resources, Finance, IT, Legal, Sales, Quality Assurance, Marketing, and Corporate Development. They partner with their colleagues across the company to develop and drive strategies and to set global standards. The functions are essential to providing a bridge between strategic vision and operational readiness, to ensure ongoing functional innovation and capability improvement.

 **About Charles River**  

Charles River is an early\-stage contract research organization (CRO). We have built upon our foundation of laboratory animal medicine and science to develop a diverse portfolio of discovery and safety assessment services, both Good Laboratory Practice (GLP) and non\-GLP, to support clients from target identification through preclinical development. Charles River also provides a suite of products and services to support our clients’ clinical laboratory testing needs and manufacturing activities. Utilizing this broad portfolio of products and services enables our clients to create a more flexible drug development model, which reduces their costs, enhances their productivity and effectiveness to increase speed to market.


With over 20,000 employees within 110 facilities in over 20 countries around the globe, we are strategically positioned to coordinate worldwide resources and apply multidisciplinary perspectives in resolving our client’s unique challenges. Our client base includes global pharmaceutical companies, biotechnology companies, government agencies and hospitals and academic institutions around the world.


At Charles River, we are passionate about our role in improving the quality of people’s lives. Our mission, our excellent science and our strong sense of purpose guide us in all that we do, and we approach each day with the knowledge that our work helps to improve the health and well\-being of many across the globe. We have proudly worked on 80% of the drugs approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) in the past five years.


We’re committed to providing benefits that elevate your quality of life. Based on your position these may include: bonus/incentives based on performance, 401K, paid time off, stock purchase program, Health and wellness coverage, employee and family wellbeing support programs, and work life balance flexibility.

 **Equal Employment Opportunity**


Charles River is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, sex, religion, national origin, ancestry, age, mental or physical disability, family status, pregnancy, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.


It is unlawful in some states (including Massachusetts) to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.


If you are interested in applying to Charles River Laboratories and need special assistance or an accommodation due to a disability to complete any forms or to otherwise participate in the resume submission process, please contact a member of our Human Resources team by sending an e\-mail message to crrecruitment\_US@crl.com. This contact is for accommodation requests for individuals with disabilities only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.


For more information, please visit www.criver.com.

jobs.title: Director, MarTech Product & Enablement
jobs.description:
The MLB Product team is seeking an experienced Director to lead the delivery, evolution, integrations, and operational excellence of MLB’s fan activation and marketing technology platforms. This role sits within the Fan Data Platform Product organization, which is responsible for unifying MLB fan data, enabling a 360\-degree fan view, and building scalable data and technology foundations that support analytics, personalization, marketing activation, and other league\-wide functions.


This role is a hands\-on product leader with a deep understanding of data governance, marketing technologies, and tool integration responsible for translating business and marketing requirements into durable, well\-architected platform capabilities. The Director of MarTech Product \& Enablement partners closely with Marketing, Engineering, and Analytics teams to shape MarTech system design, prioritize platform enhancements, and build scalable capabilities that power meaningful fan engagement and personalized experiences for millions of fans worldwide.


**Responsibilities**

*MarTech Platform Ownership \& Delivery*

* Own the delivery, integration, and ongoing evolution of MLB’s Marketing Technology platforms, ensuring seamless operations across channels and data flows
* Serve as the primary product owner and subject matter expert for MarTech platforms, partnering with Engineering to design scalable solutions, manage technical tradeoffs, and prioritize platform enhancements
* Partner with Marketing teams to translate business and activation requirements into durable, well\-architected platform capabilities focusing on innovation and strategic fit
* Identify and advance opportunities to modernize and improve MarTech platforms through new capabilities, architectural enhancements, and emerging technologies, balancing innovation with reliability and scalability

*Cross\-Functional Execution*

* Collaborate closely with Marketing, Engineering, Product, and Analytics teams to gather requirements, define system behaviors, and ensure MarTech solutions meet functional and technical needs
* Partner with 30 Club’s Marketing, Data, and Analytics teams to enable adoption of centralized MarTech capabilities, support Club\-level use cases, and balance league\-wide standards with local needs

*Data Governance \& Compliance*

* Own the documentation and enablement of fan consent workflows, including Opt\-In and Opt\-Out processes, across marketing channels and platforms
* Partner with Legal, Data Engineering, and Information Security teams to ensure MarTech systems and data flows comply with applicable privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, state\-specific requirements) and MLB privacy policies
* Drive clear documentation, operational standards, and governance practices for MarTech\-related data flows and system dependencies

*Tracking, Measurement, \& Attribution*

* Own the foundational attribution and measurement infrastructure that supports marketing performance analysis, including standardized data models, nomenclature, implementation patterns, and quality assurance practices
* Manage linking infrastructure (e.g., deep links, short URLs), and data capture patterns ensuring fan calls to action generate tracked events that can be reliably tracked through to conversion
* Maintain data ownership over attribution datasets, ensuring tracking methodologies (e.g., Adobe\-based tracking, breakout pixels) are well understood, consistently implemented, and appropriately interpreted by downstream teams

**Qualifications \& Skills**

* 7\+ years of professional experience in Marketing Technology, MarTech integrations, or a related technical role
* Deep familiarity with the implementation, integration, and ongoing operational management of enterprise\-level MarTech solutions
* Hands\-on experience partnering with Engineering teams on system design and leading cross\-functional projects with Marketing, Product, and Analytics teams
* Strong analytical skills
* Experience with consent management, data privacy, and governance related to marketing data flows
* Familiarity with marketing channel technologies for Email, SMS, Push, Paid Media, and Journey orchestration
* Proficiency in SQL, with the ability to query, validate, and troubleshoot in large datasets
* Experience with Customer Data Platforms (CDPs), including Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) or similar tools
* Strong understanding of tracking, linking management, and attribution data concepts
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional manner for interfacing with executives and non\-technical stakeholders across departments

**Salary Range:** $140,000 \- $175,000 (Base Salary) \+ Bonus


As a candidate for this position, your salary and related aspects of compensation will be contingent upon your work experience, education, skills, and any other factors MLB considers relevant to the hiring decision. In addition to your salary, MLB believes in providing a competitive compensation and benefits package for its employees.


**Top MLB Perks \& Benefits:**

* Competitive Benefits Package
* Company Contributed 401K Plan
* Paid Time Off and Holidays
* Paid Parental Leave
* Access to Free Tickets to Baseball Games \& MLB.TV
* Discounts at MLB Store \| MLBShop.com
* Employee Assistance Programs (EAP)
* Onsite/Online Training \& Development Programs
* Tuition Reimbursement
* Disability Benefits (short term and long term)
* Life and Accidental Death Insurance
* Pet Insurance

**Why MLB?**

Major League Baseball (MLB) is the most historic of the major professional sports leagues in the United States and Canada. Employees love working at MLB because of the culture of growth, teamwork, and professionalism. Employees who are most successful at MLB take initiative, know how to identify problems and provide solutions, and always put the Team first. For those ready to step up to the plate and join the major leagues, MLB takes the same approach as teams do with their players: empowering our “workforce athletes” to be at their best by engineering experiences that put employees in the best position to succeed. Major League Baseball is looking for candidates who are passionate about growing America’s pastime to best serve its fans for decades to come.


Colorado Residents: Colorado based applicants may redact or remove age\-identifying information such as age, date of birth, or dates of school attendance or graduation. You will not be penalized for redacting or removing this information.


**Are you ready to Step Up to the Plate? Apply below!**

jobs.title: Senior Director, Marketing Technology (MarTech)
jobs.description:
**Company Description**  

It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI\-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud\-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.

 **Job Description**  

The


Senior Director, Marketing Technology (MarTech) is responsible for building and operating ServiceNow’s global Marketing Technology ecosystem as a strategic growth platform—powering buying\-group engagement, lifecycle orchestration, and AI\-enabled marketing at scale.


This role owns the MarTech operating system: defining how platforms, data, workflows, and AI agents work together to enable consistent, compliant, and high\-performing marketing execution across regions and teams. The Senior Director leads platform strategy, governance, and enablement while partnering closely with Digital Experience, Activation, Data \& Analytics, IT, and Integrated Marketing.


This is a senior leadership role requiring deep technical fluency, strong product thinking, and the ability to operate at the intersection of architecture, governance, and business outcomes

**Key Responsibilities**

**MarTech Strategy \& Architecture**

* Define and own the enterprise MarTech architecture, including marketing automation, CDP, identity, orchestration, analytics, and AI enablement layers.
* Translate GTM and Buying Group strategy into system behavior: orchestration logic, data flows, decisioning rules, and activation patterns.
* Maintain a multi\-year MarTech roadmap aligned to business priorities, platform evolution, and AI capability maturity.

**Platform Operations \& Enablement**

* Lead day\-to\-day operations of core MarTech platforms (e.g., automation, CDP, journey orchestration, CMS/CCMS integrations).
* Establish operational rigor: intake models, SLAs, release management, platform health metrics, and incident management.
* Build enablement programs that ensure marketers, pods, and partners can self\-serve effectively within governed guardrails.

**AI, Automation \& Agent Operations**

* Operationalize AI and agent\-based workflows across marketing use cases (e.g., journey optimization, content generation, testing, targeting).
* Define “human\-in\-the\-loop” accountability for all AI systems to ensure quality, brand safety, and regulatory compliance.
* Partner with Data, Engineering, and IT to scale agent orchestration responsibly across the MarTech stack.

**Governance, Privacy \& Compliance**

* Own MarTech governance across data privacy, consent management, AI governance, and brand safety.
* Ensure compliance with global regulations (GDPR, CCPA, emerging AI regulations) across all marketing platforms and workflows.
* Establish clear standards for data usage, integrations, vendor access, and third\-party activation.
* **Cross\-Functional Leadership \& Partnership**
* Partner with Digital Experience and Activation leaders to ensure MarTech enables end\-to\-end journeys across owned and paid channels.
* Collaborate with Data \& Analytics to ensure clean signal capture, identity resolution, measurement, and closed\-loop optimization.
* Act as the senior MarTech counterpart to IT/DT on architecture decisions, integrations, security, and scalability.

**Key Outcomes \& Deliverables**

* A scalable, AI\-enabled MarTech operating system aligned to Buying Groups and lifecycle engagement
* Clear platform ownership, governance models, and decision rights across Marketing and IT
* Improved speed\-to\-market for campaigns and journeys without sacrificing compliance or quality
* Increased adoption and measurable value realization from MarTech investments
* A future\-ready foundation for agentic marketing and real\-time orchestration

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications**

**Experience \& Expertise**

* 12\+ years of experience in MarTech, digital platforms, or marketing systems leadership
* Proven ownership of large\-scale MarTech ecosystems (automation, CDP, identity, orchestration, analytics)
* Strong understanding of B2B GTM models, Buying Groups, lifecycle marketing, and account\-based strategies
* Demonstrated experience operationalizing AI and automation in production marketing environments

**Technical \& Strategic Skills**

* Deep fluency in MarTech architecture, data flows, and integration patterns
* Product\-oriented mindset: roadmaps, backlogs, adoption metrics, and value measurement
* Strong governance instincts across privacy, AI risk, and brand safety
* Ability to balance enterprise standards with speed and flexibility for execution teams

**Leadership Competencies**

* Executive presence and the ability to influence across senior stakeholders
* Comfort operating in ambiguity and leading through transformation
* Strong people leadership with experience building and scaling platform teams
* Clear communicator who can translate complex technical systems into business outcome

  

**Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

jobs.title: Marketing Technology & Data Analytics Specialist
jobs.description:
Cohen \& Gresser (“C\&G”) seeks an experienced Marketing Technology professional to join our BD \& Marketing (“BDM”) Department. This position will own, develop, streamline, maintain, and execute on our digital marketing operations. We are a fast\-growing, elite law firm in the midst of transforming our business development efforts and are looking for a MarTech professional with at least four years of experience deploying and managing marketing and BD software, user experience, and data management needs for a professional services firm. The technology stack required in this role is broad, including extensive database development and tools, CRM and campaign tools, online content management tools, email automation tools, research and database systems, multimedia production, online analytics, and data visualization and interpretation. This position will report directly to the CMBDO and will collaborate frequently with other senior members of the BDM department, with the firm’s IT team, management leaders, attorneys, and vendors.

Key Responsibilities (including but not limited to):

*BDM systems leadership*

§ Remain at forefront of new and emerging marketing and BD technology tools

§ Conduct initial and ongoing needs analyses within the BDM department and the firm

§ Continuous evaluation of marketing and BD software options and upgrades

§ Development of marketing tech and systems workflows and best practices

§ Oversee the extensive capture, accuracy, hygiene, and reporting of all marketing and BD data, including internal and external information sources

§ Ensure ongoing data protection compliance (US and abroad)

§ Strategically explore new use cases and methods to leverage our BDM data

*Technology systems project management:*

§ Manage relationships, SOWs, contracts, and negotiations with MTS vendors

§ Manage outsourced, contract, and temp teams of data entry and related staffing

§ Oversee and lead the implementation and integration of existing and new BDM technology systems

§ Oversee project\-specific as well as ongoing updates of data models, mapping, and all other aspects of BDM systems integration with internal and external sources of data

§ Develop and lead launch strategy and tactics, roll\-outs, training, and BDM help desk

§ Oversee ongoing maintenance of all BDM tools

§ Make recommendations for and oversee system improvements, upgrades, and troubleshooting

§ Communicate proactively and clearly with all stakeholders on MTS projects

*Multimedia production:*

Tactical planning and hands\-on production at all stages for various multimedia technologies, including:

§ Podcast and video planning, set\-up, pre\- and post\-production; management of related transcripts and content; emceeing of shows; interactive audience engagement (including Q\&As, live polling, etc.)

§ Webinars of varying sizes, audiences, and formats

§ Large virtual conferences and related materials, interactivity, and audience management

§ Audio\-visual needs at external conferences and firm\-based BDM events

§ Immersive and experiential tools, including novel and emerging uses of technology for communicating and building relationships with clients and broader target audiences of the firm.

*BDM\-wide data management and integrity:*

§ Responsible for extracting and producing accurate data and reports to internal and external stakeholders

§ Maintaining excellent tracking and management of BDM content, including pitch materials and outcomes

§ Capturing, troubleshooting, organizing, and managing all BDM data assets, including image files (internally produced or externally acquired)

*Day\-to\-day, hands\-on tactical involvement:*

§ Responsible for the daily oversight and implementation of all BDM tasks, including the collection, entry and quality of data and documenting best practices for each workflow and tool

§ Must understand all aspects of each BDM tool to be able to fully handle all tasks whenever needed, provide troubleshooting, and ascertain needed improvements and immediate workarounds

§ Stay ahead of potential issues regarding BDM technology tools and BDM data access, accuracy, and freshness

§ Maintains and regularly cleans/updates CRM system.

§ Collaborates with brand \& comms and MBDs to ensure proper coding of campaigns is in system.

§ Drives execution and reporting of all email campaign efforts. (List creation and maintenance, tracking, etc.)

§ Provides monthly reporting to marketing leadership on campaign efforts, marketing sources for opportunities, and pipeline.

§ Provides monthly origination and Win/Loss/Open pursuit and pipeline reporting.

§ Compile and provide reporting and analysis on:

§ Competition

§ Trends analysis and market assessments

§ Industry, client and prospect research

· Assist practice MBDs on development of target lists.

· Ad hoc projects as appropriate and required

Qualifications and Desired Skills:

* 4\+ years of related experience in a professional services environment
* Extremely strong verbal and written communication skills
* Exceptional attention to detail
* Bachelor’s degree from a 4\-year accredited college or university
* Excellent project management skills and organizational ability
* Experience in branding, digital content development, digital marketing and advertising strategy and execution
* CMS system knowledge a plus
* Experienced in MS Dynamics and HubSpot
* Sharepoint experience a plus

· High competency with Microsoft Excel, Word and PowerPoint

Interpersonal Skills:

* Intellectually curious self\-starter
* Outstanding client service orientation and listening skills
* Ability to work independently without direct guidance on recurring assigned tasks
* Ability to multi\-task and prioritize projects with little direction
* Strong work ethic and able to work against deadlines
* Comfortable and confident in interacting with firm leadership and attorneys
* Able to represent the department and the firm in a professional and positive manner

This position is based in our New York office with a current hybrid schedule of 3 days in\-office, 2 days working remotely. This is an exempt position with an expected salary range of $95,000 \- $115,000 depending on experience. If you are interested in applying for this position, please email your resume to Rianna Williamson, Global HR Director (rwilliamson@cohengresser.com). Only those selected will be contacted.

\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-

Cohen \& Gresser is an international law firm with offices in New York, Paris, Washington, DC, London, and Dubai. We have an outstanding record of success in high\-stakes and high\-profile litigation, investigations, transactional and government relations work for our clients, including major financial institutions and companies across the world. Our attorneys have superb credentials and are committed to providing the efficiency and personal service of a boutique law firm along with the quality and attention to detail that are the hallmarks of the best firms in the world.

The firm has been recognized in a wide range of publications, including *Chambers*, *The Legal 500*, *Global Investigations Review*, *Managing IP*, *U.S. News \& World Report*’s “Best Law Firms,” *Décideurs*, and *Benchmark Litigation*. We have also been named to *The National Law Journal*’s “Midsize Hot List” and the BTI Client Service A\-Team, and over half of our U.S.\-based attorneys have been recognized by *Super Lawyers*.

*Cohen \& Gresser LLP is an equal employment opportunity (EEO) employer. We seek to hire employees based solely on qualifications and abilities. All employees and applicants receive equal employment opportunities without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, amnesty, or status as a covered veteran in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.*

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: $95,000\.00 \- $115,000\.00 per year

Work Location: Hybrid remote in New York, NY 10022

jobs.title: Marketing Technology Lead
jobs.description:
**About Flatiron School**

  

As a leader in the tech industry, Flatiron School believes that education is the best investment you can make in your future. We’re committed to helping change lives and the world for the better. Our courses provide an immersive, outcomes\-driven curriculum for students looking to launch a career in Software Engineering, Cybersecurity, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence. In addition to student programs, we also offer targeted education solutions for organizations.

 **Our Mission:** Enabling the pursuit of a better life through education

 **Our Values:**

* **Make No Little Plans** \- Build for scale, create for the future, execute short\-term goals in view of long\-term strategy
* **Radiate Positivity** \- Be kind, have fun, find what to love
* **Strive for Excellence** \- Drive results, hold yourself and each other accountable to our shared goals
* **Be a Lifelong Learner** \- Embrace a growth mindset, be curious, get comfortable with being uncomfortable
* **Work Together** \- Collaborate, embrace transparency, empower others to succeed
* **Nurture Difference** \- Seek to understand, notice who or what is missing, actively seek out different opinions, create space for other voices to be heard

 **About the role**


Flatiron School is reimagining how people discover and choose education in an AI\-native world. Rather than relying on traditional marketing funnels, **we are building intelligent systems that help prospective students navigate complex career decisions through conversation, structured knowledge, and automation.**


We’re hiring a Marketing Technology Lead to design and build the infrastructure behind this new experience. You will help transform marketing into a product — combining conversational AI, data pipelines, and automation to create a scalable decision\-support system for future students.

**This is not a campaign\-driven marketing role.** You’ll operate closer to a product or systems lead, partnering across content, admissions, and leadership teams to design systems that learn and improve over time.


If you’re excited by building from first principles, shaping how AI interacts with real people, and turning complexity into scalable systems, this role will feel at home.

 **What you'll do**

* Design and evolve AI\-driven growth infrastructure across Crisp, Webflow, Customer.io, Notion, S3, and analytics platforms.
* Architect conversational journeys that guide prospective students through exploration, qualification, and application.
* Build automation workflows and feedback loops that continuously improve system performance and user experience.
* Develop integrations between tools and data layers to reduce manual processes and increase reliability.
* Design governance models that ensure AI knowledge is accurate, trustworthy, and compliant.
* Partner with content, admissions, and leadership teams to align systems with real user needs.
* Create reporting frameworks focused on intent signals, qualification quality, and decision\-stage progression.
* Help shape the long\-term evolution of AI\-driven growth at Flatiron School.

 **Qualifications**

**Requirements:**

* Experience in systems design, product operations, growth engineering, marketing technology, RevOps, or related technical environments
* Comfortable building solutions with tools like Loveable, v0, Claude or Codex and Cursor
* Strong understanding of automation platforms, APIs, and system architecture concepts (traditional engineering background or deep coding not required, but technical fluency is essential)
* Experience working with AI\-powered workflows, conversational systems, or automation\-heavy environments
* Ability to translate ambiguous business goals into scalable system logic
* Comfort operating in fast\-moving, evolving environments where experimentation is encouraged

### **Preferred Skills:**

* Experience designing conversational AI or chatbot experiences
* Familiarity with retrieval\-based knowledge systems, semantic search, or AI governance practices
* Background in education, SaaS, or complex decision\-driven customer journeys
* Strong analytical mindset with a focus on continuous improvement and experimentation

### **Who this role is NOT for**


This role is likely not a fit for candidates focused primarily on campaign management, paid media optimization, or traditional demand generation. We’re looking for builders who think in systems, feedback loops, and infrastructure \- not channels or calendars.

 **Expected Compensation**

* $120,000 – $140,000 base salary depending on experience

 **Please note, we are only set to up hire in applicants residing in the following states:** AL, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, FL, GA, IL, IN, MD, MA, MI, MN, MO, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NY, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, WA, WI

 **The pay range for this role is:**  

120,000 \- 140,000 USD per year(Remote (United States))
