jobs.title: Principal, Business Development (MarTech Sales)
jobs.description:
**Overview**  

**How You'll Make an Impact**  

You will drive ground\-breaking growth for Epsilon by using your expertise in MarTech and AdTech solutions within the space. In this role, you'll lead sales initiatives within your geographic or account\-based territory, targeting key enterprises to generate new business and close multiple high\-value deals annually. As an inspiring leader and trusted advisor, you will cultivate enduring relationships with decision\-makers, positioning Epsilon as a strategic partner that offers innovative solutions to meet the outstanding needs of the industry.  

Your role will involve crafting and delivering customized sales presentations that address specific challenges faced by clients, highlighting how Epsilon's MarTech and AdTech solutions can drive their business objectives. By applying strategic negotiation skills and securing favorable contract terms, you will ensure mutually beneficial outcomes for both Epsilon and its clients. Staying ahead of industry trends and adapting to evolving market demands will be crucial in maintaining Epsilon's competitive edge and leadership in the MarTech and AdTech space. Your efforts will not only drive immediate sales success but also chip in to long\-term growth and valuable partnerships for Epsilon.  

  

**What You'll Achieve**  

In this role, you will achieve significant sales achievements by orchestrating business development activities within all verticals, driving substantial revenue growth for Epsilon. You will establish yourself as an industry authority in MarTech and AdTech, building strong, consultative relationships with key decision\-makers in several sectors. Your expertise will enable you to close multiple enterprise sales deals each year, directly impacting Epsilon's success and market position.  

By leading accounts effectively and delivering tailored sales presentations, you will demonstrate how Epsilon's solutions address the specific needs of clients, helping them achieve their business goals. Your adeptness in strategic negotiation and contract closure will secure favorable terms and chip into successful client relationships. Your ability to stay ahead of market trends and adapt to industry changes will ensure that Epsilon remains at the forefront of the MarTech and AdTech landscape, driving long\-term growth and partnership opportunities.  

  

**Who You Are**
  

* **What you'll bring with you** :
* + Educational Background: A bachelor's degree in marketing, business, or a related field is required. An advanced degree (MBA or equivalent) is preferred.
	+ Professional Experience: Minimum of 7\-10\+ years of experience in sales roles, with substantial exposure to new business development/new logo sales.
	+ Seasoned Sales Professional: Proven track record of driving revenue growth and establishing yourself as a leader in MarTech and AdTech, particularly within the space.
	+ Experienced in Territory Management: Extensive experience leading geographic or account\-based territories, with a demonstrated ability to generate new business and close enterprise level sales.
	+ Encouraging Leader and Trusted Consultant: Expertise in MarTech / AdTech allows you to build strong, lasting relationships with key decision\-makers and position Epsilon as a strategic partner.
	+ Skilled in Tailored Sales Presentations: Ability to build and deliver presentations that address the outstanding challenges and needs of clients, optimally showcasing the benefits of Epsilon's solutions.
	+ Strategic Negotiator: Proficient in negotiation and contract closure, ensuring the outcomes that are advantageous for both Epsilon and its clients.
	+ Adaptable and Forward\-Thinking: Keeps ahead of industry trends and adapts strategies to maintain Epsilon's leadership position in the MarTech / AdTech market.
	+ Dynamic and Committed: Driven to achieve immediate sales success while chipping in to Epsilon's long\-term growth and partnership goals.
* **Why you might stand out from other talent** :
* + Validated Revenue Growth: Known to work in driving substantial revenue growth in the MarTech / AdTech space.
	+ Extensive Territory Management Experience: Exceptional ability to lead both geographic and account\-based territories, with a history of generating new business and closing high\-value deals.
	+ Leadership: Recognized as a team leader in and out of a player coach role and trusted leader in MarTech / AdTech, with strong relationships and influence among all decision\-makers.
	+ Customized Sales Approach: Expertise in crafting and delivering tailored sales presentations that address the specific needs of clients, highlighting the value of Epsilon's solutions.
	+ Industry Insight and Adaptability: Keeps pace with industry trends and adapts to changes, ensuring Epsilon's competitive edge in the MarTech/AdTech markets with a specialty in enterprise sales.
	+ Commitment to Excellence: A dynamic, committed approach that drives immediate sales success and supports Epsilon's long\-term growth and partnership objectives, making you a valuable asset to the team.

  

Click here to view how Epsilon transforms marketing with 1 View, 1 Vision, 1 Voice.
  

  

Base Salary: $120,000 \- $180,000  

  

In addition to base salary, this role may be bonus or incentive compensation eligible. Actual compensation within the range will be dependent upon, but not limited to the individual's skills, experience, qualifications, location and application employment laws. The salary pay range is subject to change and may be modified at any time.  

  

This posting expires 3/24/2026\.  

  

**Additional Information**  

**When You Join Us, We'll Create Something EPIC Together**
  

Epsilon is a global data, technology and services company that powers the marketing and advertising ecosystem. For decades, we've provided marketers from the world's leading brands the data, technology and services they need to engage consumers with 1 View, 1 Vision and 1 Voice. 1 View of their universe of potential buyers. 1 Vision for engaging each individual. And 1 Voice to harmonize engagement across paid, owned and earned channels.
  

  

Epsilon's comprehensive portfolio of capabilities across our suite of digital media, messaging and loyalty solutions bridge the divide between marketing and advertising technology. We process 400\+ billion consumer actions each day using sophisticated AI and hold many patents of proprietary technology, including real\-time modeling languages and consumer privacy advancements. Thanks to the work of every employee, Epsilon has been consistently recognized as industry\-leading by Forrester, Adweek and the MRC. Epsilon is a global company with more than 9,000 employees around the world.
  

  

Our pillars aren't just words. They're how we show up every day.  

* **People centricity:** We focus on employee well\-being in an environment where colleagues truly care about each other.
* **Collaboration:** We work together, support one another, and collectively achieve goals.
* **Growth:** There are endless opportunities for growth through learning, development and career advancement.
* **Innovation:** We drive progress through modern solutions and forward\-thinking approaches.
* **Flexibility:** We've created a balance between work and personal life, and we encourage adaptability to solve problems creatively.

  

Our values guide us to bring value for our clients, our people and consumers.  

* Act with integrity
* Work together to win together
* Innovate with purpose
* Respect all voices
* Empower with accountability

  

These pillars and values are our foundation\-shaping our culture, guiding our decisions, and uniting us in common purpose.  

  

**Because You Matter**  

As an Epsilon employee, you deserve perks and benefits that put you, your family and your finances first. Our benefits encompass a wide range of offerings, including but not limited to the following:
  

* **Time to Recharge:** Flexible time off (FTO), 15 paid holidays
* **Time to Recover:** Paid sick time
* **Family Well\-Being:** Parental/new child leave, childcare \& elder care assistance, adoption assistance
* **Extra Perks:** Comprehensive health coverage, 401(k), tuition assistance, commuter benefits, professional development, employee recognition, charitable donation matching, health coaching and counseling

  

Epsilon benefits are subject to eligibility requirements and other terms.
  

  

**Epsilon is an Equal Opportunity Employer.** Epsilon's policy is not to discriminate against any applicant or employee based on actual or perceived race, age, sex or gender (including pregnancy), marital status, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, mental or physical disability, religion, creed, color, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression (including transgender status), veteran status, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state or local law. Epsilon also prohibits harassment of applicants and employees based on any of these protected categories. Epsilon will provide accommodations to applicants needing accommodations to complete the application process. Please reach out to LeaveofAbsence@epsilon.com to request an accommodation.
  

  

**For San Francisco Bay and Los Angeles Areas:** Epsilon will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with the City of Los Angeles' Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance and San Francisco Police Code Sections 4901\-4919, commonly referred to as the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance. Applicants with criminal histories are welcome to apply.
  

  

\#LI\-ML1

jobs.title: Analyst, Marketing Analytics
jobs.description:
About Invesco
As one of the world’s leading independent global investment firms, Invesco is dedicated to rethinking possibilities for our clients. By delivering the combined power of our distinctive investment management capabilities, we provide a wide range of investment strategies and vehicles to our clients around the world. If you're looking for challenging work, intelligent colleagues, and exposure across a global footprint, come explore your potential at Invesco.
What’s in it for you?
Our people are at the very core of our success. Invesco employees get more out of life through our comprehensive compensation and benefit offerings including:* Flexible paid time off
* Hybrid work schedule
* 401(K) matching of 100% up to the first 6% with a discretionary supplemental contribution
* Health \& wellbeing benefits
* Parental Leave benefits
* Employee stock purchase plan

Job Description
The role:  

Distribution Intelligence is responsible for increasing data driven decision making at Invesco. The group works mostly with EMEA and Americas Distribution and Marketing teams to help increase net sales through a better understanding of our clients (financial advisors). It works like a small startup within the organization, with a clear focus on improving effectiveness and efficiency through end\-to\-end management of data, analytics, visualization, and in\-field implementation. While the team is not new, there is a distinct focus on restructuring the talent through training and recruiting as well as redefining the vision and engagement model with the rest of the organization. In short, it’s an exciting place to be at for self\-starters who want to set and own their paths forward.  

Responsibilities of the role:* Collaborate with marketing partners and digital team to define and develop differentiating go to market analytics features and frameworks
* Conduct deep\-dive analyses to uncover business insights related to customer behavior, campaign performance, channel attribution, and audience segmentation.
* Build, maintain, and scale measurement dashboards and recurring performance reports across digital and marketing channels (e.g., paid media, email, social, web).
* Translate analytical findings into clear recommendations and narratives for both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Work with ambiguity (e.g. imperfect data, loosely defined concepts, ideas, or goals) and translating these into tangible outputs.
* Exhibit problem\-solving skills and the ability to work well in a team environment, prioritize work, analyze interdependencies, and deliver against deadlines.

  

Requirements of the role:* 1–2 years of experience in marketing analytics, business intelligence, or a related data role
* Strong knowledge of data management tools (Alteryx, Google Cloud Platform, Medallia)
* Proficiency in SQL for querying and analyzing large datasets.
* Hands\-on experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Looker, or Power BI.
* Experience with marketing analytics platforms such as Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics, or similar tools.
* Familiarity with digital marketing channels and associated metrics (e.g., CTR, CPC, ROAS, conversion rate).
* Intellectual curiosity, along with problem\-solving and quantitative skills, including the ability to disaggregate issues, identify root causes and recommend solutions.
* Strong analytical thinking with an ability to structure ambiguous problems and develop clear insights.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with experience presenting data to non\-technical audiences.

  

The salary range for this position is $70,000 to $76,000/ year. The total compensation offered for this position includes salary and incentive pay and will vary based on skills, experience and location.
Full Time / Part Time
Full time
Worker Type
Employee
Job Exempt (Yes / No)
No
Workplace Model
Pursuant to Invesco’s Workplace Policy, employees are expected to comply with the firm’s most current workplace model, which as of October 1, 2025, includes spending at least four full days each week working in an Invesco office. This reflects our belief that spending time together in the office helps us build stronger relationships, collaborate more easily, and support each other’s growth and development.
The above information on this description has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this role. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities and qualifications required of employees assigned to this job. The job holder may be required to perform other duties as deemed appropriate by their manager from time to time.
Invesco's culture of inclusivity and its commitment to diversity in the workplace are demonstrated through our people practices. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, creed, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, marital status, national origin, citizenship status, disability, age, or veteran status. Our equal opportunity employment efforts comply with all applicable U.S. state and federal laws governing non\-discrimination in employment.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations & Strategy Manager
jobs.description:
**Join the Team at Samuels Seafood Co.**
----------------------------------------

### **Marketing Operations \& Strategy Manager – Retail Division**


At **Samuels Seafood Co.**, we don’t just move seafood — we move markets. As a leader in premium, sustainable seafood distribution, we are seeking a **Marketing Operations \& Strategy Manager** to bring structure, precision, and strategic clarity to our Retail Division.


This is not a purely creative role. This is the architect behind the strategy. The builder of systems. The operator who ensures vision becomes measurable performance.

**The Mission**
---------------


You will design, structure, and oversee the execution of comprehensive marketing strategies that align directly with company business objectives. You’ll build frameworks, enforce brand consistency, analyze performance, and create operational excellence — while collaborating closely with our Creative Brand Manager to bring strategy and creativity together seamlessly.

**What You’ll Lead**
--------------------

### **Strategic Direction \& Planning**

* Draft and execute overall marketing strategies and annual plans for the Retail Division
* Define target audiences, positioning, and channel objectives
* Translate company goals into measurable marketing initiatives
* Ensure alignment between marketing, sales, operations, product, leadership, and finance

### **Research \& Insight**

* Lead market research and competitive analysis
* Identify consumer trends and customer insights
* Transform data into actionable strategy
* Share findings to inform creative concepts and campaigns

### **Campaign Architecture \& Performance**

* Plan and manage multi\-channel campaigns from concept through ROI reporting
* Own project timelines, budgets, tracking systems, and optimization processes
* Build dashboards and performance measurement frameworks
* Oversee lifecycle management and strategic refinement

### **Brand Governance**

* Develop and own brand guidelines and SOPs
* Conduct QA reviews to ensure brand consistency across all outputs
* Protect and elevate the company’s public\-facing image
* Implement systems to enforce brand standards company\-wide

### **Operational Execution \& Logistics**

* Coordinate promotional events, product launches, and go\-to\-market activities
* Manage vendor coordination and distribution to retail locations
* Oversee website and CMS updates, backups, and content implementation
* Coordinate internal marketing operations (signage, intranet, internal communications)

### **Leadership \& Cross\-Functional Alignment**

* Serve as the primary marketing liaison to all departments
* Build processes that drive collaboration and accountability
* Mentor team members (including the Creative Brand Manager)
* Conduct performance reviews, delegate tasks, and track progress
* Foster a culture of structured excellence and measurable success

### **Editorial \& Content Leadership**

* Assist in writing compelling copy and shaping brand voice
* Conduct interviews and write features for FT publication
* Design, layout, and manage the **Florida Fish Tales** edition exclusively
* Guide development of marketing materials including video, ads, and web content

**Who You Are**
---------------

* A strategic thinker with operational precision
* Highly organized and systems\-oriented
* Comfortable leading both strategy discussions and execution logistics
* Analytical, data\-driven, and performance\-focused
* A collaborative leader who aligns teams around measurable goals
* Capable of blending structure with storytelling


You thrive at the intersection of **strategy, systems, logistics, and brand stewardship**.

**What Success Looks Like**
---------------------------

* Marketing initiatives directly tied to revenue and growth goals
* Clear tracking and performance measurement across campaigns
* Strong cross\-departmental alignment

jobs.title: Sr. Director, Web, Marketing Technology & Analytics
jobs.description:
**Your Role:**


You will lead the strategy, development, and optimization of CEA CAPA’s unified digital ecosystem — spanning web, ecommerce, marketing technology, and analytics. Reporting to the Chief Marketing Officer, the Senior Director of Web, Marketing Technology \& Analytics plays a critical leadership role in shaping how students and institutional partners engage with CEA CAPA across every digital touchpoint.


This transformation\-focused role will consolidate seven legacy websites into a single scalable platform, modernize ecommerce capabilities, strengthen Salesforce and marketing automation integrations, and build the analytics foundation that drives measurable growth. You will translate business strategy into digital systems, align cross\-functional stakeholders, and deliver performance improvements across the enrollment funnel.

 **What You’ll Do:**

**Lead Web \& Ecommerce Transformation**

* Lead the strategy and delivery of a unified web and ecommerce platform, consolidating seven legacy sites into a scalable, high\-performing digital experience.
* Define business requirements in partnership with Marketing, Enrollment, Institutional Relations, Product, and Operations.
* Establish UX/CX principles that improve discoverability, engagement, application conversion, and partner usability.
* Oversee platform selection, governance, and implementation partners.
* Ensure ecommerce capabilities support application flows and transactional needs, while driving long\-term roadmap execution and continuous optimization post\-launch.

**Oversee Partner \& Student Portals**

* Define and lead the strategy and roadmap for partner and student portals, ensuring they meet institutional needs and support student readiness.
* Integrate portals seamlessly with Salesforce and marketing platforms to optimize communication workflows and operational efficiency.
* Continuously monitor performance, usability, and adoption, driving improvements that enhance both institutional and student experience.

**Own Marketing Technology \& Systems Integration**

* Lead CEA CAPA’s marketing technology ecosystem, ensuring seamless integration across web, ecommerce, Salesforce, marketing automation, and analytics systems.
* Partner with Lifecycle Marketing to optimize automation, segmentation, personalization, and AI\-enabled engagement.
* Establish martech governance, data flows, and scalable processes, while evaluating enhancements and new technologies to support organizational growth.

**Drive Data, Analytics \& Optimization**

* Define and own marketing analytics strategy across web, demand generation, lifecycle marketing, and partner enablement.
* Partner with Omni Channel Marketing teams to develop dashboards and executive reporting that inform strategic decisions.
* Establish KPIs for web, ecommerce, and marketing channels tied to conversion, engagement, and enrollment outcomes.
* Ensure clean data flows, reliable reporting, and continuous optimization through experimentation, A/B testing, and UX improvements.

**Lead \& Align Cross\-Functionally**

* Lead and develop a high\-performing team across web, analytics, and marketing technology.
* Act as a strategic bridge across Marketing, IT, Enrollment, Operations, and external partners, establishing clear operating rhythms.
* Manage vendors, agencies, and budgets to ensure disciplined investment aligned with business priorities.

 **Base Salary: $165,000\-$185,000**

*This position is eligible for remote work within the continental United States or based out of our Phoenix, AZ office.*

 **What Makes a Great Candidate:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Information Systems, or related field.
* 10\+ years of progressive experience leading web strategy, digital transformation, or marketing technology initiatives.
* Proven experience building or significantly redesigning large\-scale web and ecommerce platforms.
* Strong understanding of UX/CX principles and digital journey design.
* Experience integrating web platforms with Salesforce and marketing automation systems.
* Demonstrated ability to translate business requirements into technical execution.
* Experience leading cross\-functional transformation initiatives.

**What Sets You Apart:**

* Experience consolidating multiple websites or brands into a unified platform.
* Experience in higher education, nonprofit, or mission\-driven organizations.
* Familiarity with AI\-enabled personalization and automation tools.
* Experience managing enterprise\-level martech ecosystems.
* Experience operating in growth\-oriented or PE\-backed environments

*We believe great talent comes in many forms and that there is no one size fits all in hiring. If you feel you may be a great fit for this role but do not check all of the boxes, we encourage you to apply and show us why you're the right candidate for this position.*

 **Who We Are:**


CEA CAPA is a premier provider of transformative international education experiences, committed to empowering students to become thoughtful and thriving leaders through living and learning abroad. With a presence in 62 cities across 22 countries in Europe, Latin America, Asia, and Australia, we offer comprehensive study abroad and career readiness programs that integrate academic excellence and cultural immersion. Our global footprint includes 11 international study centers, and we proudly support over 10,000 students annually in partnership with more than 375 U.S. universities and over 50 international institutions. CEA CAPA is in a dynamic phase of growth and is powered by a global team of nearly 700 professionals who are deeply mission\-driven and committed to creating inclusive, supportive and enriching environments that help students grow academically, personally and professionally.  



**Why You’ll Love CEA CAPA:**

* **Wellness \& Snacks (In\-Office):** Fresh Fruit Wednesdays, coffee bar, wellness room, andergonomic workspaces.
* **Time Off \& Giving Back:** 12 paid holidays, generous PTO, and up to 8 hours paid volunteer time—because balance matters.
* **Support for Your Whole Life:** Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage, benefits for domestic partners, paid parental leave, and compassionate time off for life events—because caring for your loved ones matters.
* **Fun \& Community:** We encourage team connection and celebration, from office events to informal get\-togethers and virtual hangouts—exact activities vary by team.

*Our commitment to creating a sense of belonging means we welcome individuals of all abilities, ages, citizenships, educations, ethnicities, family statuses, gender identities, genders, genetic information, languages, marital status, military experiences, political views, pregnancy, races, religions, sexes, sexual orientations, socioeconomic statuses, and work experiences and therefore we encourage applicants from diverse lived experiences to apply.*

jobs.title: AI Content & Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.description:
**AI Content \& Marketing Operations Manager**


Location: Remote

**At JPW Industries, we don’t just build products – we build careers.**


At JPW Industries, we are redefining excellence in industrial tools and machinery. With industry shaping brands like Jet, Powermatic, Wilton, Edwards, Baileigh and Axiom, we lead the way in delivering high quality solutions to professionals worldwide. Join us and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our products and industry.

**What You Will Do: Innovate. Scale. Elevate.**


Ready to lead the future of AI powered marketing? JPW Industries is looking for a bold, forward\-thinking leader to transform how content is created, scaled, governed, and delivered across our portfolio of brands. This is not just a marketing role. It is a systems leadership role at the intersection of creativity, technology, and operational excellence.


As the AI Content and Marketing Operations Manager, you will design and operationalize AI enabled content systems that increase velocity, strengthen governance, and improve consistency across all JPW brands. Reporting to the Digital Marketing Director, you will serve as the AI enablement lead within Marketing, building scalable workflows while personally contributing to high quality, compelling content that resonates with professional and industrial audiences.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design and operate AI assisted content production systems for product detail pages, category pages, blogs, marketplace listings, promotions, product launches and campaign initiatives.
* Translate brand positioning into structured AI prompt frameworks that reflect tone, persona, and messaging priorities.
* Continuously refine AI workflows based on feedback, performance data, and evolving marketing strategy.
* Reduce manual effort, revision cycles, and content production bottlenecks.
* Ensure AI generated content aligns with brand voice, SEO standards, and quality expectations.
* Develop governance frameworks, review processes, and quality control standards for AI assisted outputs.
* Own and optimize the Digital Asset Management platform, Bynder, including metadata, taxonomy, tagging, and lifecycle governance.
* Improve asset discoverability and drive DAM adoption as the single source of truth.
* Map and improve end to end digital content workflows across Marketing.
* Identify automation opportunities and streamline marketing operations.
* Create SOPs and scalable documentation to support operational consistency.
* Track and report on KPIs including production velocity, revision rates, and system adoption.
* Partner cross functionally with Brand, Digital, and IT teams to ensure alignment within enterprise AI and technology governance framework.

**What You Will Bring: Vision. Discipline. Execution.**


You are AI fluent, operationally disciplined, and creatively sharp. You understand how to turn emerging technology into practical, scalable marketing systems. You are equally comfortable building governance frameworks and crafting compelling content. You bring clarity to complexity and thrive in environments that demand both innovation and accountability.


Qualifications and Experience:

* 5 or more years of experience in marketing operations, digital content systems, or marketing technology.
* Hands on experience with AI assisted content tools and workflow design.
* Strong understanding of structured content frameworks and content lifecycle management.
* Experience managing or administering a Digital Asset Management system.
* Demonstrated ability to design scalable processes and operational systems.
* Solid understanding of SEO fundamentals at the execution levels.
* Strong working knowledge of metadata, taxonomy, and structured data.
* Proven ability to influence across functional stakeholders across Marketing and IT.
* Experience supporting multiple brands or complex product portfolios preferred.

**Why JPW Industries? Lead. Transform. Grow.**


At JPW Industries, you will have the opportunity to shape how modern marketing operates at scale. You will help define how AI responsibly accelerates strategy while upholding brand integrity, governance standards, and customer focus. We are committed to empowering leaders who act with integrity, drive accountable execution, and contribute to a One Team culture.


We are more than just a workplace – we are a community of innovators, problem\-solvers, and game\-changers. Here’s what we offer:

* Competitive Pay \+ Annual Bonuses
* Comprehensive Benefits: Medical, dental, vision, life insurance, disability, telehealth, and more from Day 1
* Retirement Plans \& Employer Contributions
* Generous PTO \+ Paid Holidays
* Career Development \& Learning Opportunities
* Team Member Appreciation Events
* A Culture That Values Integrity, Teamwork \& Innovation

**At JPW Industries...we don’t just build products – we build careers!**

**Be Part of Something Bigger. Apply** **Today****.**


JPW Industries is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, protected veteran status, or other protected status.

jobs.title: Director, Marketing Operations
jobs.description:
Filevine is a Legal AI company delivering Legal Operating Intelligence for the future of legal work. Grounded in a singular system of truth, Filevine brings together data, documents, workflows, and teams into one unified platform—where modern legal work happens with clarity and consistency.  

Powered by **LOIS**, the Legal Operating Intelligence System, Filevine connects context across every matter to transform legal operations from reactive to proactive. LOIS reads, understands, and reasons across your data to surface insight, automate complexity, and give professionals the clarity and confidence to see more, know more, and do more. Fueled by a team of exceptional collaborators and innovators, Filevine’s rapid growth has earned AI awards and recognition from Deloitte and Inc. as one of the most innovative and fastest\-growing technology companies in the country.  

Our Mission
Filevine is building the seamless intersection between **legal and business** by creating a world\-class **AI\-powered Legal Operating Intelligence System** that helps legal teams scale with clarity and confidence.  

Job Summary
Filevine is seeking a **Director of Marketing Operations** to own and scale the operational foundation that powers our go\-to\-market engine across **Performance Marketing, Lifecycle, Partnerships, SDR Teams and Events**. This role reports to the **VP of Performance Marketing \& Operations** and is responsible for marketing systems, data integrity, process design, attribution, lifecycle management, and event enablement across the full revenue funnel. As we scale our **Legal AI and LOIS** offerings, this role ensures demand flows cleanly, predictably, and measurably from first touch through revenue.
### **What You'll Do**

* Own end\-to\-end marketing operations strategy supporting Filevine’s Legal AI and LOIS go\-to\-market
* Design scalable processes aligning Performance Marketing, Lifecycle, Partnerships, SDR Teams and Events around shared definitions and outcomes
* Serve as the operational backbone for all marketing departmentsOwn and optimize the marketing and revenue tech stack including HubSpot, Salesforce, Workato, LeanData, Domo, and ClickUpDefine and maintain lead lifecycle stages, scoring models, routing logic, and automation
* Partner with SDR and Sales Ops to ensure speed\-to\-lead, data accuracy, and accountability
* Own marketing data governance, attribution, and pipeline reporting in partnership with BI
* Own operational support for **250\+ marketing events annually**, including list uploads, segmentation, deduplication, enrichment, and compliance
* Ensure proper campaign structure, attribution, and post\-event follow\-up workflows
* Maintain and establish standards for campaign setup, tracking, naming conventions, UTMs, and documentationIdentify and remove operational bottlenecks across the marketing funnel
* Collaborate closely with various internal teams, including Performance Marketing, Events, Lifecycle, Partnerships, Sales, Sales \& Customer Ops, Product, and Business Intelligence (BI)
* Lead and develop the Marketing Operations team, setting priorities and operating rhythms
* Own marketing operations tools budget and vendor management

### **Requirements**

* 7\+ years of experience in Marketing Operations or Revenue Operations, preferably in B2B SaaS
* Deep hands\-on expertise in **HubSpot and Salesforce**, including complex workflows and reportingExperience supporting large\-scale event programs and high\-volume list uploads
* Working knowledge of **Workato, LeanData, Domo, and ClickUp** or similar systems
* Strong systems thinking, data rigor, and cross\-functional leadership skills
* Action\-oriented self\-starter with a track record of building scalable operational foundations
* Ability to work cross\-functionally with sales, product, and analytics teams to align marketing efforts with business goals
* Action oriented self starter confident in finding resources and removing barriers to ensure successExceptional analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills
* Excellent communication, leadership, and team management abilities.
* In\-office requirement in our Salt Lake City or Chicago offices

*Compensation Information: $145,000\- $195,000*  

*The base salary range represents the low and high end of the salary range for this position. The total compensation package for this position will be determined by each individual’s location, qualifications, education, work experience, skills and performance. We believe in the importance of pay equity \- the range listed is just one component of Filevine’s total compensation package for employees. This position is also eligible for a paid time off policy, as well as a comprehensive benefits package.*  

Filevine is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualifications for employment, promotion and other terms and conditions of employment are based upon the ability to perform the job. Equal\-employment opportunities are provided to all applicants and employees without regard to race, creed, religion, color, age, national origin, sex, disability, veteran status, or other legally protected class. Filevine is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you need assistance or accommodation due to disability, or if you have concerns related to Filevine’s equal employment opportunities, you may contact us at legal@filevine.com **Cool Company Benefits:*** A dynamic, rapidly growing company, focused on helping organizations thrive
* Medical, Dental, \& Vision Insurance (for full\-time employees)
* Competitive \& Fair Pay
* Maternity \& paternity leave (for full\-time employees)
* Short \& long\-term disability
* Opportunity to learn from a dedicated leadership team
* Top\-of\-the\-line company swag

 **Privacy Policy Notice**
Filevine will handle your personal information according to what’s outlined in our Privacy Policy.  

Communication about this opportunity, or any open role at Filevine, will *only* come from representatives with email addresses using "filevine.com". Other addresses reaching out are *not affiliated* with Filevine and should not be responded to.
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

jobs.title: Vice President, Marketing Technology & Digital Marketing
jobs.description:
Built on meritocracy, our unique company culture rewards self\-starters and those who are committed to doing what is best for our customers.
Brown \& Brown is seeking a Vice President, Marketing Technology \& Digital Marketing to join our team!
The Vice President, Marketing Technology \& Digital Marketing will lead our full\-funnel MarTech roadmap and digital marketing efforts. This role is essential for bringing our future digital customer experience to life, evolving our approach to marketing automation and creating a connected ecosystem across the customer journey. The role will apply a blend of creative thinking, analytical processes and change management experience to meaningfully expand our digital marketing capabilities while optimizing performance to improve business outcomes. Experience leading a full\-funnel digital marketing capability with an omnichannel approach is critical for success in the role.
How You Will Contribute:* Own enterprise digital marketing and MarTech as a primary growth engine, directly accountable for pipeline acceleration, revenue impact, and organic growth.
* Convert executive growth priorities into aggressive, multi\-year digital and MarTech roadmaps, tightly sequenced to unlock scale, speed, and measurable sales impact.
* Allocate investment across paid, owned, and earned channels to maximize ROI, with clear performance targets for SEO, PPC, demand generation, and conversion.
* Optimize high\-impact digital channels and platforms (website, portals, email, apps) to drive acquisition, cross\-sell, and producer productivity across the customer lifecycle.
* Integrate lead generation, routing, CRM, and campaign execution to increase sales velocity, improve win rates, and eliminate leakage across the funnel.
* Enforce governance, standards, and performance KPIs tied to pipeline contribution, sales\-qualified leads, conversion rates, and revenue outcomes.
* Continuously deploy emerging technologies and automation to scale growth, improve forecasting accuracy, and create a durable competitive advantage.


Skills \& Experience to Be Successful:* Bachelor’s degree in marketing, information technology or a related field; advanced degree preferred.
* Minimum of 10 years of experience in digital marketing transformation and marketing technology.
* Exceptional analytical skills and attention to detail.
* Experience building and scaling cross\-functional programs from concept to completion.
* Experience with Dynamics 365, Power BI, Google Analytics, App Insights, various website platforms, content management systems, SEO, SEM and attribution models is preferred.


Pay Range
$165,000 \- $180,000 Annual*The pay range provided above is made in good faith and based on our lowest and highest annual salary or hourly* *rate paid for the role and takes into account years of experience required, geography, and/or budget for the role.*
Teammate Benefits \& Total Well\-Being
We go beyond standard benefits, focusing on the total well\-being of our teammates, including:* *Health Benefits*: Medical/Rx, Dental, Vision, Life Insurance, Disability Insurance
* *Financial Benefits*: ESPP; 401k; Student Loan Assistance; Tuition Reimbursement
* *Mental Health \& Wellness*: Free Mental Health \& Enhanced Advocacy Services
* *Beyond Benefits*: Paid Time Off, Holidays, Preferred Partner Discounts and more.

*Not reflective of all benefits. Enrollment waiting periods or eligibility criteria may apply to certain benefits. Benefit details and offerings may vary for subsidiary entities or in specific geographic locations.*
The Power To Be Yourself
As an Equal Opportunity Employer, we are committed to fostering an inclusive environment comprised of people from all backgrounds, with a variety of experiences and perspectives, guided by our Diversity, Inclusion \& Belonging (DIB) motto, “The Power to Be Yourself”.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Specialist
jobs.description:
Kidder Mathews has been a leader in the commercial real estate industry for nearly 60 years, fostering an innovative and dynamic work culture with more than 100 "best workplace" awards. Now the largest fully independent commercial real estate firm in the Western U.S., Kidder Mathews has over 900 professionals across 19 offices in Washington, Oregon, California, Nevada, and Arizona. We offer a complete range of brokerage, appraisal, asset services, consulting, and debt \& equity finance services for all property types. The firm averages $9 billion in transaction volume, manages more than 54 million square feet of space, and conducts 2,700 appraisal, consulting, and cost segregation assignments annually.
  
  

IF YOU LOVE STRUCTURE, SYSTEMS, AND SCALE — THIS IS YOUR ROLE.
  
  

You’re not just organized. You’re operationally wired.
  
You see inefficiencies and think, there’s a better way.
  
  

You care about brand consistency—but also about infrastructure.
  
You understand that marketing isn’t just creative—it’s execution.
  
  

If that resonates, keep reading.
  
  

About the Role
  
  

**Job Title:** Marketing Operations Specialist
  
**Location:** Seattle, WA (hybrid)
  
**Department:** Corporate Marketing
  
**Reports to:** Vice President of Corporate Marketing
  
  

ROLE SUMMARY
  
  

The Marketing Operations Specialist is a key member of the Corporate Marketing team and supports firmwide marketing programs across the organization.
  
  

This role focuses on execution and optimization of marketing infrastructure, corporate communications, digital presence, and strategic marketing initiatives.
  
  

You will partner closely with senior leadership and internal stakeholders to ensure marketing platforms, communications, and materials remain accurate, aligned, and consistent with Kidder Mathews brand standards.
  
  

This position is based at our headquarters in downtown Seattle and will require full\-time, in\-office presence (five days per week) during the first three months to support onboarding and ramp\-up. Following that period, the role will transition to a hybrid schedule.
  
  

WHAT YOU’LL OWN
  
  

Corporate Communications Support \& Brand Alignment
  
* Manage and maintain corporate capabilities brochures and collateral across divisions and specialty groups, ensuring alignment with Corporate Marketing messaging and brand standards
* Lead development and distribution of corporate eblasts, including company wins and institutional communications
* Manage top producer brokerage eblast processes, timelines, and content coordination
* Support divisions (Research, Valuation Advisory Services, Asset Services, Brokerage) with marketing and presentation materials, including market report production, presentation decks, and thought leadership collateral
* Assist with layout, formatting, and brand alignment of presentations for conferences, client events, and industry events
* Support Corporate Marketing advertising and thought leadership initiatives
* Lead coordination of corporate signage requests across all offices, partnering with marketing leadership and Design Team on custom or non\-standard requests


Digital \& SEO Strategy
  
* Conduct and lead competitive research to inform website content strategy and specialty group marketing initiatives
* Support and help drive SEO/GEO initiatives through content optimization and implementation on kidder.com
* Manage office citation updates and business listings to strengthen search engine optimization and digital presence
* Oversee accuracy and maintenance of Google Business office listings and corporate profile information


Infrastructure \& Systems
  
* Support and help drive intranet content review and updates, ensuring readiness for platform enhancements and restructuring while supporting the ongoing evolution of the site
* Manage coordination of Kidder U webinar setup and internal training logistics including branding, communications, and scheduling
* Assist in evaluation and coordination of Corporate Marketing vendors
* Manage corporate memberships and dues administration


Executive Support \& Reporting
  
* Assist in developing and formatting Shareholder and Board presentation materials
* Help prepare, review, and finalize Board minutes and documentation
* Process expense reports, reconcile credit card statements, and assist with financial reporting
* Perform other duties or projects as assigned


ESSENTIAL QUALIFICATIONS
  
  

To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the competencies (minimum knowledge, skill, and ability) required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.
  
  

REQUIRED KNOWLEDGE \& EXPERIENCE
  
  

* 5\+ years of experience in commercial real estate required
* 5\+ years of experience in marketing operations, corporate marketing, or related field required
* Experience supporting marketing systems, digital platforms, and corporate communications initiatives required
* Experience coordinating marketing collateral, content distribution, or brand governance preferred
* Working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite programs (especially InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator) preferred
* Familiarity with project management software, such as Smartsheet, preferred
* Familiarity with SEO/GEO, content distribution, and corporate communications workflows preferred


SKILLS AND ABILITIES
  
* Demonstrated ability to multitask and execute within a deadline\-oriented environment
* Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy
* Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Excel), including data organization
* Ability to quickly learn proprietary software and systems
* High\-level grammatical, oral, and written communication skills
* Ability to handle multiple projects concurrently
* Customer\-service oriented with a keen ability to build relationships with brokers, employees, leadership, and clients
* Demonstrated high level of initiative and strong troubleshooting skills
* Ability to translate brand standards into consistent execution across various forms of media
* Ability to think strategically regarding marketing initiatives and goals based on past performance and market context
* Must maintain professional image and demeanor


EDUCATION/CERTIFICATION
  
Bachelor’s degree preferred in marketing, graphic design, or related field or equivalent combination of education and experience
  
  

WORK ENVIRONMENT
  
  

This is a standard office environment with typical noise such as talking, copier/printer equipment, etc.
  
  

PHYSICAL DEMANDS
  
  

While performing the duties of this job, the employee is regularly required to talk and hear. This position is often active and may require standing, walking, bending, kneeling, stooping and crouching. The employee must sometimes lift and/or move items up to 10 pounds. The employee must frequently sit and use a computer for long periods of time. Specific vision abilities are required to do this job including close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth vision, color vision and the ability to adjust focus.
  
  

What We Offer
  
  

* A voice on a corporate marketing team that helps shape the direction of a growing, employee\-owned company
* A seat at the table—your ideas matter here
* A collaborative environment alongside tenured, creative professionals who value excellence and teamwork
* Opportunities to grow your skill set while contributing to meaningful, visible work
* A thriving downtown Seattle office located next to public transit in one of the city’s most beautiful towers
* Competitive benefits and compensation


Kidder Mathews is an equal opportunity employer does not discriminate based on race/ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other status protected by law. Kidder Mathews will accommodate candidates with disabilities to complete this application. Please contact recruiting@kiddermathews.com if you need an accommodation. AZ, NV, OR \& WA residents: We Participate in E\-Verify.CA residents: We collect various personal data from employees and applicants for purposes related to employment. Please review the Notice of Data Privacy for Employees and Applicants for detailed information concerning what information we collect, the purposes for which information is collected and with whom such information may be shared. You can find this notice on our careers page at https://kidder.com/careers/. Qualified individuals with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the Los Angeles and San Diego County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers and the California Fair Chance Act.

jobs.title: Manager, Email & Marketing Automation
jobs.description:
**Manager, Email \& Marketing Automation**


Full\-Time Exempt\-Salaried Remote

  

Are you ready to transform your career into a powerful catalyst for change? For almost 30 years, ZERO Prostate Cancer (ZERO) has been at the forefront of the battle against prostate cancer, providing essential support to patients and families touched by this disease. ZERO is the nation’s leading prostate cancer organization and the number one provider of prostate cancer resources, programs, and services. We are on a mission to improve and save lives from prostate cancer through advocacy, awareness, education, and support.


Consistently recognized as one of the Best Nonprofits to Work for by the Nonprofit Times, we take pride in our unwavering commitment to our team and community. Our culture is founded on the principles of growth, inclusivity, and camaraderie, which we uphold with passion and purpose. Our vision is a world where prostate cancer detection is early, support is unwavering, and care is accessible to all. When you join ZERO, you become part of an extraordinary community with strong core values: Courage, Ambition, Inclusion, Empathy, and Integrity– where each individual motivates and inspires one another, advancing your career while making a meaningful impact in the fight against prostate cancer. Seize this opportunity to be more than just an employee—become an essential part of a movement that truly matters!

 **Job Summary:**


The Email \& Marketing Automation Manager leads the day\-to\-day execution of the organization’s email marketing and marketing automation initiatives while supporting broader digital campaign implementation across web and fundraising platforms.


This role reports to the Senior Manager, Web Administrator, to implement campaigns, maintain platform quality, and ensure accurate, accessible, and high\-performing digital communications. The position is execution\-focused, with responsibility for managing email delivery and supporting digital implementation rather than owning overall digital strategy or platform architecture.

 **Key Duties \& Responsibilities:**

* Email Marketing \& Automation (Primary)
	+ Manage the organization’s day\-to\-day email marketing program, including campaign setup, scheduling, testing, QA, and deployment
	+ Build and maintain email templates and reusable campaign components
	+ Configure audience segmentation, lists, and targeting for email sends
	+ Support marketing automation workflows, including basic nurture flows, triggered emails, and campaign sequencing
	+ Monitor email performance and assist with reporting, QA, and optimization of deliverability and engagement
	+ Ensure emails follow accessibility, branding, and technical best practices
* Digital Campaign \& Website Support
	+ Support day\-to\-day updates and maintenance of the organization’s website(s), including CMS content updates, page builds, and QA
	+ Assist with digital campaign launches, landing page setup, and cross\-channel implementation
	+ Implement UX, accessibility, and content updates across digital properties in alignment with established standards
	+ Support troubleshooting, routine enhancements, and platform quality assurance across web and campaign pages
	+ Coordinate with vendors or internal partners on assigned digital and email initiatives
* Analytics, QA, and Operations
	+ Support analytics validation, including basic reporting checks, link tracking QA, and campaign tagging verification
	+ Document processes, templates, and workflows to improve consistency and scalability
	+ Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to execute email communications, digital campaigns, and support content updates
	+ Conduct routine performance checks and operational improvements across email and digital channels

 **Qualifications:**

* 3 to 5 years of professional experience managing and executing email marketing campaigns, with demonstrated expertise in Luminate Online.
* Experience working with marketing automation tools or workflow\-based email systems
* Experience managing website updates in a CMS environment (Drupal, WordPress, or similar)
* Working knowledge of HTML/CSS and basic troubleshooting concepts
* Strong attention to detail, QA discipline, and organizational skills
* Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a collaborative environment

 **Physical Requirements:**

* Constant use of a computer and other office productivity equipment, such as computer printer, calculator, and copier.
* The position requires a professional, quiet working environment free from background noise and interruptions, conducive to providing high\-quality phone support to participants, donors, and stakeholders.
* Prolonged periods of a stationary position at least 50% of the time.
* The ability to recognize details at close range for extended periods of time.
* The ability to communicate information and ideas so others will understand. Must be able to exchange accurate information in these situations.

**One of many reasons to join the ZERO team is because we offer great benefits!**

* Flexible (Unlimited) PTO, upon completion of probationary period
* 403(b) retirement plan matching
* Employer\-paid benefits include: Medical, Dental, Vision, Short\-Term Disability, \& Long\-Term Disability insurance
* FSA/HRA

  

This role will report directly to the Senior Web Administrator and will work closely to support ZERO’s mission to improve and save lives from prostate cancer through advocacy, education, awareness, and support.


This position is based remotely. Candidates may live in any area within the United States, but nationwide travel will be required approximately 15% of the time.


ZERO Prostate Cancer is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to creating an inclusive work environment for all employees. We encourage BIPOC, Veterans, individuals with Disabilities, and those affected by prostate cancer to apply. Applicants must be authorized to work in the United States.


If you require reasonable accommodation to complete the application, interview, or any pre\-employment testing or otherwise participate in the employee selection process, please direct your inquiries to hr@zerocancer.org.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Specialist
jobs.description:
Join Goodwin’s Global Operations Team, and make a real impact on a global scale. At Goodwin, we work with some of the world’s most successful and innovative investors, entrepreneurs and disruptors in the life sciences, private equity, real estate, technology and financial industries, and where they converge. As part of the Global Operations Team – all business professionals at the firm – you’ll collaborate with colleagues from varied backgrounds and experiences, fostering an environment where cross\-functional learning, networking, and collaboration are at the core of what we do.  

  

Here, we’re not just supporting a law firm; we’re partnering with attorneys and clients to deliver cutting\-edge solutions in high\-stakes litigation and dispute resolution, world\-class regulatory compliance and advisory services, and complex transactions. Our commitment to integrity, ingenuity, agility, and ambition drives us, and we’re proud to have been recognised as the “Best Business Team” by The American Lawyer.  

  

This is your opportunity to grow professionally in a dynamic, global environment, surrounded by forward\-thinking peers.
The Marketing Operations Specialist plays a key role in enabling the planning and execution of strategic team initiatives by coordinating cross\-functional efforts, managing timelines/milestones, and supporting operational and technology\-driven improvements. This role focuses on strengthening processes and project managing multi\-channel marketing campaigns and technology implementations.
What You Will Do:* Drive continuous improvement in processes, tools, and workflows to reduce friction, improve efficiency, and facilitate internal and cross\-functional team alignment using Adobe Workfront, and other platforms/technologies, alongside the Marketing Operations Manager
* Project manage cross\-functional, firm\-priority marketing campaigns and technology implementations end\-to\-end, seamlessly navigating shifting scope and timelines while ensuring milestones and strategic objectives are met
* Maintain project plans and timelines for ongoing strategic team initiatives throughout the year, ensuring progress and accountability
* Co\-lead kickoff, status, and post\-mortem meetings, facilitating and guiding conversations across internal and stakeholder groups in partnership with the Marketing Operations Manager.
* Facilitate training team members and new hires on our processes, tools, and best practices
* Support with external vendor relationship management; including but not limited to routing invoices and contracts, and facilitating budget alignment


Who You Are:* 4\+ years of proven work experience in project management and marketing operations; B2B/professional services experience preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or related field or equivalent experience
* Experience with Workfront (preferred) and/or other project management software
* Proactive problem\-solver with strong analytical skills, capable of developing thoughtful solutions
* Strategic communicator, capable of conveying complex ideas clearly and effectively to different audiences and ensuring alignment with project goals
* Adaptable individual able to pivot quickly in response to changing circumstances, ensuring continuous progress and success
* Creative thinker with strong organizational skills, capable of generating innovative ideas while maintaining structure and order in their work
* Active learner interested in continuously honing and growing their skillset
* Collaborative team player, able to work with colleagues across various departments to achieve common goals and foster a positive work environment
* Occasional travel to other offices.


\#LI\-NC1
Benefits and More
At Goodwin, you will discover your next career opportunity with a rewarding compensation package and comprehensive benefits, including:* Health, dental, and vision insurance
* Life and disability insurance
* Retirement \& Savings Plan
* Emergency back\-up child and adult care
* Paid vacation, sick time off, and holidays
* Professional development and career advancement opportunities
* Employee recognition and reward programs
* Employee wellness and assistance programs
* Employee discounts and perks

Consistent with the SF Fair Chance Ordinance, an arrest and conviction record will not automatically disqualify a qualified applicant from consideration.

Requesting accommodations will not adversely affect the outcome of your application.

jobs.title: Lead Manager – Marketing Analytics
jobs.description:
### **Job Introduction**


This is a rare opportunity to shape how marketing performance is understood, shared, and acted on across our brand portfolio. As Lead Manager \- Marketing Analytics, you’ll sit at the heart of our consumer engagement work, turning complex data into clear stories that influence decisions. Working closely with the Head of Consumer Engagement, you’ll help define the future of how we measure success across digital and media channels.

  

### **Main Responsibility**


You’ll lead the development of a holistic, connected view of brand performance by eliminating silos in channel reporting and standardizing how insights are delivered across brands. Through clear dashboards, reporting cadence, and thoughtful analysis, you’ll create a constant feedback loop that helps teams optimize activity and investment. You’ll partner closely with media and digital leads to align inputs, define KPIs, and track performance against agreed benchmarks. Alongside this, you’ll identify opportunities for testing and experimentation, shaping learning agendas and helping the business understand what really works and why.

  

### **Our Ideal Candidate**


You’re someone who is fluent in marketing data but motivated by impact rather than spreadsheets. You bring strong experience in marketing analytics, performance measurement, and reporting across digital and media channels, and you’re comfortable defining metrics, testing hypotheses, and challenging assumptions. You have a natural ability to turn data into insight, and insight into stories that energize teams and influence senior stakeholders. Curious by nature, you stay close to evolving consumer, tools, and data partners, and you enjoy being a thought leader who helps others make better decisions through evidence. The salary range for this role, based out of our NYC office, is $135,778 \- $150,500\.


### **What we can offer you**


* We offer a competitive salary and benefits which are designed to promote our employees financial wellbeing. Employees are also eligible to participate in a bonus plan.
* Our employees enjoy a generous vacation entitlement.
* Comprehensive Private Healthcare that includes Medical, Dental \& Vision
* Our employees can join our 401(k) savings plan. The company matches employees’ contribution up to 5%, in addition to a Discretionary Contribution.
* Our Employee Assistance Programme offers practical, impartial support on everyday matters ranging from medical, financial and legal to home and family issues.
* Our Life and AD\&D cover is a multiple of three times your annual basic salary.
* Product allowance so that you can enjoy our fantastic portfolio of brands with your family and friends.
* Every employee has the opportunity to claim funding each year for a charity or charities for which they have raised money, volunteered their time or personally donated.
* Learning resources to help you be your best self.


### **About William Grant \& Sons**


A HOME FOR RARE CHARACTERS


William Grant \& Sons: a home where Rare Characters thrive.


We value every employee for their rare character, distinctive skills, experience and perspectives. Every one of our colleagues has a role to play in helping us to achieve our growth ambitions.


At William Grant \& Sons, our vision is to be A home where rare characters thrive. We value all colleagues for their rare character, distinctive skills, experience and perspectives. Diversity \& Inclusion is at the heart of how we do things at William Grant \& Sons, fully aligned to our purpose and our company values. We strive to create an environment where we can all be our best and bring our whole selves to work.


We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive workplace for the benefit of our employees, our products, and our community. We’re proud to provide equal opportunity to all applicants regardless of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, status as a parent, national origin, physical or mental disability, veteran status, family medical history or genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.


OUR AGILE WORKING PHILOSOPHY


Our agile working philosophy is to “Have your best work day everyday”.  

Built on trust, we empower our rare characters to have their best work day every day. Where flexibility and positive working experiences help employees to feel connected and release potential across our teams.  

We are open to discussing possible agile/flexible working options as part of the recruitment process.


INCLUSIVE RECRUITMENT PROCESS


Diversity \& Inclusion is at the heart of how we do things at William Grant \& Sons, fully aligned to our purpose and our company values. We want to ensure that our recruitment process is inclusive. If you have any questions or need some support with your application we’d love to hear from you. So please get in touch with our HR team at recruitment.enquiries@wgrant.com.


William Grant \& Sons

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Engineer
jobs.description:
Gong harnesses the power of AI to transform how revenue teams win. The Gong Revenue AI Operating System unifies data, insights, and workflows into a single, trusted system that observes, guides, and acts alongside the world’s most successful revenue teams. Powered by the Gong Revenue Graph, AI\-powered intelligence, specialized agents, and trusted applications, Gong helps more than 5,000 companies around the world deeply understand their teams and customers, automate critical sales workflows, and close more deals with less effort. For more information, visit www.gong.io.



At Gong, you will join a company built on innovative products, ambitious goals, and passionate people. We are shaping the future of revenue intelligence and we want people who are excited to build what comes next. You will work with a team that dreams big, moves fast, and cares deeply about the craft and about each other. Here, transparency and trust are core to how we operate, and every person has the opportunity to make a visible impact. If you want to grow, stretch, and do work that truly matters, Gong is the place to do the best work of your career.


We’re looking for a strong senior Marketing Operations Engineer to build, optimize, and maintain the systems that power our marketing execution. You’ll independently own complex automation, routing logic, and integrations, ensuring our workflows run reliably and scale effectively. This role turns architectural designs into clean, high\-performing system configurations and proactively improves performance over time. It’s ideal for someone who loves building, solving technical problems, and taking full ownership of execution quality.


##### **RESPONSIBILITIES**


* Independently configure and maintain complex lifecycle automation, routing logic, scoring models, and system integrations across the marketing technology stack.
* Own end\-to\-end technical execution of projects, from scoping and configuration through testing, deployment, and post\-launch validation.
* Translate architectural designs and business requirements into scalable system configurations.
* Proactively identify and resolve workflow inefficiencies, data inconsistencies, and integration risks.
* Monitor and maintain system health, ensuring automation and integrations perform reliably at scale.
* Lead rigorous testing and change management processes for all technical updates.
* Implement and maintain data validation, hygiene, and operational guardrails in partnership with RevOps and Analytics.
* Provide technical feasibility recommendations and scope estimates during cross\-functional planning.
* Maintain detailed system documentation, including configuration logic, dependencies, and change logs.
* Continuously improve system performance by identifying automation opportunities that reduce manual effort and operational fragility.

##### **QUALIFICATIONS**


* 4\+ years of experience in Marketing Operations, Revenue Operations, or Marketing Technology within a B2B environment.
* Proven experience independently configuring and maintaining complex automation, lifecycle workflows, and system integrations.
* Advanced proficiency in at least one major Marketing Automation Platform and strong working knowledge of Salesforce CRM architecture.
* Hands\-on experience with integration logic (APIs, webhooks, iPaaS tools) and troubleshooting cross\-system data flow issues.
* Strong understanding of marketing data structures, lifecycle stages, and routing logic.
* Demonstrated ability to scope, execute, test, and deploy technical solutions independently.
* Clear documentation and change\-management practices with attention to operational detail.
* A systems\-thinker who anticipates and quantifies downstream implications before implementing solutions
* Structured problem\-solving approach with comfort operating in ambiguity
* Strong cross\-functional communication skills, with the ability to clearly explain technical constraints and tradeoffs to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Proactively explores automation and AI capabilities and applies approved solutions to improve workflow efficiency and system performance for Marketing Operations and the broader Marketing team.

##### **PERKS \& BENEFITS**


* We offer Gongsters a variety of medical, dental, and vision plans, designed to fit you and your family’s needs.
* Wellbeing Fund \- flexible wellness stipend to support a healthy lifestyle.
* Mental Health benefits with covered therapy and coaching.
* 401(k) program to help you invest in your future.
* Education \& learning stipend for personal growth and development.
* Flexible vacation time to promote a healthy work\-life blend.
* Paid parental leave to support you and your family.
* Company\-wide recharge days each quarter.
* Work from home stipend to help you succeed in a remote environment.


**The annual salary hiring range for this position is $119,000 \- $175,000 USD.**

Compensation is based on factors unique to each candidate, including, but not limited to, job\-related skills, qualification, education, experience, and location. At Gong, we have a location\-based compensation structure, which means there may be a different range for candidates in other locations. The total compensation package for this position, in addition to base compensation, may include incentive compensation, bonus, equity, and benefits. Some of our sales compensation programs also offer the potential to achieve above targeted earnings for those who exceed their sales targets.



We are always looking for outstanding Gongsters! So if this sounds like something that interests you regardless of compensation, please reach out. We may have more roles for you to consider and would love to connect.


**We have noticed a rise in recruiting impersonations across the industry, where scammers attempt to access candidates' personal and financial information through fake interviews and offers. All Gong recruiting email communications will always come from the @gong.io domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Gong via other sources should be ignored.**



*Gong is an equal\-opportunity employer. We believe that diversity is integral to our success, and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, military status, genetic information, or any other basis protected by applicable law.*


*To review Gong's privacy policy, visit* *https://www.gong.io/gong\-io\-job\-candidates\-privacy\-notice/* *for more details.*


*\#LI\-MT1*

jobs.title: HubSpot & Marketing Automation Specialist
jobs.description:
Do you love building systems, automating workflows, and making data actually useful?

Do you get excited when a broken pipeline finally works the way it should?

And are you someone who deeply understands Hubspot, Make, Zapier? If so, keep reading \- this role is for you.

Briefs Finance a financial technology startup that is democratizing investing research. We are on mission to help 1\.3 billion people be better with money.

We're looking for a **full\-time HubSpot and Marketing Automation Specialist** to help us execute our marketing systems, maintain clean data, and build workflows that scale.

You are required to have 2\+ years of hands\-on HubSpot experience. That's CRM, workflows, pipelines, and lead lifecycle management. Plus, familiarity with automation tools like Make.com or Zapier is required. Experience with UTM tracking and attribution reporting is a strong plus.

* If you've never built a HubSpot workflow from scratch, this is not the role for you.
* If you can't translate a business need into a technical automation, this is not the role for you.

Please note: **this is a full time in office position.** Our office is located in the heart of Detroit's business district.

Your role will require you to:

* Maintain and optimize our HubSpot CRM and Marketing Hub
* Build and improve workflows based on direction from our CMO and department leads
* Use Make.com, Zapier, or HubSpot's native tools to automate repetitive tasks and connect platforms
* Troubleshoot data flow issues, form integrations, and lead capture processes
* Build HubSpot dashboards that give our team clear, actionable insights
* Support UTM tracking and attribution reporting across paid and organic channels

**If you are interested in this position, please do two things. (1\) Apply here AND (2\) send us a video. You will not be considered if you don't submit both.** 

**Here are the video requirements:**

* Record a video (maximum 3\-minutes) of you explaining why you'd make a great Automation Specialist at Briefs Finance
* Upload the video to Google Drive, or Dropbox, or YouTube (unlisted)
* Email us the URL to the video at: hello@briefs.co
* Make the subject line: Automation Specialist \- Video Submission
* This can be a simple cell phone video. We do NOT care about the quality of your video

We are a startup. That means, there are certain characteristics you should be aware of prior to applying.

Some of the biggest benefits of working for a startup include:

* Being an early member of a fast growing team
* Seeing the impact of your work
* Opportunity for greater financial growth

But working for a startup is not easy. Some of the requirements of working for a startup include:

* Working long hours
* Enduring company pivots
* Making personal sacrifices when needed

**About Briefs Finance.** 

We're a financial technology company on a mission to help 1\.3 billion people be better with money.

We do this through our softwares, newsletters, and education. We have a free financial newsletter called Market Briefs and a paid education and research platform called Market Briefs Pro. We also built an AI\-powered stock research tool called Briefs Terminal.

Learn more on our website here: https://www.briefs.co and our social media pages.

**What we expect from our team.** 

First, we expect our team to lead by example.

* We're teaching finance, so we require our team members to live with smart financial habits.

Second, we expect our team to be passionate about their work.

* If you're just looking for a "job" \- please don't apply.
* We're looking for team members who care about the work they produce.

Third, we expect our team to innovate and take risks.

* We're a startup, and you'll be asked to innovate and try new things.

**How much will I get paid?** 

We strive to ensure our team members are well compensated. Your salary will depend on your experience. The salary range for this position is listed on this page.

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: $65,000\.00 \- $80,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Paid time off
* Relocation assistance

Application Question(s):

* Did you submit a video to complete your application? Please see job description to learn more.
* Are you excited to work in\-person at our Detroit office?
* On a scale of 1 \- 10 (10 being the most comfortable) \- how comfortable are you with Hubspot?
* How comfortable are you with building low code automations?

Ability to Commute:

* Detroit, MI 48226 (Required)

Ability to Relocate:

* Detroit, MI 48226: Relocate before starting work (Required)

Work Location: In person
